item.title: Winx Vibe Pure Hybrid ANC Headphones
item.description: “Dive into a world of pristine audio with WINX VIBE Pure Hybrid Active Noise Cancellation Headphones. Experience immersive, high-resolution audio that makes every beat rich and vibrant. Whether you’re a music lover, a podcast enthusiast, or someone who enjoys crystal-clear audio during calls, these Bluetooth headphones deliver superior sound quality. Eliminate noise by up to 43dB with Hybrid Active Noise Cancellation (ANC) technology. Block out the world and focus on what matters, whether you’re commuting, working, or relaxing at home. Enjoy marathon listening sessions with up to 55 hours of playtime on a single charge when ANC is off and at 50% volume. This extended battery life means you can enjoy your favourite music, podcasts, and calls without worrying about frequent recharging. And when it’s time to recharge, get back to your music quickly with a full recharge in just 2 hours. Thanks to its lightweight, ergonomic design and memory foam ear pads, the WINX VIBE Pure Hybrid Active Noise Cancellation Headphones remain comfortable even during extended use. The adjustable headband and swivel ear cups provide a custom fit for all-day comfort. The 3-microphone array and VDCNN technology ensure quality, clear calls by blocking out distractions. Need to stay aware of your surroundings? Switch to Transparency Mode to amplify ambient sounds, helping you stay connected to your environment. Support for both wired and wireless connectivity gives you multiple ways to connect your devices and tailor your listening experience. Bluetooth 5.3 ensures a reliable wireless connection range of up to 10 metres, allowing seamless pairing with both iOS and Android devices. For those who prefer a wired listening experience, plug in the included 3.5mm audio cable instead. FEATURES: Charge Within 2 Hours Up To 55 Hours Playtime Hybrid ANC eliminates up to 43dB of environmental noise 3-Microphone Array Ensures Quality, Clear Calls Pair with up to 2 devices simultaneously SPECIFICATIONS: Bluetooth version: V5.3 Bluetooth profile: A2DP, AVRCP, HFP Bluetooth transmission range: 10 metres Speaker frequency: 20-20KHz Speaker impedence: 32Ω±15% Speaker size: 40mm Sensitivity: 99±3dB@1KHz Audio latency: 68 milliseconds Audio codecs: SBC Noise cancellation: Hybrid ANC (up to 43dB reduction) Microphone: 3-Microphone array Battery: 500mAh Charging input: Type-C port (5V/500mA) Charging time: Up to 2 Hours Playtime: Up to 55 hours Audio jack: 3.5mm AUX Compatibility: iOS/Android Product dimensions: 16 x 8.1 x 19.6cm Product weight: 263g WHAT’S IN THE BOX: WINX VIBE Pure Hybrid ANC Headphones – Black x1 Type-C Charging Cable x1 3.5mm Audio Cable x 1 User Manual x1

item.title: PCBuilder Picometre 14.5W/m.k Thermal Paste 2g
item.description: The PCBuilder Picometre 14.5W/m.k Thermal Paste is an ideal choice for PC builders and tech enthusiasts seeking exceptional cooling performance. This premium thermal paste is designed to enhance heat transfer between your CPU or GPU and cooler, ensuring your system stays cool even during the most demanding tasks. With outstanding thermal conductivity (14.5W/m.k) and ultra-low resistance ( Engineered for a balanced density (viscosity of 95000±2000mPa, specific gravity of 2.8), this thermal paste allows for smooth, precise application every time. Its formula is optimized for easy spreading, ensuring a consistent layer that fills microscopic gaps for maximum contact. Perfect for both building and maintaining PCs, this heatsink compound makes thermal paste application simple and mess-free. Built to withstand extreme conditions, the Picometre thermal paste can handle operating temperatures from -50°C to 280°C, making it ideal for high-performance systems and overclocking. Its durable silicone-based formula combines 85% metal oxides, providing a long-lasting seal that resists drying, cracking, or degrading. As a non-conductive paste, it offers complete peace of mind, eliminating any risk of short-circuiting sensitive components. To apply the Picometre 14.5W/m.k Thermal Paste, clean the contact surfaces of your CPU or GPU and heatsink, then add a small, even amount to the centre of the component. Secure the heatsink to spread the paste evenly, resulting in close and optimised heat transfer. This straightforward thermal paste application ensures maximum cooling efficiency and extends your components’s lifespan. Upgrade your system with the PCBuilder Picometre 14.5W/m.k Thermal Paste and experience the difference in cooling performance. Whether you’re gaming, editing, or simply looking to maintain your PC, this premium heatsink compound is a trusted choice for top-tier thermal efficiency. This thermal paste gives you cooling you can count on when your system is pushed to the limit. FEATURES: Perfect for PC building or maintenance, boost your cooling performance Exceptional cooling efficiency with 14.5W/m.k thermal conductivity Rapid heat transfers with minimal Balanced density for smooth and controlled application Easily handles temperatures up to 280°C Durable silicone-based formula with metal oxides Non-conductive of electricity for total peace of mind SPECIFICATIONS: Model: PCB-G2G14 Thermal conductivity: 14.5W/m.k Thermal impedance: Viscosity: 95000±2000mPa Vdaf (200°C/24h): Specific gravity: 2.8 Components: Silicones (polydimethylsiloxane) 15% Metal oxides (zinc oxide & aluminium oxide) 85% Operating temperature: -50° to 280℃ Colour: Grey Product dimensions: 11 x 2 x 2 cm Product Weight: 2g WHAT’S IN THE BOX: PCBuilder Picometre 14.5W/m.k Thermal Paste 2g x1 Cleaning wipe x1 Small dust brush x1 Thermal paste scraper x1 User manual x1

item.title: Novaro Vertical Rechargeable Mouse
item.description: Product Description Discover why this Ergonomic Vertical Mouse is a game-changer in the world of computing. With its sleek design, advanced features, and focus on user comfort, this mouse is a must-have for anyone who spends long hours at their desk. Here's what sets it apart: Revolutionary Ergonomic Design The vertical alignment of the mouse promotes a more natural hand position, reducing strain on your wrist and forearm. This is ideal for users who experience discomfort or pain with traditional mice, offering a significant improvement in overall comfort during extended computer use. Health Benefits Specifically designed to minimize muscle tension and repetitive strain, this mouse can help prevent conditions like carpal tunnel syndrome. It's perfect for professionals, gamers, and anyone seeking a more ergonomic solution for daily computing. Plug & Play Convenience Forget about complicated setups or software downloads. This mouse comes with a USB receiver that allows for instant plug-and-play use. Simply plug it into your computer, and you're good to go. Long-Lasting Rechargeable Battery With a 5C lithium rechargeable battery, this mouse offers 30-60 days of use on a full charge, depending on your usage habits. The rechargeable battery saves you money and the hassle of constantly replacing disposable batteries. Use While Charging No need to wait for a full charge before using the mouse. Thanks to the included USB to Micro USB charging cable, you can continue to work while it charges. Although you may experience slight resistance due to the cable, it ensures no downtime during those critical moments. Intelligent Power Management The mouse is equipped with an automatic sleep and wake function, preserving battery life when not in use. There's also a power switch to manually turn it off when you're done for the day, maximizing the battery's lifespan. Clear Charge Indicators Never be left guessing about your battery status. The mouse features easy-to-understand LED indicators: Red light: Charging Yellow/Green light: Fully charged Flashing light: Indicates poor connection between the cable and port. DPI Button for Precision Control Whether you're editing photos, gaming, or browsing the web, the DPI button allows you to adjust the sensitivity of the mouse on the fly. Switch between different DPI settings to find the level of precision that suits your task. Quiet, Silent Clicks Ideal for quiet work environments or late-night use, the silent buttons ensure that your clicks don't disturb others. This feature is perfect for offices, shared spaces, or just maintaining a calm work atmosphere. Handy Forward/Back Buttons Navigate effortlessly through web pages and documents with dedicated forward and back buttons. These conveniently located side buttons save time and improve productivity, especially during browsing sessions. This Ergonomic Vertical Mouse not only enhances your comfort but also offers cutting-edge functionality, making it the perfect addition to your workstation. Don't miss out on this revolution in ergonomic design-get yours today on Takealot! What's in the box 1 x Novaro Ergonomic Vertical Mouse 1 x USB To Micro USB Cable 1 Metre

item.title: eSun HIPS - Natural - 1.75 - 1kg Filament
item.description: Please Note: eSun has recently changed their filament spool material. You may receive a cardboard spool, instead of the plastic spools depicted above. This move means a more environmentally friendly design to their 3D filament spools which comfortably sit on your 3D printer's standard spool holder for smooth filament feeding. These 1kg rolls of Natural eSUN HIPS 1.75mm filament are made from a very unique plastic known as High Impact Polystyrene. Despite the common perception of polystyrene, this material is infused with strong impact-resistant properties, making it both an easy and durable material to print with. Some of the main features of this plastic is that it is highly resistant to impact, as well as resistant to warping during the printing process, while being dissolvable with Limonene solvent. These features make it great for printing parts or objects that may be exposed to high impact, but also as dissolvable struts and supports for other materials during prints. The reason why some 3D Makers choose HIPS Filament over ABS Filament is because of the reduced sagging, as it caters to some of common problems with overhangs. Additionally, it offers similar printing characteristics and temperature requirements as ABS, meaning that it’s easy to learn to print with if you are already experienced in ABS printing. PRINTING SPECIFICATIONS: Print Temp – 220° - 260°C Bed Temp – 110°C Density (g/cm 3 ) – 1.05 Distortion Temp (C,0.45MPa) – 80 Melt Flow Index (g/10min) – 3 (200°C/5kg) Tensile Strength (MPa) – 27 Elongation at Break (%) – 55 Bending Strength (MPa) – 39 IZOD Impact Strength (kJ) – 11 TYPICAL APPLICATIONS FOR NATURAL HIPS 1.75MM 1KG ESUN: These 1kg rolls of 1.75mm Natural HIPS Filament from eSUN are most commonly purchased as an alternative to ABS filament, as it offers many of the unique properties of ABS but with a few extra benefits. Not only is it warp-resistant, but can also be dissolved or finely polished with limonene solvent. This, in the hands of a veteran 3D Maker, is the ideal combination of features to produce amazing results. Additionally, HIPS is an excellent choice for dual-extruder setups to build struts and supports for plastics that are prone to sagging on overhangs, which can then be easily removed without damaging the prints which they are supporting. The similar temperature requirements also mean that you don’t even need to change the settings if you are printing this alongside ABS, as they share very similar printing characteristics and requirements.

item.title: eSun PLA Light Weight - 1.75mm - 1kg - Natural
item.description: PLA-LW Filament Overview PLA-LW (Light Weight PLA) is a filament specially developed for aeromodelling. It uses active foaming technology to achieve lightweight, low-density PLA parts with a foaming volume ratio of 220% and a density as low as 0.54 g/cm³ . The interlayer bonding is stable, and both foaming rate and strength can be controlled by adjusting the printing temperature. Key Features Foaming makes layered patterns almost invisible Matte and delicate surface finish Enables lighter wing load and lower stall speed for model aircraft Greatly improves aeromodelling performance Product Specifications Physical Properties Density (g/cm³): 1.2 Melt Flow Index: 8.1 (190°C/2.16kg) Heat Distortion Temp (°C, 0.45MPa): 42 Tensile Strength (MPa) (XY): 11.39 Tensile Strength (MPa) (Z): 1.74 Elongation at Break (%) (XY): 4.02 Elongation at Break (%) (Z): 1.52 Flexural Strength (MPa) (XY): 20.4 Flexural Strength (MPa) (Z): 3 Flexural Modulus (MPa) (XY): 964.07 Flexural Modulus (MPa) (Z): 206.83 IZOD Impact Strength (kJ/m²) (XY): 5.49 IZOD Impact Strength (kJ/m²) (Z): 0.73 Printing Parameters Extruder Temperature (°C): 190–270 Bed Temperature (°C): 45–60 Fan Speed (%): 100 Printing Speed (mm/s): 40–100 Heated Bed: Required

item.title: eSun ePC - Natural - 1.75mm Natural - 0.5kg
item.description: In the world of 3D printing, there are so many different colours to choose from to create funky, exciting or otherwise tasteful prints, although there are times in which you might want to print in a completely transparent plastic. This is why our spools of Natural Polycarbonate 1.75mm 0.5kg ESUN filament are a popular choice among 3D Printing enthusiasts, as they open up many new creative possibilities for printing see-through parts and objects like covers, cases, screens and even lenses for your projects. Aside from the fact that it’s transparent, Polycarbonate Filament also offers the benefit of being highly durable, with impressive impact strength. In fact, some PC polymers even outshine acrylic materials like PMMA, and this is achieved at less than half the density of most glass structures as well. This makes PC not only durable, but also lightweight compared to many of the alternatives on the market. And just to top off the already-impressive characteristics of Polycarbonate, eSUN have also specially formulated their ePC Filament to be fire resistant to the rating of UL94 V-2, making it ideal for all kinds of applications from high-strength decorative pieces to electronics boxes and even 3D printed soldering accessories. PETG is the perfect filament to combine strength and ductility, which is why it's used in so many mechanical parts and robotics. It has great chemical resistance with good water, acidic and alkalic resistance. PETG in its raw form is also FDA and EU commission regulation approved as Food Contact Safe. item.title: ESP32 Dev Board - WROOM chip - USB C
item.description: ESP32 Dev Board – WROOM-32 with USB-C – Technical Specifications: Module – ESP32-WROOM-32 Chip – ESP32-D0WDQ6 Dual-Core 32-bit LX6 Microprocessor CPU Speed – Up to 240MHz (Adjustable) ROM – 448KB SRAM – 520KB Flash Memory – 4MB (Onboard SPI Flash) Wi-Fi – 802.11 b/g/n (2.4GHz), up to 150Mbps Bluetooth – Bluetooth 4.2 BR/EDR + BLE GPIO Pins – 38 Pins Total (30 Usable GPIO) Analogue Inputs (ADC) – 18 Channels (12-bit ADC) DAC Outputs – 2 Channels (8-bit DAC) Touch Pins – 10 Capacitive Touch GPIO Communication – SPI, I2C, I2S, UART, CAN PWM – 16 Channels USB Interface – USB-C (Programming & Power) Operating Voltage – 3.3V (Logic) Input Voltage (USB-C) – 5V Onboard Regulator – AMS1117 3.3V LDO Onboard LED – 1 × Blue LED (GPIO2) Onboard Buttons – EN (Reset) + BOOT (Flash Mode) Operating Temperature – -40°C to +85°C Dimensions – 51 × 28mm (approx.) Compatible IDEs – Arduino IDE, ESP-IDF, MicroPython, PlatformIO Handy Tips for Using the ESP32 WROOM Dev Board: 1: The ESP32 WROOM-32 is a powerful dual-core microcontroller with built-in Wi-Fi and Bluetooth — making it significantly more capable than the Arduino Uno or Nano for IoT and connected projects. The two cores can be used independently: Core 0 handles Wi-Fi and Bluetooth tasks in the background while Core 1 runs your main application code, allowing true parallel processing without performance compromise. 2: The USB-C connector on this board is used for both programming and power. Connect it to any USB-C cable to upload code via Arduino IDE or flash firmware via esptool. To upload code, the board will typically enter flash mode automatically — if it does not, hold the BOOT button while pressing EN (Reset) , then release BOOT. Once flashing is complete, press EN to restart the board and run your code. 3: The ESP32's ADC (analogue to digital converter) has a known non-linearity issue — readings are most accurate between approximately 0.1V and 3.1V and become unreliable near 0V and 3.3V at the extremes. For precise analogue measurements, apply a calibration curve in your code using esp_adc_cal in ESP-IDF, or use an external ADC module such as the ADS1115 for the highest accuracy. 4: When using Wi-Fi or Bluetooth , note that ADC2 channels (GPIO 0, 2, 4, 12–15, 25–27) cannot be used simultaneously with Wi-Fi — attempting to do so will return errors or garbage values. If you need analogue input alongside Wi-Fi, use ADC1 channels only (GPIO 32–39), which are not affected by the radio. 5: The ESP32 operates at 3.3V logic — all GPIO pins are 3.3V and are not 5V tolerant . Connecting a 5V signal directly to any GPIO pin will damage the chip over time. When interfacing with 5V sensors, displays, or modules, always use a logic level shifter or a simple voltage divider (two resistors) on the signal line to step the voltage down to a safe 3.3V level before it reaches the ESP32. 6: For the best Wi-Fi range and signal stability, avoid placing the board inside a fully enclosed metal enclosure — the onboard PCB antenna on the WROOM module needs a clear line of sight. Orient the board so the antenna end (the end without the USB connector) faces away from large metal objects, ground planes, and other RF-emitting devices such as motors and switching power supplies.

item.title: ESP32 Series Development Board - Micro USB
item.description: Description The ESP32 DevKitC V4 is a compact and versatile development board featuring the ESP32-WROOM-32D/WROOM-32U module. Equipped with a dual-core 32-bit CPU, this board is Arduino-compatible and designed for IoT projects, robotics, home automation, and smart devices. It includes a USB-C connector and expansion headers for easy interfacing, making it ideal for developers working on Linux, macOS, or Windows using the ESP-IDF framework. The ESP32-DevKitC V4 is produced by Espressif and breaks out most I/O pins to headers on both sides for convenient peripheral connections. It can be mounted on a breadboard or used with jumper wires. Multiple versions are available to meet diverse requirements, including ESP32-WROOM-32, WROOM-32D, WROOM-32U, SOLO-1, and WROVER series. Technical Details / Specs Module Options : ESP32-WROOM-32, WROOM-32D, WROOM-32U, SOLO-1, WROVER Series Power Mode : Room electrical / hard wiring Battery Properties : Without Battery Connector : USB-C Compatibility : Arduino, ESP-IDF Framework Supported OS : Windows, Linux, macOS Included : ESP32-DevKitC V4 Board USB A / Micro USB B Cable Features : Compact design for breadboard mounting Expansion headers for easy interfacing Ideal for IoT, robotics, and smart devices

item.title: Mini-Mag Magnetic Tile Tracks with 2 Cars 93 Pieces
item.description: Ignite your child’s imagination with a magnetic track set that lets them build, design, and race their own creations ! The Edu-Matic Mini-Mag Set blends hands-on construction, open-ended storytelling, and early STEM learning into one exciting 93-piece kit. Kids can snap together 37 track sections and 20 magnetic tiles to create a bustling cityscape, then send two speedy cars zooming around the routes they’ve engineered. With road signs, windows, stickers, and track raisers, every build becomes a brand-new adventure. The pieces click together effortlessly, allowing children to build independently and reconfigure their layouts as often as they like. Track raisers make it easy to design bridges, ramps, and multi-level tracks—perfect for budding engineers who love experimenting. Whether used at home, in a classroom, or as a gift, this set guarantees hours of screen-free fun and endless replay value. Feature Highlights: Build, Click & Race – Create custom track layouts and race two AA-powered cars around the course Complete Play Kit – 93 pieces including tracks, magnetic tiles, signs, windows, stickers, and raisers STEM-Focused Play – Encourages sequencing, problem-solving, spatial planning, and creative storytelling Easy City Building – Use 20 magnetic tiles to construct buildings and scenery around your track Elevated Track Designs – 37 track pieces and 18 raisers allow multi-level constructions Head-to-Head Racing – Two battery-operated cars (AA batteries not included) for friendly competition Role-Play Elements – Includes 10 road signs and 6 windows to bring your mini city to life Technical Specifications: Track Pieces: 37 Magnetic Tiles: 20 Battery Cars: 2 × AA-powered (batteries not included) Road Signs: 10 Windows: 6 Track Raisers: 18 Total Pieces: 93 What’s in the Box: 1 × 93-piece Mini-Mag Magnetic Track Set 2 × Battery-Operated Cars 20 × Magnetic Tiles 37 × Track Pieces 1 × Set of Stickers, Signposts & Track Raisers

item.title: Creality K2 Pro 3D Printer – High-Speed CoreXY FDM Printer with AI Cameras, Auto Leveling, and Enclosed Chamber (300×300×300 mm)
item.description: Creality K2 Pro 3D Printer – High-Speed CoreXY FDM Printer with AI Cameras, Auto Leveling, and Enclosed Chamber (300×300×300 mm) The Creality K2 Pro is a professional-grade FDM 3D printer designed for high-speed, precision printing. Powered by Klipper-based Creality OS, it features a robust CoreXY motion system, dual AI cameras, and a fully enclosed heated chamber. With advanced monitoring and automation, it’s ideal for complex, high-performance prints across a wide range of materials. Key Specifications Build Volume: 300 × 300 × 300 mm Max Print Speed: Up to 600 mm/s (recommended 300 mm/s) Acceleration: Up to 20,000 mm/s² Firmware: Creality OS (Klipper-based) with input shaping and pressure advance Extruder Type: Direct drive with hardened steel nozzle – supports abrasive and flexible filaments Nozzle Diameter: 0.4 mm (standard, quick-swap) Max Nozzle Temperature: 300°C – compatible with PLA, PETG, TPU, ABS, ASA, PC, carbon fiber composites Max Bed Temperature: 120°C – for strong adhesion and warp resistance Bed Leveling: AI-assisted auto leveling with strain gauge and Z-offset calibration Motion System: CoreXY architecture with lightweight printhead Build Surface: PEI-coated flexible magnetic plate Chamber Heating: Active temperature control for engineering-grade materials AI Features: Dual AI Cameras for real-time print monitoring and failure detection Self-test diagnostics and auto calibration routines Connectivity: WiFi, LAN, USB-C, microSD – supports Creality Cloud remote printing Control Interface: 4.3-inch color touchscreen with model preview Frame Material: Fully enclosed all-metal chassis Dimensions: Approx. 550 × 550 × 650 mm Weight: Approx. 25 kg Assembly: Fully assembled Highlights High-speed CoreXY printing with Klipper-powered firmware AI cameras and auto leveling for consistent first layers and real-time error detection Enclosed heated chamber for stable printing with high-temp materials Ideal for professional prototyping, functional parts, and production-grade workflows Optional Upgrade The Creality Filament System (CFS) can be added separately to enable automatic filament switching, RFID material recognition, and multicolor printing with support for up to 16 filaments.

item.title: Creality K1 Max 2025 3D Printer 300x300x300 with CFS Interface
item.description: The Creality K1 Max (2025 Edition) is a high‑performance, fully enclosed CoreXY 3D printer designed for speed, precision, and serious productivity. Built for creators who need large build volumes without sacrificing print quality, the K1 Max combines a rigid aluminium frame, advanced motion system, and powerful cooling to deliver fast, accurate, and reliable prints straight out of the box. Smart features such as automatic bed levelling, input shaping, and onboard AI monitoring minimise setup time and failed prints, while the fully enclosed chamber ensures consistent results across a wide range of materials. Whether you’re a professional, small business, or advanced hobbyist, the Creality K1 Max 2025 offers a dependable, next‑generation printing experience at an accessible price point. Technical Details / Specs Print Technology: FDM (Fused Deposition Modelling) Motion System: CoreXY high‑speed architecture Build Volume: Large‑format build area suitable for big models and batch printing Enclosure: Fully enclosed chassis for stable temperature control Frame: Rigid aluminium alloy construction Levelling: Automatic bed levelling system Extruder: Direct‑drive, all‑metal extruder Nozzle: High‑temperature capable, quick‑swap design Print Speed: Optimised for ultra‑fast printing with precision control Cooling: High‑performance part cooling and hotend cooling system Display: Integrated touch screen interface Connectivity: USB, Ethernet, and Wi‑Fi support Materials Supported: PLA, PETG, ABS, TPU, and other advanced filaments Monitoring: Intelligent sensors and AI‑assisted print monitoring Target Use: Prototyping, production parts, large models, and professional workflows

item.title: Creality K2 PRO Combo 3D Printer – High-Speed CoreXY with CFS Multicolor System and AI Cameras (300×300×300 mm)
item.description: Creality K2 PRO Combo 3D Printer with CFS – High-Speed CoreXY Multicolor FDM Printer with AI Cameras, Auto Leveling, and Enclosed Chamber (300×300×300 mm) The Creality K2 PRO Combo is a professional-grade FDM 3D printer designed for multicolor, high-speed, and precision printing. Powered by Klipper-based Creality OS , it features a robust CoreXY motion system, dual AI cameras, and a fully enclosed heated chamber. The included CFS (Creality Filament System) enables automatic filament switching for up to four colors (expandable to sixteen), making it ideal for complex, multi-material prints. Key Specifications Build Volume: 300 × 300 × 300 mm Max Print Speed: Up to 600 mm/s (recommended 300 mm/s) Acceleration: Up to 20,000 mm/s² Firmware: Creality OS (Klipper-based) with input shaping and pressure advance Extruder Type: Direct drive with hardened steel nozzle – supports abrasive and flexible filaments Nozzle Diameter: 0.4 mm (standard, quick-swap) Max Nozzle Temperature: 300°C – compatible with PLA, PETG, TPU, ABS, ASA, PC, carbon fiber composites Max Bed Temperature: 120°C – for strong adhesion and warp resistance Bed Leveling: AI-assisted auto leveling with strain gauge and Z-offset calibration Motion System: CoreXY architecture with lightweight printhead Build Surface: PEI-coated flexible magnetic plate Chamber Heating: Active temperature control for engineering-grade materials AI Features: Dual AI Cameras for real-time print monitoring and failure detection Self-test diagnostics and auto calibration routines Multicolor Printing: CFS Unit supports up to 4 filaments (expandable to 16) RFID filament management for automatic material recognition Connectivity: WiFi, LAN, USB-C, microSD – supports Creality Cloud remote printing Control Interface: 4.3-inch color touchscreen with model preview Frame Material: Fully enclosed all-metal chassis Dimensions: Approx. 550 × 550 × 650 mm Weight: Approx. 25 kg Assembly: Fully assembled Highlights Multicolor printing with automatic filament switching via CFS system Klipper-powered firmware for ultra-fast, low-vibration printing AI cameras and auto leveling for consistent first layers and real-time error detection Enclosed heated chamber for stable printing with high-temp materials Ideal for professional prototyping, multi-material models, and production-grade workflows

item.title: Creality K2 Combo 3D Printer – CoreXY High-Speed Multicolor Printing with CFS and Klipper Firmware
item.description: Creality K2 Combo 3D Printer with CFS – High-Speed CoreXY Multicolor FDM Printer with Auto Leveling and RFID Filament Management (260×260×260 mm) The Creality K2 Combo is a next-generation FDM 3D printer designed for multicolor, high-speed, and intelligent printing. Powered by Klipper-based Creality OS , it features a compact CoreXY motion system, smart auto leveling, and the Creality Filament System (CFS) for automatic filament switching across up to 16 colors . With plug-and-play setup and quiet operation, it’s ideal for creative professionals, educators, and advanced hobbyists. Key Specifications Build Volume: 260 × 260 × 260 mm Max Print Speed: Up to 600 mm/s (recommended 300 mm/s) Acceleration: Up to 20,000 mm/s² Firmware: Creality OS (Klipper-based) with input shaping and pressure advance Extruder Type: Direct drive with hardened steel nozzle – supports flexible and abrasive filaments Nozzle Diameter: 0.4 mm (standard, quick-swap) Max Nozzle Temperature: 300°C – compatible with PLA, PETG, TPU, ABS, ASA, PC, carbon fiber composites Max Bed Temperature: 120°C – for strong adhesion and warp resistance Bed Leveling: Smart auto leveling with strain gauge sensor and targeted area calibration Motion System: CoreXY architecture with lightweight printhead and step-servo motors Build Surface: PEI-coated flexible magnetic plate Multicolor Printing: CFS Unit supports 4 filaments (expandable to 16) RFID filament management for automatic material recognition Connectivity: WiFi, USB-C, microSD – supports Creality Cloud remote printing Control Interface: 4.3-inch color touchscreen with model preview Frame Material: All-metal enclosed chassis Dimensions: Approx. 500 × 500 × 600 mm Weight: Approx. 20 kg Assembly: Pre-assembled for plug-and-play setup Highlights Multicolor printing with automatic filament switching via CFS system Klipper-powered firmware for ultra-fast, low-vibration printing Smart auto leveling for consistent first layers and reduced setup time RFID filament tracking for seamless material management Quiet operation with step-servo motors and enclosed design Ideal for creative projects, multi-material models, and professional-grade prototyping

item.title: Creality Halot Mage 8K Resin 3D Printer
item.description: Creality Halot Mage 8K Resin 3D Printer The Halot Mage 8K is Creality’s flagship resin printer, engineered for ultra-high precision and large-format resin printing. With its 8K monochrome LCD, advanced integral light source, and smart features like air purification and resin pumping, it delivers professional-grade results for hobbyists, designers, and manufacturers alike. Key Features Large Build Volume – 228 × 128 × 230 mm (10.3” LCD), about 45% larger than standard 8.9” resin printers Ultra 8K Resolution – 7680 × 4320 pixels, 29.7 μm XY resolution, capturing fine details like hair, fabric, and textures Integral Light Source 3.0 – uniform light distribution (>90%) with 8000 μW/cm² intensity for faster curing (1–5s per layer) Dual Linear Rail Z-Axis – ensures ultra-stable movement, reducing wobble on larger and heavier prints Unique “MageArch” Flip Lid – one-handed operation, orange cover blocks 99.89% of ambient UV light Odor-Free Printing – built-in activated carbon filter (5.8× larger than standard) absorbs resin fumes, with rear vent port for tubing Smart Resin Pump – automatic resin refill and recovery for clean, hands-free operation Air Purifier – integrated system for a safer, fresher workspace Wide Software Compatibility – supports HALOT BOX, CHITUBOX, Lychee Slicer, and Voxeldance Tango Free Chitubox Pro Trial – 3-month VIP license included for advanced slicing options Specifications Printing Technology: MSLA (Masked Stereolithography) Build Volume: 228 × 128 × 230 mm (6712 cm³) Printing Speed: ≤170 mm/h Layer Height: 0.05 – 0.15 mm LCD Screen: 10.3” monochrome LCD Resolution: 8K (7680 × 4320) XY Resolution: 29.7 μm Light Source: Integral Light Source 3.0 Light Uniformity: >90% Light Intensity: 8000 ±10% μW/cm² Release Film: High-speed film File Transfer: USB drive, RJ45 cable, WiFi, Creality Cloud Smart Resin Pump: Yes Air Purifier: Yes Input Power: 150W Slicing Software: HALOT BOX, CHITUBOX, Lychee Slicer, Voxeldance Tango Computer OS: Windows / Mac File Formats: STL / OBJ Display Screen: 4.3” color touchscreen Product Dimensions: 333 × 270 × 608 mm Highlights Ultra-high detail with 8K resolution for professional-grade models Large build volume for bigger projects or batch printing Faster curing times with uniform light source technology Stable Z-axis for precision on tall or heavy prints Safe and convenient with UV-blocking lid and odor filtration Smart automation with resin pump and air purifier Flexible slicing software support for different workflows The Creality Halot Mage 8K is a powerful resin printer that combines large-format capacity, ultra-fine detail, and smart convenience features . It’s perfect for miniatures, prototypes, jewelry, dental models, and professional design work .

item.title: UGREEN 4-in-1 Type-C Hub | USB 3.0 | Type-C
item.description: The UGREEN 4-in-1 Type-C Hub is the perfect solution for expanding your connectivity options. Designed for professionals, students, and tech enthusiasts, this compact and portable hub connects multiple USB peripherals to your PC, laptop, tablet, or smartphone via the Type-C port. With a built-in OTG function chip, it provides seamless plug-and-play compatibility, ensuring effortless connectivity for devices such as flash drives, keyboards, mice, external hard drives, and more. Offering high-speed data transfer rates of up to 5Gbps, this hub significantly reduces wait times when transferring large files, making it an ideal accessory. In addition, the power port enhances stability, allowing for consistent and reliable performance, especially when using power-intensive peripherals. Housed in a sleek ABS case with metallic paint, the UGREEN 4-in-1 hub is both stylish and durable. Its ultra-compact design, coupled with a 15cm cable, ensures hassle-free portability, making it an excellent addition to any workspace or travel kit. Whether you need to increase productivity or streamline your workflow, this Type-C hub is a reliable and efficient choice. FEATURES: 4-port expansion 5Gbps high-speed data transfer OTG functionality for seamless use VL60 chipset for reliable data transfer Compact and sleek design Type-C power port provides stable performance SPECIFICATIONS: Input: Type-C Male Output: 4 × USB 3.0 Type-A Female Data Transfer Speed: Up to 5Gbps Chipset: VL160 Cable Length: 15cm Material: ABS case with metallic paint Power Port: 5V 2A Operating System: Mac, Windows, Linux, Chrome OS, Android Colour: Silver Device Compatibility: PC, Laptops, Hard Drives, Tablets, iPad, Printers Weight: 28.3g Dimensions: 10.4 × 3 × 1 cm WHAT’S IN THE BOX? UGREEN 4-in-1 Type-C Hub | USB 3.0 | Type-C – Silver x1 User Manual x1

item.title: Xiaomi Smart Home Hub
item.description: The Xiaomi Mi Smart Home Hub 2 is an upgraded smart home control center that can connect with your Wi-Fi, Zigbee, and Bluetooth smart devices. The hub and other smart devices can be freely combined into various flexible systems that enable mobile phone-based remote control of your smart home devices and linkage of automation scenes to easily control smart home life. It features a Dual-core 1GHz processor and 128MB of memory to help manage the dual-band supported Wi-Fi connection. Its stable WiFi connection works on both 2.4GHz and 5GHz network bands for faster transmission speeds. You can get an even more stable connection thanks to its RJ45 Ethernet port, this allows you to connect directly via LAN for even more efficiency. This stable connection can also connect to up to 100 smart devices via Bluetooth. You can manage every aspect of your smart home like turning on the light when back home, turning off devices when leaving home, and detecting and notifying you about events. FEATURES: Enhanced Hardware Multimode Hub Smart Home Center Dual-band Wi-Fi Connection RJ45 Ethernet Port Up to 100 Bluetooth Devices Support SPECIFICATIONS: Input: 5V-1A Network Port: 10/100Mbps Ethernet Wireless Connectivity: Wi-Fi IEEE 802.11 a/b/g/n 2.4 GHz/5 GHz, Zigbee 3.0 IEEE 802.15.4, Bluetooth 5.0 Operating Temperature: -10°C to 50°C Operating Humidity: 0–95% RH, non-condensing Product Dimensions: 9.5 x 9.5x 2.6 cm WHAT’S IN THE BOX: Xiaomi Smart Home Hub 2 – White x1

item.title: Highlighter Dry
item.description: A dry highlighter has several advantages over a traditional highlighter, which uses a fiber-tipped pen to distribute wet ink. With dry versions, there is no bleeding or smearing, either of the highlighter ink itself or of the words underneath. The pen won’t dry out and you don’t have to wait for its lines to dry to write over the top of it or to close your book. Dry highlighters won’t leak in your backpack or purse or desk.

item.title: Epson 3000 Lumens WXGA Projector
item.description: Epson 3000 Lumens WXGA Projector: Bring the Big Screen Experience Anywhere Immerse yourself in a world of vibrant colors and sharp images with the Epson 3000 Lumens WXGA Projector. Perfect for both entertainment and presentations, this projector delivers exceptional brightness and clarity, even in well-lit environments. Key Features: Brilliant Image Quality: Experience stunning visuals with an equally high White and Colour Light Output of 3, 000 lumens. WXGA Resolution: Project crisp and clear WXGA (1280 x 800) resolution for presentations and entertainment. Long-lasting Performance: Enjoy up to 18 years of entertainment (in economy mode) thanks to the durable UHE lamp. Portable and Easy Setup: Take your presentations or movie nights on the go with the projector's compact design and easy setup features like a keystone slider for perfect image alignment. Specifications: Brightness: 3, 000 lumens (Color Light Output) / 3, 000 lumens (White Light Output) (ISO 21118: 2020) Resolution: WXGA (1280 x 800) Aspect Ratio: 16: 10 Light Source: 188W UHE Lamp Lamp Life: 6, 000 hours (standard) / 12, 000 hours (economy) Keystone Correction: Manual vertical ±30°, Manual horizontal ±30° Color Reproduction: 16. 77 million colors Order your Epson 3000 Lumens WXGA Projector today and experience the big screen difference!

item.title: Creality SPARKX i7 3D Printer with CFS Dispenser & Dryer & Filament Bundle
item.description: Creality SPARKX i7 Multi-Colour Desktop 3D Printer + Creality Dry Box 2.0 & 1 x Ender PLA/PLA+ Filament 1KG roll. Colour chosen at random by the supplier. The picture of the filament may differ from the actual product. The SPARKX i7 is a beginner‑friendly, high‑performance desktop 3D printer designed for speed, precision, and creativity. Featuring advanced AI monitoring, multicolour printing with 50% less waste, and ultra‑quiet operation, it delivers professional results with ease. Main Features: AI Creation: CubeMe AI transforms portraits into 3D models in seconds. Multicolor Printing: Up to 4 colors with seamless switching, 15% greater efficiency, and 50% less purging waste. Easy Setup: Fully assembled Color Combo model; start printing within 5 minutes. Smart Automation: Auto bed leveling, nozzle calibration, input shaping, and AI camera monitoring for print success. RGB Lighting: Customizable light bar shows real‑time printing status. Precision Printing: Pressure Advance and Input Shaping for sharper corners and smoother surfaces. Quiet Operation: Night Mode reduces noise to just 30–45 dB. Quick‑Swap Components: Hotend, extruder lever, and filament cutter designed for easy replacement. Stable Performance: Reliable even at 40 °C operating environments. Privacy Protection: Built‑in camera with privacy cover; CubeMe AI processes images securely in the cloud. Specifications: Printing Technology: Fused Filament Fabrication (FFF) Build Volume: 260 × 260 × 255 mm Printer Dimensions: 470 × 423 × 456 mm Net Weight: 9.12 kg Printing Speed: ≤ 500 mm/s Acceleration: ≤ 10,000 mm/s² Layer Height: 0.05–0.3 mm Filament Diameter: 1.75 mm Filament Compatibility: PLA, PETG, PLA‑CF, TPU (shore 64D or harder) Nozzle Diameter: 0.4 mm (compatible with 0.2/0.6/0.8 mm) Nozzle Temperature: ≤ 300 °C Heatbed Temperature: ≤ 100 °C Display: 2.85‑inch color touchscreen Connectivity: USB drive / Wi‑Fi File Storage: 8 GB EMMC Supported File Formats: G‑code, 3MF Slicing Software: Creality Print 6.3 or newer Power Supply: 100–240V AC, 50/60 Hz Combo includes: 1x SPARKX i7 Multi-Colour Desktop 3D Printer 1x Creality Dry Box 2.0 Filament Dryer - 4005010063 1x Ender PLA/PLA + Filament (Colour at random)

item.title: Cudy AC1200 Wi-Fi Mesh Kit 3 Pack
item.description: DESCRIPTION Work and play securely with the Cudy M1200 AC1200 Dual-Band Whole Home Mesh Wi-Fi System. The Cudy M1200 seamlessly connects your entire home with reliable Wi-Fi. Finally, you can stream, surf, and game from anywhere. Say goodbye to dead spots and buffering without buying a brand-new Wi-Fi ecosystem. The M1200 can help you create a more flexible and cost-effective network to cover your entire family. With a built-in PPTP/L2TP/OpenVPN/WireGuard VPN Client, this router can easily establish a connection to the VPN server to transport all your online data and traffic. It can be easily configured to secure it with encryption and DNS over TLS at the same time to boost security. FEATURES: AC1200 Mesh Wi-Fi Solution 867Mbps on 5GHz and 300Mbps on 2.4GHz Seamless Roaming, Whole Home Coverage 10/100Mbps Ethernet Ports+ 2 Internal Antennas VPN Server and VPN Client Support Triple Mesh Pack SPECIFICATIONS: Hardware Features: Processor: Dual-Core Processors Flash: 128Mbit (16MB) DDR: 1Gbit (128MB) Antenna: 2× Internal Omni-Directional Antennas Interface: 1× 100/10 Mbps WAN Port 1× 100/10 Mbps LAN Port Button: Pair Button, Reset Button External Power Supply: 12 V / 1 A Wireless Features: Wireless Standards: IEEE 802.11/ac/n/a 5 GHz IEEE 802.11/n/b/g 2.4 GHz Frequency: 5GHz, 2.4GHz Signal Rate 867Mbps (5GHz),300Mbps (2.4GHz) Compatible with 802.11a/b/g/n/ac Wi-Fi standards Transmit Power CE: FCC: Wireless Modes: Enable/Disable Wireless Radio, WMM Wireless Functions: WEP, WPA/WPA2, WPA-PSK/WPA2-PSK Software Features WAN Type: Dynamic IP/Static IP/PPPoE DHCP: Server, DHCP Client List, Address Reservation Dynamic DNS: Compatible with 15 more DDNS providers Guest Network 2.4GHz guest network × 1 5 GHz guest network × 1 NAT: Port Forwarding, Port Triggering, UPnP, DMZ VPN Client: PPTP/L2TP/OpenVPN/WireGuard System Requirements: Microsoft Windows 98SE/NT/2000/XP/Vista™/7/8/8.1/10, MAC OS, NetWare, UNIX or Linux Internet Explorer 11, Firefox 12.0, Chrome 20.0, Safari 4.0, or other Java-enabled browser Cable or DSL Modem Subscription with an internet service provider (for internet access) WHAT’S IN THE BOX: Cudy M1200 AC1200 Dual-Band Whole Home Mesh Wi-Fi Router – White x3 Power Adapter x3 RJ45 Ethernet Cable x 1 Quick Installation Guide x1

It uses a high-speed USB3.0 connection which is 10 times faster than USB2.0 and offers excellent transmission speed. Enjoy greater flexibility and versatility with its dual-band mode. It supports both 2.4GHz and 5Ghz, with 2.4GHz providing extremely long-range performance, and 5GHz can reach speeds up to 876Mbps, making it perfect for gaming and streaming. Home Security standards ensure your wireless security. Compatible with Windows 7/8/8.1/10, mac OS. item.title: Cudy 4G LTE Mobile Wi-Fi
item.description: DESCRIPTION The Cudy 4G LTE Mobile Wi-Fi Router is a great way to stay connected no matter where you are. Its portable and lightweight design make it easy to carry or keep in your pocket or backpack. Its solid and reliable 4G LTE connection is a great option for on the go internet. It uses the latest generation of 4G LTE technology to achieve speeds of up to 150 Mbps download and 50 Mbps upload. It also allows you to create a Wi-Fi hotspot and connect up to 10 devices, including phones, laptops, tablets, game consoles, and more. This makes it extremely versatile for a mobile device. It also features a very powerful and rechargeable 2000 mAh battery that gives you up to 7 hours of operation. This will help you stay connected for longer periods of time. FEATURES: Share 4G connection with up to 150 Mbps download/50 Mbps upload speeds Support FDD and TDD bands Supports up to 11 devices simultaneously (10 Wireless+1 Wired) 2000 mAh battery for 8 hours of usage Compact and portable design SPECIFICATIONS: Model: 4G LTE Mobile Wi-Fi Form: MiFi / Pocket Router Communication System (WAN): Chipset: Qualcomm MDM9x07 / MDM9x25 Frequency Bands: LTE: B1/B3/B7/B8/B20/B38/B40/B41 UMTS: B1/B3/B8 Bandwidth: LTE Band: 1.4/3/5/10/15/20 MHz Modulation: Downlink: QPSK/16-QAM/64-QAM Uplink: QPSK/16-QAM Antenna: Primary: Internal Diversity: Internal, UMTS Optional RF Power Level: LTE FDD: Power Class 3 (23 +/-2dBm) UMTS: Power Class 3 (24 +1.7/-3.7dBm) EDGE: Power Class E2 (GSM850/900: 27dBm; DCS/PCS: 26dBm) Data Rate 4G: 3GPP R10, Cat. 4, Downlink/Uplink up to 150Mbps/50Mbps 3G: 3GPP R7 Downlink/Uplink up to 42Mbps/5.76Mbps Wi-Fi: Chipset: RealTek 8192ES Frequency: 2.4GHz Protocol: 802.11b/g/n Channel: 1~13 Antenna: Internal Data Rate: 802.11b: Up to 11 Mbps 802.11g: Up to 54 Mbps 802.11n: Up to 150 Mbps Features: Interface: USB: USB2.0 USIM: Single, 4FF LED POWER: Power/Battery Status Indicator Network: 4G/3G/2G Network Status Indicator Wi-Fi: Wi-Fi Status Indicator Message: New SMS Indicator WebUI: System: Connection Status Statistics Samba (optional) Device Management Power Management Mobile Service: Automatic APN matching according to USIM Auto Data Connection USSD Service PIN/PUK Management Network Mode Selection(2G/3G/LTE/Auto) Router: USB RNDIS Device Up to 10 Wi-Fi users/devices DHCP Server IPv4/v6 VPN Passthrough Firewall WPS Security via WEP, WPA-PSK, WPA2-PSK Wi-Fi Settings Battery: Type: Li-ion Polymer Battery Capacity: 2000mAh Endurance: 5-6 hours (normal network situation) Operation System Windows: XP/7/8/10 MAC OS: 10.7+ Linux: Ubuntu 13.04+ Browser: IE9+, Firefox, Google Chrome, Safari, Opera Environment Power Supply: USB, 5V1A Working Temperature: 0°C to 35°C Storage Temperature: -20°C to 60°C Certification: 3GPP Compliance: CE/FCC/GCF, upon customer’s requirement Material: RoHS Product Dimensions: 9.7 x 6.1 x 1.6 cm Weight: 92g WHAT’S IN THE BOX: Cudy MF4 4G LTE Mobile Wi-Fi Router -Black x1

item.title: Creality ABS Filament Black 1Kg
item.description: Creality ABS Filament is a high-quality 3D printing material designed to provide excellent durability and strength in your 3D printed projects. Made from Acrylonitrile Butadiene Styrene (ABS), this filament offers a smooth printing experience with minimal warping, allowing you to create precise and intricate designs. Its versatility makes it suitable for a wide range of applications, from functional prototypes to artistic creations. Whether you're an experienced 3D printing enthusiast or a beginner, Creality ABS Filament is a reliable choice to bring your ideas to life. Features: - It is strong and durable and can also be used conjointly with our Dissolvable filament. - Less warping - Less extrusion temperature - Better adhesion to a build plate - Material is guaranteed free from common issues such as bubbles, concave/convex dots, and dirt - Although smoke and odor levels are low, ABS filaments must be used in a well-ventilated area - Less-tangle and Easy to Use Notes on Printing: - Recommended Nozzle Temperature: 220 -260 (428 - 500 ), Recommended Bed Temperature: 90 -110 (194 -230 ). It is recommended to use a fully enclosed printer or an open 3d printer + enclosure to print ABS filaments, which will greatly improve the success rate of printing. What's in the box 1 x Creality ABS Filament 1 x User Manual

item.title: Creality CR Series PLA Filament Blue 1Kg
item.description: Unlock Limitless Creativity with Creality CR-PLA Filament! Enhance your 3D printing experience with Creality CR-PLA Filament - the ultimate choice for precision and quality. Engineered to perfection, this filament offers a seamless and reliable printing experience, allowing you to bring your wildest imaginations to life. Crafted with top-grade PLA material, CR-PLA ensures consistent extrusion, resulting in smooth and flawless prints every time. Its low warp and low odor properties make it ideal for both beginners and experienced 3D printing enthusiasts. Explore a spectrum of vibrant colors, enabling you to add that perfect touch of creativity to your creations. Its eco-friendly composition and biodegradable nature make it a responsible choice for environmentally conscious makers. Unleash your creativity and take your 3D printing projects to new heights with Creality CR-PLA Filament. Elevate your designs and turn your visions into reality with this top-tier filament at your disposal. Let your imagination run wild and make every print an extraordinary one! item.title: Creality TPU Filament Black 1Kg
item.description: Product Description: Are you ready to take your 3D printing projects to the next level? Look no further than the Creality TPU Filament Black 1Kg, a premium filament designed to deliver outstanding results and unparalleled durability. This versatile 3D printing material is the key to unlocking your creative potential and bringing your designs to life with precision and reliability. Key Features: – High-Quality TPU Material: Crafted from premium TPU (Thermoplastic Polyurethane), this filament offers exceptional flexibility, resilience, and wear resistance. It’s perfect for creating intricate and functional prints, including phone cases, shoe soles, and more. – 1Kg Spool: With a generous 1Kg (2.2lb) of filament on each spool, you’ll have plenty of material to tackle large-scale projects without worrying about frequent refills, ensuring a smoother printing experience. – Bright White Color: The bright white hue of this filament provides a sleek and professional finish to your 3D prints. Whether you’re crafting prototypes, cosplay props, or decorative items, the rich black color will make your creations stand out. – Optimized Diameter and Tolerance: Creality ensures precision with a consistent filament diameter and tight tolerance, reducing the risk of jams and improving overall print quality. – Low Odor and Low Warping: The Creality TPU Filament emits minimal odors during printing, ensuring a more pleasant working environment. Additionally, its low warping characteristics make it easier to print complex shapes with minimal distortion. – Shock Absorption and Flexibility: TPU is renowned for its shock-absorbing properties and flexibility, making it an ideal choice for creating impact-resistant and flexible parts such as RC car tires, vibration dampeners, and prosthetic components. Specifications: – Material: TPU (Thermoplastic Polyurethane) – Weight: 1Kg – Diameter: 1.75mm – Tolerance: 0.05mm – Printing Temperature: 200-220 C – Bed Temperature: 40-60 C (Optional) – Printing Speed: 20-40mm/s – Compatibility: Compatible with a wide range of 3D printers supporting TPU filament

Creality Ender 3 V3 KE 3D Printer – Klipper-Enhanced High-Speed FDM Printer with Auto Calibration and WiFi (220×220×240 mm) The Creality Ender 3 V3 KE is a next-generation FDM 3D printer powered by Klipper firmware , designed for makers who demand speed, precision, and smart control. With advanced motion algorithms, automatic calibration, and remote connectivity via Creality OS , this printer delivers professional-grade performance in a compact desktop format. Key Specifications Build Volume: 220 × 220 × 240 mm Max Print Speed: Up to 500 mm/s (recommended 300 mm/s) Firmware: Creality OS (Klipper-based) with input shaping and pressure advance Extruder Type: All-metal direct drive – supports flexible and high-temp filaments Nozzle Diameter: 0.4 mm (standard, replaceable) Max Nozzle Temperature: 300°C – compatible with PLA, PETG, TPU, ABS, ASA, PC Max Bed Temperature: 100°C – for strong adhesion and warp resistance Bed Leveling: Smart auto calibration with strain gauge and Z-offset detection Motion System: X-axis linear rail with ball-bearing carriage for ultra-smooth movement Cooling System: Dual model cooling fans for enhanced overhangs and bridging Build Surface: PEI-coated spring steel sheet – flexible and magnetic Control Interface: 4.3-inch color touchscreen with real-time model preview Connectivity: USB-C, microSD, WiFi (LAN and Creality Cloud) Frame Material: All-metal construction Dimensions: 433 × 366 × 490 mm Weight: Approx. 7.8 kg Assembly: Semi-assembled for fast setup Highlights Klipper-powered motion control for ultra-fast, vibration-free printing Smart auto leveling and Z-offset calibration for perfect first layers Remote monitoring and control via Creality Cloud and LAN printing Supports advanced materials including flexible and high-temperature filaments Compact and durable design for desktop or workshop use Combo includes: 1x Creality Ender 3 V3 KE 1x Creality Dry Box 2.0 Filament Dryer - 4005010063 1x Ender PLA/PLA + Filament (Colour at random)

item.title: Creality K2 Plus 3D Printer – Large-Format CoreXY FDM Printer with AI Cameras, Heated Chamber, and 350×350×350 mm Build Volume
item.description: Creality K2 Plus 3D Printer – Large-Format CoreXY FDM Printer with AI Cameras, Heated Chamber, and 350×350×350 mm Build Volume The Creality K2 Plus is a professional-grade FDM 3D printer designed for high-speed, precision printing. Featuring a robust CoreXY motion system, Klipper-based Creality OS, and advanced AI monitoring, it delivers exceptional performance for prototyping, functional parts, and creative production. With a massive build volume and dual AI cameras, it’s ideal for serious makers and professionals. Key Specifications Build Volume: 350 × 350 × 350 mm Max Print Speed: Up to 600 mm/s (recommended 300 mm/s) Acceleration: Up to 30,000 mm/s² Firmware: Creality OS (Klipper-based) with input shaping and pressure advance Extruder Type: All-metal direct drive with dual hardened steel gears and filament cutter Nozzle System: Quick-swap nozzle with titanium heatbreak, copper body, and hardened steel tip Max Nozzle Temperature: 350°C – supports PLA, PETG, TPU, ABS, ASA, PC, carbon fiber composites Max Bed Temperature: 120°C – for strong adhesion and warp resistance Bed Leveling: Strain gauge auto leveling with Z-offset calibration Build Surface: Epoxy-coated flexible magnetic steel plate Chamber Heating: Actively heated to 60°C with air filtration for ABS/ASA compatibility Motion System: CoreXY architecture with step-servo motors for ultra-smooth movement AI Features: Dual AI Cameras for real-time monitoring, failure detection, and time-lapse capture Self-diagnostics and one-tap calibration Connectivity: WiFi, LAN, USB-C, microSD – supports Creality Cloud remote printing Control Interface: 4.3-inch color touchscreen with model preview Frame Material: Fully enclosed all-metal chassis Dimensions: Approx. 550 × 550 × 650 mm Weight: Approx. 25 kg Assembly: Fully assembled Highlights Large-format printing for professional-grade projects Klipper-powered firmware for ultra-fast, low-vibration performance AI-assisted monitoring and calibration for consistent, hands-free operation Actively heated chamber for high-temp engineering materials Ideal for advanced prototyping, functional parts, and production workflows Optional Upgrade The Creality Filament System (CFS) can be added separately to enable automatic filament switching, RFID material recognition, and multicolor printing with support for up to 16 filaments.

item.title: Heating Block Kit-Pro High Temperature (300Deg)
item.description: The Heating Block Kit-Pro High Temperature is a high-performance component designed for 3D printers. Here are its key specifications: Heater: 6x20mm, 24V, 50W, 50mm cable, XH2.54 connector. Thermistor: 3mm x 5.5mm cartridge, NTC 0.55k, 35mm cable, GH1.25, 2-pin connector. Heater Block: Comes with a silicon sock. Heatbreak: Included in the kit. Nozzle: Copper plated, 0.4mm. Mount Screws: 2 x M2 x 20mm included. This kit is designed to withstand high temperatures of up to 300°C. It’s a direct replacement heater block unit for FDM printers equipped with a Sprite extruder. The heat-break material is a combination of Copper-Chromium (CuCr) and Titanium Alloy (TC4), which reduces upward heat conduction and accelerates heat dissipation. This kit is assembled at the factory and is compatible with various Creality 3D printers.

item.title: Creality Nebula Camera only
item.description: Creality Nebula Camera: Monitor Your 3D Prints Anytime, Anywhere See your creations come to life with the Creality Nebula Camera! This innovative camera is specifically designed to enhance your 3D printing experience, offering a suite of features to keep you informed and in control. Features: Real-time Monitoring: Keep a watchful eye on your prints from anywhere with a live feed accessible through compatible Creality devices. Time-lapse Magic: Capture the entire printing process in a condensed video, perfect for sharing your creations and showcasing the 3D printing journey. Spaghetti Detection: Say goodbye to wasted filament and failed prints. The Nebula Camera identifies printing anomalies like spaghetti and triggers a pause, allowing you to intervene and save the day. Crystal Clear Views: The high-definition resolution (1920 x 1080) ensures sharp and detailed visuals, while the manual focus lets you fine-tune the image for optimal clarity. Night Vision Prowess: Thanks to built-in night vision with a 940nm infrared fill light, you can monitor your prints even in low-light conditions. Seamless Connectivity: The Nebula Camera connects easily to your 3D printer via a USB port, making setup a breeze. Compatible With: Creality Sonic Pad Creality Nebula Pad Creality Ender-3 V3 KE Creality CR-10 SE Creality Halot-One Plus Creality Halot-Maya Pro Take your 3D printing to the next level with the Creality Nebula Camera. Order yours today! Specifications: Resolution: 1920 x 1080 Interface: USB Night Vision: Yes (940nm infrared fill light) Focus: Manual

item.title: AI Camera for K1 printer
item.description: Step up your 3D printing game with the Creality K1 AI Camera, the ultimate smart accessory designed to monitor and enhance your 3D printing experience. This cutting-edge camera system is the ideal match for your Creality K1 and K1 Max 3D Printers. Key Features: Real-Time HD Monitoring : Watch over your prints with crystal-clear high-definition, accessible through Creality Cloud or Creality Print. AI-Powered Detection : The camera intelligently pauses printing if it detects any foreign objects, ensuring the integrity and quality of your prints. Eco-Friendly Printing : By pausing prints during errors, it helps reduce filament waste, making your printing process more sustainable. Effortless Installation : The camera is designed for a quick and easy setup, ensuring seamless compatibility with Creality K1 and K1 Max 3D Printers. Creative Time-Lapse Videos : Document and share the magic of your printing process with beautiful time-lapse videos. Technical Specifications: Model : Creality K1 AI Camera Compatibility : Specifically designed for Creality K1 & K1 Max Input Voltage : 5V Current : 10mA Dimensions : 36.4 x 44.2 x 54mm Weight : 12g Embrace the future of smart printing and enhance your 3D printing capabilities with the Creality K1 AI Camera. Discover the benefits of advanced technology for a superior 3D printing experience.

item.description: Deco uses a system of units to achieve seamless whole-home Wi-Fi coverage — eliminate weak signal areas once and for all! With advanced Deco Mesh Technology, units work together to form a unified network with a single network name. Devices automatically switch between Decos as you move through your home for the fastest possible speeds. A Deco S4 three-pack delivers Wi-Fi to an area of up to 4000 sq.ft. (US version) † . And if that’s not enough, simply add more Decos to the network anytime to increase coverage. Deco S4 provides fast and stable connections with speeds of up to 1167 Mbps † and works with major internet service provider (ISP) and modem. Deco can handle traffic from even the busiest of networks, providing lag-free connections for up to 100 devices † . Parental Controls limits online time and block inappropriate websites according to unique profiles created for each family member. Setup is easier than ever with the Deco app there to walk you through every step.

item.title: Xiaomi Smart Speaker
item.description: The Xiaomi Mi Smart Speaker oozes rich sound redefining the sound stage with crisp vocals and dynamic bass. With its DTS Professional tuning, the speaker delivers crisp and clear distortion-free sound at any volume. The Mi Smart Speaker features Ok Google, allowing you to easily play your favourite music, control volume and find information about the song that you are listening to, hands-free with voice control. You can also plan your day, set alarms and control smart devices around your home just by using your voice. Control your Mi Smart Speaker from anywhere in your room thanks to 2x built-in far-field microphones. With Chromecast capabilities built-in, you can stream shows, movies and music right onto your smart TV. Now anyone in the family can get things done easily with the Mi Smart Speaker. Comfortably interact with your smart speaker in English or Hindi. FEATURES: Wi-Fi and Bluetooth Connectivity Chromecast and Google Ok Built-in 2 Far-field Mics and Touch Sensitive Buttons Powerful 12W Speaker 63.5mm Sound Driver DTS Professional Tuned Sound SPECIFICATIONS: Control Panel: touch-sensitive buttons Microphone Array: 2 far-field mics, with voice control support Speaker: 2.5″ full frequency 12W speaker Light: Ring strip on the top with musical effect Wi-Fi: 2.4GHz / 5GHz Bluetooth: 4.2, supports A2DP music player Support System: Android 4.4 and iOS 9.0 or above Power Supply: DC 12V/1.5A Product Dimensions: 13.1 x 10.4 x 15.1 cm Product Weight: 853g WHAT’S IN THE BOX: Xiaomi Mi Smart Speaker x1 Power Adapter x1 User Manual x1

item.title: Xiaomi Wi-Fi Range Extender Pro
item.description: The Xiaomi Mi Wi-Fi Range Extender can help you easily connect to and extend the range of your network. Put the extender near the router, turn the power on and wait for the yellow indicator light to start flashing. Scan the QR code to install the app and follow the instructions to add the device. When the indicator light turns blue, pairing is complete. Now you can simply unplug and plug the Mi Wi-Fi Range Extender Pro in a location for the best signal quality and coverage in your house, without needing to configure the extender again. The Mi Wi-Fi Range Extender connects to your router wirelessly, strengthening and expanding its signal to every corner of the home – even to those, hard-to-reach spots, such as bathrooms, balconies, bedrooms. This ensures an increased coverage of reliable and high-speed Internet for devices such as notebooks, tablets, smartphones, game consoles and smart TVs. FEATURES: Extend your wireless connection 2×2 External Antenna Easy Setup 300Mbps Compatible with various devices SPECIFICATIONS: Product Model: R03 Dimensions: 8 × 5.4 × 7 cm CPU: MT7628K 580 MHz ROM: 2MB RAM: 8MB Antenna Type: 2 external antennas Wireless Standards: IEEE 802.11b/g/n Signal Rate: 2.4 GHz, up to 300 Mbps Wireless Security: WPA-PSK/ WPA2-PSK encryption Power Supply: 100-240 V/0.35 A WHAT’S IN THE BOX: Xiaomi Mi R03 300MBs Wi-Fi Range Extender – Black x1 User Guide x1

item.title: eSun eTPU-95A Filament - 1.75mm - 1kg - Black
item.description: There are quite a range of unique types of 3D filaments on the market with strange and exciting properties and characteristics, although none are quite as fun as our 1kg spools of eSUN 1.75mm eFlex TPU. This filament, although designed with flexibility in mind, features a hardness rating of 95 Shore A, which is a lot harder than typical “Flexible” filaments. However, this level of hardness means that, instead of being flexible like the sole of a flip-flop, the flexibility is more focused on adding impact resistance and enhanced durability that PLA Filaments simply can’t achieve. This TPU is often regarded as a “Semi-Flexible” filament. However, despite this uniqueness, eSUN eTPU prints at similar specifications to standard PLA Filament. Just remember that with flexible filaments you need to apply slightly higher heat than usual, while running the print at a lower speed than most other 3D Filaments. This will prevent the filament from pulling off the lower layers while printing, resulting in great prints that are both durable and flexible. While you may certainly be able to print and polish this filament to a fine aesthetic finish, it won’t be able to reach the same level of beauty when compared to other filaments like the Silk Filaments. Typical TPE is designed with a high elongation and low hardness for high flexibility. Still, this semi-flex filaments is designed for engineering applications rather than aesthetics, with this particular shore hardness commonly being used for roller skates and skateboard wheels.

item.title: eSun PLA+ Filament - 1.75mm Black
item.description: 1kg of Black PLA+ eSUN Filament spooled and ready for use on 3D Printers with a 1.75mm Hotend Assembly . PLA+ filament is high quality, easy to use and bio-degradable. Now with extra additives for increased toughness, greater layer adhesion and less warping. DESCRIPTION PLA+ is a type of 3D printer filament that is based on standard PLA, but with extra additives to enhance a wide range of qualities. It addresses many of the common problems that PLA presents, such as the brittle nature, low elongation breaking point, as well as layer adhesion. The only area in which regular PLA beats PLA+ is in tensile strength, although it is a slight difference, and is far outweighed by the plethora of benefits. Advantages of PLA+ eSUN PLA+ is considered by many as the new standard for PLA printing, and despite being slightly more expensive than typical PLA, it offers far more value for money. It is not only easier to work with, but also produces better, smoother and less spider-webbed prints – while also being more flame resistant as well. In terms of the value that PLA+ brings to printing, it offers a wide variety of benefits, the first of which you will notice is far greater layer adhesion. This is due to the higher flow temperature, which will also help to produce less spider-webbing in gaps and less stringing along surfaces. Additionally, PLA+ has a lower distortion temperature, which means it is allowed a longer time to settle before it actually cools. This can be particularly beneficial for 3D printers without enclosures, and helps to ensure that each of the layers are printed before the previous layer starts warping or distorting – further improving on layer adhesion. While there are many other less predominant benefits, such being less brittle than PLA in filament form, the final key feature we will discuss is PLA+’s print finish quality. Owing to the enhanced layer adhesion, lower Melt Flow Index and higher stable print temperatures, PLA+ produces smoother, cleaner and more durable results. Whereas typical PLA is often brittle and can shatter quite easily, PLA+ has enough elongation and bending strength to resist falls, impacts and breaks from stretching. With these benefits in mind, it’s easy to see why so many Makers are choosing PLA+ as their favourite 3D printer filament.

item.title: Gizzu 12v 7ah Lithium batteries
item.description: DESCRIPTION The Gizzu 12V 7Ah Lithium-Ion Battery makes for a great replacement solution for devices or machines that are typically powered by lead batteries such as gate motors, alarm systems, electric fences & CCTV. With its ultra-safe battery management system, this Lithium-Ion Phosphate (LiFePO4) battery lasts up to 10x longer than a typical lead acid battery and can also handle higher currents. It does not produce fumes nor does it leak, allowing you to mount the battery in any position. Don’t find yourself replacing batteries annually but rather invest in a Gizzu 12V 7Ah Lithium-Ion Battery for long-term peace of mind. item.title: GIZZU 30W 38Wh 10400mAh Mini DC UPS - Black
item.description: The Gizzu 30W Mini DC 38Wh UPS is simple to install and allows you to power various devices during a power outage. With multiple-voltage DC outputs, this UPS can charge mobile devices such as cell phones and tablets via USB. It also features 10400mAh of high-capacity lithium-ion batteries with safety protocols such as over-charge, over-discharge, and short circuit protection. Warning: Please ensure that the combined power draw of connected devices does not exceed 30W. Ensure the voltage of the device is connected to the correct voltage output before turning the UPS on. Failure to adhere to this warning may result in damage to the connected devices. Refer to your manual for additional safety information. FEATURES: Power your Router and ONU (Optical Network Unit) during power outages Keep your mobile devices charged with the USB port 38Wh High-capacity lithium-ion batteries Power your CCTV cameras Compatible with a wide range of devices Intelligent protective design with over-charge, over-discharge, and short-circuit protection SPECIFICATIONS: Input Voltage: 100 - 240V AC DC Output Voltage: 5V+USB x1 (2A), 1 x 9V/12V (selectable)(2A), 4 x 12V (2A) Power Output: 30W Battery Capacity: 10400mAh Battery Information: 2600mAh x 4 (Lithium-ion) Total Watt Hours: 38Wh Estimated Run Time: ONU (3W): 12.6hrs, Router (10W): 3.8hrs, CCTV Cameras (10W): 3.8hrs Product Dimensions: 18.6 x 11 x 3.3 cm Product Weight: 450g WHAT'S IN THE BOX: Gizzu 30W Mini DC 38Wh UPS - Black x1 1m AC Power Cable x1 1m 2.5mm DC Power Cable x2 30cm DC Splitter Cable x1 5.5x2.1mm DC Adapter x1 4x1.7mm DC Adapter x1 3.5x1.35mm DC Adapter x1 User Manual x1

item.title: Gizzu 60W 65Wh 17600mAh Mini POE DC
item.description: The Gizzu 60W Mini DC 65Wh UPS is simple to install and allows you to power various devices during a power outage. With multiple-voltage DC outputs, this UPS can power both your Router and ONU(Optical Network Unit) so you can continue browsing the web, working online, or streaming. CCTV cameras and VoIP phones can also be connected and powered via the Gigabit Power Over Ethernet(PoE) port. Charge mobile devices such as cell phones and tablets via USB. Featuring 8 high-capacity Lithium-ion (17600mAh) batteries with safety protocols such as over-charge, over-discharge, and short circuit protection.. FEATURES: Power your Router and ONU(Optical Network Unit) during power outages Keep your mobile devices charged with dual USB ports 65Wh High-capacity Lithium-ion batteries Power your CCTV cameras and VoIP phones with Gigabit PoE Compatible with a wide range of routers Intelligent protective design with over-charge, over-discharge, and short circuit protection SPECIFICATIONS: Input voltage: 100-240V AC DC Output Voltage: 5V + USB x2 (2A) 1x 24/48V (PoE 1G) (0.4A) 1x 9V/12V (Selectable) (2A) 4x 12V (5A) 1x Solar Input (2A) Power Output: 60W Battery Capacity: 17600mAh Battery Information: 2200mAh x8 (Lithium-Ion) Total Watt Hours: 65Wh Estimated Recharges (Single device connected): Smart Phone(3500mAh): 5 Tablet (7000mAh): 2.5 Headlamp (2200mAh): 8 Estimated Run Time (Single device connected): ONU(3W): 21.6hrs Router(10W): 6.5hrs CCTV Cameras (10W): 6.5hrs VoIP Phone(7W): 9.3hrs POE Power Method: POE over All 4-Pairs (1, 2+; 3, 6-) (4, 5+; 7, 8-) Dimensions: 25.8 x 15.2 x 4.6 cm Weight: 940g WHAT’S IN THE BOX: Gizzu 60W Mini DC 65Wh UPS – Black x1 1m Ac Power Cable x1 1m 2.5mm DC Power Cable x2 30cm DC Splitter Cable x1 5.5 x 2.1mm DC Adapter x1 4 x 1.7mm DC Adapter x1 3.5mm x 1.35mm DC Adapter x1 User Manual x1 Please Note: Please ensure that the combined power draw of the connected device does not exceed 60W. Ensure the voltage of the device is connected to the correct voltage output before turning the UPS on. Failure to adhere to this warning may result in damage to the connected devices. Refer to your manual for additional safety information. Please note that some routers, APS and network devices require POE Power Method POE over only 2-Pairs, +(4,5) pins & -(7,8) pins. Please carefully consult device manuals to ensure compatibility with this UPS before using it.

item.title: SWITCHED Sleek Series - Universal Rechargeable LED Bottle Lamp
item.description: Bring a touch of modern comfort and cordless convenience to your home with the Switched Sleek Series Rechargeable LED Bottle Lamp . Designed with clean lines and everyday practicality in mind, this minimalist lamp fits seamlessly into bedrooms, lounges, studies, or even travel bags. Use it as a bedside light, a stylish accent on shelves or coffee tables, or a reliable light source during load-shedding. The lamp emits a soft 130‑lumen glow at 6500K , providing clear visibility without harsh glare—perfect for relaxing evenings, late-night reading, or creating a calm ambient atmosphere. Operation is effortless thanks to intuitive touch controls . A simple tap switches the light on or off, while a long press activates smooth dimming, allowing you to adjust brightness to suit your mood. Charging is quick and convenient via USB‑C (5V, 1A) , and the built‑in 1200 mAh lithium‑ion battery delivers up to 4 hours of cordless illumination per charge—no plugs, no tangled cables. Built with durable SMD LED technology rated for up to 10,000 hours , this lamp offers long-lasting performance with minimal maintenance. Lightweight, portable, and easy to place anywhere, it’s a smart lighting solution that balances style, flexibility, and everyday ease. Feature Highlights Simple Touch Control – Tap to turn On/Off; long press for smooth dimming Portable & Cord-Free – Easy to move from bedside to lounge or desk USB‑C Charging – Recharge using the included Type‑C cable (5V, 1A) Up to 4 Hours Runtime – Ideal for evenings, travel, or power outages Soft 130‑Lumen Output – Comfortable ambient lighting without glare Long‑Life SMD LED – Rated for 10,000 hours of reliable use Modern Bottle Design – Clean, sleek silhouette complements any décor Technical Specifications Brightness: 130 lm LED Type: SMD LED Colour Temperature: 6500K LED Lifespan: 10,000 hours Battery: 1 × 1200 mAh Li‑ion Charging Input: 5V, 1A (USB‑C) Charging Time: 3.5 – 4 hours Operating Time: Up to 4 hours Controls: Touch On/Off, long‑press dimming Lighting Modes: On / Off Charging Cable: Type‑C, 100 cm Colour: Black Enjoy elegant, dimmable lighting that’s portable, practical, and perfectly suited to modern living. What’s in the Box 1 × Switched Sleek Series Rechargeable LED Bottle Lamp – Black 1 × USB‑C Charging Cable 1 × Instruction Manual

item.title: Volkano Lexi Bluetooth Headphone with ANC - Black
item.description: Discover a smarter way to listen with the Volkano Lexi Noise Cancelling Headphones, engineered for daily commuting, focused work sessions, and long-distance travel. Featuring Active Noise Cancelling (ANC) along with LDAC compatibility, Lexi helps minimise outside noise so your music, podcasts, and calls sound more detailed and immersive. Plush over-ear cushions provide lasting comfort, while the extended battery life lets you enjoy uninterrupted listening for days at a time. A built-in microphone ensures voice calls remain clear and easy whenever you need to stay connected. Equipped with Bluetooth 5.4 and powerful 40 mm drivers, Lexi offers dependable wireless performance paired with vibrant, well-balanced sound. Activate ANC and listen for up to 35 hours at 50% volume, or up to 30 hours at full volume. With ANC switched off, battery life extends to an impressive 45 hours. Fast charging via USB‑C means a full recharge takes only around two hours. The foldable, space-saving design makes Lexi ideal for students, remote workers, and frequent travellers. With support for SBC, AAC, and LDAC audio codecs alongside standard Bluetooth profiles for calls and media playback, the Volkano Lexi is compatible with a wide range of devices. It’s an excellent option for anyone looking for effective noise cancellation, long battery life, and comfortable everyday wear—without paying a premium price. Feature Highlights Active Noise Cancelling (ANC) – Helps reduce background noise for a more immersive listening experience LDAC Audio Support – Enables higher-quality wireless sound on compatible devices Extended Battery Life – Up to 45 hours with ANC off; 35 hours at 50% volume with ANC on Integrated Microphone – Clear hands-free calling for work or personal use Foldable, Travel-Friendly Design – Packs away easily for commutes and trips USB-C Fast Charging – Fully charges in approximately 2 hours Bluetooth 5.4 Connectivity – Stable wireless connection with up to 10 m range Technical Specifications Bluetooth Version: 5.4 (Chipset: JL7006F8) Bluetooth Profiles: HSP, HFP, A2DP, AVRCP Supported Codecs: SBC, AAC, LDAC Wireless Range: 10 m Impedance: 32 Ω Sensitivity: 112 dB (±5 dB) at 1 kHz Noise Reduction: 22 dB (±3 dB) Driver Size: 40 mm Battery Capacity: 500 mAh Charging Interface: USB-C (5 V DC, 1 A) Charging Time: ±2 hours Playback Time (50% Volume): ANC On: 35 hours ANC Off: 45 hours Playback Time (100% Volume): ANC On: 30 hours ANC Off: 40 hours Product Code: VK-2009-ND GTIN: 6009545490516 Product Dimensions / Weight: 18 × 8 × 19 cm / 320 g Packaged Dimensions / Weight: 20 × 9 × 21 cm / 400 g What’s in the Box 1 × Volkano Lexi Series Bluetooth Headphones with Active Noise Cancelling 1 × USB‑C Charging Cable 1 × Instruction Manual
