item.title: Volkano Neptune Bluetooth Wireless Speaker - Purple
item.description: Meet the VolkanoX Neptune portable Bluetooth speaker – a compact, easy-to-carry speaker that combines clear sound with playful lighting in a splash‑resistant design. Powered by Bluetooth 5.4, Neptune delivers a reliable, efficient wireless connection, while TWS (True Wireless Stereo) pairing lets you connect two speakers for a broader, more immersive stereo experience. Ideal for your desk, dorm room, or a quick weekend escape. Enjoy long listening sessions thanks to its impressive battery life: up to 22.5 hours at 50% volume with the lights turned off, or around 10 hours with RGB lighting enabled. Switch on the built‑in RGB light modes to add atmosphere whenever the mood strikes. Despite its compact size, Neptune produces 5W RMS (10W peak) of clear, balanced sound—perfect for everyday music, videos, and podcasts. Take your music anywhere with USB playback support for flash drives up to 128GB, and make use of the included carry strap for effortless portability. Small enough to slip into a bag, yet powerful enough for daily use, Neptune makes listening simple, flexible, and fun. Enjoy brighter moments, clear sound, and music wherever life takes you Feature Highlights COMPACT & PORTABLE – Lightweight design with included carry strap for music on the move TWS STEREO PAIRING – Pair two Neptune speakers for wider, room‑filling sound EXTENDED PLAYTIME – Up to 22.5 hours at 50% volume (lights off); up to 10 hours with lights on RGB LIGHT EFFECT – Adds colour and ambience with four lighting modes SPLASH‑RESISTANT (IPX3) – Designed to handle light splashes for everyday peace of mind USB MUSIC PLAYBACK – Play directly from USB flash drives up to 128GB CLEAR EVERYDAY AUDIO – 5W RMS (10W peak) output for music, videos, and podcasts LATEST BLUETOOTH 5.4 – Stable wireless performance with improved power efficiency Technical Specifications Bluetooth Version: 5.4 Chipset: JL AC6965D4 Power Output: 5W RMS / 10W Peak Playback Time (50% Volume): Up to 22.5 hours (lights off) ±10 hours (lights on) Playback Time (100% Volume): ±6 hours (lights off) ±4.5 hours (lights on) Charging Input: 5V Sensitivity: 84dB Inputs: USB (Flash drives up to 128GB) Water Resistance: IPX3 Functions: TWS Pairing, RGB Lighting Charging Cable: USB‑C, 60cm What’s in the Box 1 × Volkano Neptune Bluetooth Wireless Speaker 1 × USB‑C Charging Cable 1 × Instruction Manual

item.title: Volkano Cobalt Wireless Keyboard and Mouse
item.description: Enjoy effortless everyday productivity with the Volkano Cobalt Series Wireless Keyboard and Mouse Combo , designed for comfort, reliability, and simple plug‑and‑play convenience. Using a stable 2.4 GHz wireless connection , this combo delivers smooth, responsive performance with minimal lag—ideal for work, study, or home use. The included wireless mouse offers 1 000 DPI precision for accurate, reliable control and features an ambidextrous design , making it comfortable for both left‑ and right‑handed users. Whether you’re navigating documents or browsing the web, it delivers dependable performance for daily tasks. The full‑size wireless keyboard provides a familiar layout with well‑spaced keys, ensuring comfortable and efficient typing during long sessions. Designed for ease of use, it’s perfect for emails, spreadsheets, assignments, and general computing. Best of all, the Volkano Cobalt Series Combo comes ready to use out of the box with batteries included . Simply plug in the compact nano receiver and get started right away—no software or setup required. Technical Details / Specs Product Type: Wireless keyboard and mouse combo Wireless Technology: 2.4 GHz Receiver: USB nano receiver Mouse DPI: 1 000 DPI Mouse Design: Ambidextrous Keyboard Layout: Full‑size Power: Battery‑powered (batteries included) Setup: Plug‑and‑play Use Case: Work, study, and home office

item.title: Volkano Gaming Arc SL Lightweight Rechargeable Multimode Gaming Mouse - Black
item.description: Move faster and aim steadier with the Volkano Arc SL , a super‑lightweight gaming mouse designed for speed, precision, and comfort. With a feather‑light build of just ±51 g , it’s ideal for rapid movements, smooth tracking, and extended play sessions without fatigue. Experience true gaming flexibility with Tri‑Mode connectivity . Seamlessly switch between 2.4 GHz wireless , Bluetooth 5.0 , or wired USB mode in seconds—perfect for desktop gaming, laptop play, or charging while you stay in the action. The 400 mAh rechargeable battery provides reliable endurance, while modern USB‑C charging keeps power-ups quick and convenient. Powered by the PAW‑3311 sensor , the Arc SL delivers consistent, predictable tracking so every swipe feels precise. Choose polling rates of up to 1 000 Hz for responsive gameplay, and adjust sensitivity with DPI settings of up to 12 000 CPI to match your playstyle. Durable Huano left and right button switches , rated for 50 million clicks , ensure long‑lasting performance through countless practice hours. Designed with comfort in mind, the Arc SL’s compact ergonomic shape (118 × 65 × 40 mm) suits most grip styles and hand sizes, helping reduce strain during long sessions. Whether you’re gaming at your desk, on the go with a laptop, or charging mid‑match, the Volkano Arc SL delivers lightweight control, flexible connectivity, and reliable accuracy. Technical Details / Specs Mouse Type: Lightweight wireless gaming mouse Weight: ±51 g Connectivity: Tri‑Mode – 2.4 GHz Wireless, Bluetooth 5.0, Wired USB Sensor: PAW‑3311 Polling Rate: Up to 1 000 Hz DPI Range: Up to 12 000 CPI Switches: Left & right buttons: Huano (50‑million click lifespan) Battery Capacity: 400 mAh Charging: USB‑C Dimensions: 118 × 65 × 40 mm Use Case: Desktop, laptop, and charging‑while‑playing Compatibility: Windows & macOS

item.title: Volkano Gaming Arc Ultra-Lightweight Rechargeable Gaming Mouse - Black
item.description: Meet the Volkano Arc UL , an ultra‑lightweight gaming mouse engineered for speed, precision, and all‑day comfort. Weighing just ±51 g (excluding receiver) , it’s built for fast flicks, effortless tracking, and reduced fatigue during long gaming sessions. Enjoy true wireless freedom with Tri‑Mode connectivity . Switch seamlessly between 2.4 GHz wireless , Bluetooth , or wired USB mode—perfect for gaming at your desk, moving to a laptop, or charging while you play without interruption. At its core, the Arc UL features a PAW‑3311 gaming‑grade sensor paired with selectable polling rates of up to 1 000 Hz (Bluetooth up to 133 Hz ), delivering reliable, responsive control when it matters most. Durable TTC main switches , rated for 60 million clicks , ensure long‑term reliability, while Huano switches support the scroll wheel and side buttons for consistent tactile feedback. Fine‑tune your performance with on‑the‑fly DPI switching or advanced software customisation, and game longer thanks to a high‑capacity 500 mAh rechargeable battery . With a compact, comfortable shape and out‑of‑the‑box support for Windows and macOS , the Volkano Arc UL is ready for competitive play wherever you are. Technical Details / Specs Mouse Type: Lightweight wireless gaming mouse Weight: ±51 g (excluding receiver) Connectivity: Tri‑Mode – 2.4 GHz Wireless, Bluetooth, Wired USB Sensor: PAW‑3311 Polling Rate: Up to 1 000 Hz (Bluetooth: up to 133 Hz) Switches: Main buttons: TTC (60‑million click lifespan) Scroll wheel & side buttons: Huano DPI Settings: 400 / 800 / 1 200 / 1 600 / 3 200 / 5 000 Maximum DPI (Software): Up to 24 000 Battery Capacity: 500 mAh Charging: USB‑C (5 V / 300 mA) Dimensions: 126.6 × 69 × 41.8 mm Compatibility: Windows & macOS

item.description: White Sublimation Paper Works on any material that is sublimation ready, Ceramic, T-shirt, Canvas, Glass etc. Dye sublimation paper is a good all round coated paper for dye sublimation printing with water-based dye sublimation ink. Sublimation Paper produces quality, lasting transfers onto polyester fabrics and ceramics. Our sublimation paper can be used with any sublimation printer and once pressed with a heat press, yields vivid, permanent results. This value pack comes with 100 sheets of A4 size sublimation paper and is perfect for customizing your own unique designs on t-shirts or ceramic cups. Always print on the white side of the paper. Mirror your image.

item.title: Laminating Pouches A4 - 150mic Pack of 100 Removable Sticker
item.description: What are they and why are they useful? Laminating pouches provide a protective covering that seals paper articles between two layers of plastic. This affords an all-round protective surface that is both flexible and sturdy. Laminating pouches can thus be employed for a wide range of uses, everything from to protecting documents to creating ID cards. There is a variety to choose from, which can be brought directly from our website. All laminating pouches that we stock are high quality and excellent value for money. They are just what you need for protecting your professional documentation, for creating signs and notices, or for protecting treasured personal pictures, postcards or letters. They are perfect for both office and home use. Excellent reasons for laminating Laminating paper based articles, such as documents or photographs , can protect them from getting damaged over time. Paper can be a flimsy and easily damaged material, and laminating pouches can help prevent this. Our laminating pouches range can keep your articles from getting creased or wrinkled, grazed, stained or smeared, or marked by grease or fingerprints; These kinds of damage are likely to occur if the documents pass through many hands during use. It can also protect them from water damage, or fading over time as a result of exposure to the air. This is an important consideration if you wish to maintain articles in pristine condition for a long period of time.

item.title: Novaro USB Optical Wired Mouse
item.description: The Novaro USB Optical Wired Mouse is a reliable and ergonomic solution designed to enhance your daily computing experience. Whether you're working, browsing, or gaming, this mouse provides the precision and comfort you need. Key Features: High Precision: Features a high-precision 1000 DPI (Dots Per Inch) optical sensor for smooth and accurate cursor control on most surfaces. Ergonomic and Symmetrical Design: The contoured shape fits snugly in your hand, reducing fatigue during long-term use. Its symmetric design makes it comfortable for both left and right-handed users. Plug-and-Play Functionality: No drivers are needed. Simply connect the USB plug to your computer's USB port, and the mouse is ready to use instantly. 3-Button Design: Features a standard 3D button layout including the left key, right key, and a clickable scroll wheel for easy navigation. Durable Construction: Built with quality materials for a durable and long-lasting performance. Generous Cable Length: Comes with a 1.5-meter cable, providing ample reach and flexibility for your workspace setup. Technical Specifications: Interface: USB DPI: 1000 Buttons: 3 (Left, Right, Scroll Wheel) Sensor Type: Optical Cable Length: 1.5 meters Compatibility: Universal, compatible with various operating systems including Windows, Mac OS, and Unix. Dimensions: Approximately 11.0 x 6.2 x 3.5 cm Color: Available in basic colors such as Black.

item.title: Novaro Laminator - A4
item.description: Looking for a reliable and efficient laminator for your home or office? Look no further than the Novaro A4 laminator! Here are some key selling features and important product information that you should know about before making your purchase: Quick and Easy Laminating: The Novaro A4 laminator can laminate documents up to 9 inches wide, making it perfect for a wide range of projects. With a fast warm-up time of just 3-5 minutes, you can quickly and easily start laminating your documents without any delays. Versatile and Convenient: This laminator features both hot and cold laminating settings, allowing you to use a variety of laminating pouches, including thermal, self-adhesive, and no-heat pouches. Reliable Performance: With a maximum laminating speed of 30cm/min and a laminating thickness of up to 0.6mm, this laminator can handle a wide range of documents, including photos, business cards, and important documents. It also has a built-in overheat protection system to prevent damage and ensure safety. Easy to Use and Clean: The Novaro A4 laminator is designed for ease of use, with a simple and intuitive control panel that allows you to adjust the temperature and speed settings. Compact and Portable: This laminator is compact and easy to store when not in use. It also comes with a convenient carrying handle for easy transport and storage. Invest in the Novaro A4 laminator for all your laminating needs and enjoy reliable performance and convenience. Specifications: Paper size: A4 Temperature settings: Hot and cold temperature settings Start-up: 3-6 minutes Compact and sleek design What's in the box 1 x Novaro A4 Laminator

item.title: Novaro Wireless Keyboard & Mouse Combo
item.description: This remarkable duo brings together the best of both a full-size keyboard and a precision mouse, with a single USB dongle providing a seamless connection. Whether you need to type out your next project, design something, or play video games, this combo ensures the highest level of accuracy and comfort. DESCRIPTION For those that need to type quickly and accurately, the keyboard features quick access for multimedia control and comfortable keys for a smooth typing experience. Additionally, this waterproof and anti-dust design ensures the keyboard will stand up to tough wear-and-tear and last for years of use. The mouse is just as impressive as the keyboard, with optical technology ensuring a precise click, and rubber scroll providing a smooth scrolling action. Plus, with a high-precision optical sensor, you can be sure that your cursor will always be exactly where you want it. Finally, the comfort, accuracy, and durability of this wireless combo make it the perfect companion for your computer. Thanks to the single USB dongle, reliable design, and intuitive multimedia control, you can be sure that this combo will make your computer experience a smooth and enjoyable one. item.title: 42206 | LEGO® Technic Oracle Red Bull Racing RB20 F1 Car
item.description: Imagine the roar of the engines as you build your own LEGO® Technic™ Oracle Red Bull Racing RB20 F1 Car model kit (42206). Enjoy the challenge as you assemble the elements and functions of this 1:8 scale F1 model car with its distinctive livery, printed tires and authentic features. Steer the car into position using the knob on the roof or the steering wheel in the cockpit before testing the suspension at the front and rear of the car. Examine the 2-speed gearbox and differential and remove the engine cover to see the V6 engine with its moving pistons. Then adjust the spoiler to mimic the DRS before displaying your car in tribute to your passion for F1. Drive your desire for high-performance vehicles and enjoy a relaxing building project with the collection of LEGO Technic vehicle sets for adults (sold separately). Get the most out of your sets with the LEGO Builder app, where you can zoom in and rotate your models in 3D, build as a team and save all your sets in one place. Car model kit for adults – Stay focused for an epic building project as you assemble this detailed LEGO® Technic™ Oracle Red Bull Racing RB20 F1 Car model kit An F1 racing car model packed with features – Celebrate your love for motorsports as you explore details including front and rear suspension, steering, an adjustable spoiler and printed tires Realistic engine and gearbox – Examine the 2-speed gearbox and differential, and remove the engine cover to explore the V6 engine with its moving pistons Display with pride – This model version of the Oracle Red Bull Racing RB20 F1 Car makes a great display piece for any room or office, celebrating your passion for F1 A LEGO® Technic™ car for F1 fans – This set makes a gift idea for adult F1 fans who enjoy challenging projects or a treat for yourself if you want to build your own F1 car Immerse yourself – Enjoy every step of your build with the LEGO® Builder app, which lets you zoom and rotate your model in 3D, track your progress and save all your sets in one place LEGO® vehicles for adults – Explore engineering concepts and enjoy a relaxing building project with the collection of LEGO Technic™ vehicle sets for adults, sold separately Measurements – A 1,639-piece set with aLEGO® F1 car measuring over 5.5 in. (14 cm) high, 25 in. (63 cm) long and 9.5 in. (24 cm) wide

item.title: 77250 | LEGO® Speed Champions MoneyGram Haas F1® Team VF-24 Race Car
item.description: LEGO® Speed Champions MoneyGram Haas F1® Team VF-24 Race Car (77250) lets boys and girls aged 10 plus enjoy all the excitement of Formula 1®. Kids and adult car collectors can build, display and play out races with an F1 race car model featuring design details from the real-life version that competed in the 2024 Formula 1 season. The F1 model car features a cockpit that opens by lifting the halo bar, a rear wing, wishbone suspension, sponsor stickers and wider rear tires imprinted with “Pirelli.” The F1 race car also comes with a driver minifigure wearing a MoneyGram Haas F1 Team outfit and a winged helmet to place inside the cockpit. LEGO Speed Champions sets lets kids and racing fans build models of some of the world’s most iconic vehicles, including other Formula 1 cars (sold separately) from the 2024 championship season. Each car playset can be created using printed building instructions or the LEGO Builder app to guide you and your kid on an enjoyable building adventure. item.title: 10349 | LEGO® Botanicals Happy Plants
item.description: Plant seeds of joy with the LEGO® Botanicals Happy Plants (10349) building set for kids aged 9 and up. Blooming with adorable details, this set lets girls and boys get creative as they build 2 joyful LEGO plants. The adorable set features a baby dracaena plant that stands up and a baby pilea plant that sits down. It also features a yellow plant pot and a blue plant pot that are adorned with cheerful cartoon faces and are interchangeable, letting kids decide which colored pot they would like to use for each plant. Once budding gardeners have finished assembling the plants, they can display them together or separately as bedroom or shelf decor that will bring smiles to any space. A great craft project for kids to complete independently or with a friend, this plant building kit makes a thoughtful gift for girls, boys and plant lovers, who will delight in creating plant decor that will last forever. Set contains 217 pieces. LEGO® plants – Encourage creativity to grow with the LEGO Botanicals Happy Plants building set for kids aged 9 and up, which becomes shelf decor Colorful planters – The set features a baby dracaena plant that’s standing up and a baby pilea plant that’s sitting down, as well as interchangeable blue and yellow plant pots A joyful build – Kids can build the plants independently or share the fun by building them with a friend or family member Bedroom decor – Once complete, these LEGO® plants become decorations that will add a touch of cheer to kids’ bedrooms, or to any living or working space when used as home or office decor Gift idea for kids – The building kit makes a great gift for girls and boys, as well as a gift for plant lovers and adults who like crafting and nature Build more blooms – These brick-built plants can be combined with other sets (sold separately) in the LEGO® Botanicals collection, which includes other trees and LEGO flowers LEGO® Botanicals range – LEGO Botanicals building kits encourage kids and nature lovers to let their creativity bloom as they build lifelike flowers and plants Dimensions – The dracaena plant in this 217-piece set measures over 4.5 in. item.title: 10317 | LEGO® ICONS™ Land Rover Classic Defender
item.description: Fuel your creativity with the LEGO® Icons Land Rover Classic Defender 90 (10317). This immersive building project for adults lets you build one of the most famous vehicles in off-road history before taking it for a spin. Get your Land Rover ready for adventure Staying true to the original 1983 model, this car collectible is sand green with a white roof, black wheel trims and a brown interior. It features functional steering, working suspension and a choice of 2 engines. Car-lovers can keep the basic vehicle as a Land Rover Estate or customise it for an epic off-road adventure using accessories such as a roll cage, fire extinguisher, roof rack, an engine snorkel and traction boards for crossing muddy terrain. Take the scenic route As well as being the perfect gift for Land Rover fans and car collectors, this building set provides a rewarding project for adults who appreciate outstanding design. Indulge your creativity – Build and display a LEGO® Icons Land Rover Classic Defender 90 (10317), an immersive project that lets adults create, customise and display their own collectible car Authentic details – The model features functional steering, opening doors, working suspension and a bonnet that opens. Inside, there are accurate interior details and a coffee cup for the driver Ready for adventure – Customise this car collectible with off-road accessories including a roll cage, fire extinguisher, jerry cans, toolbox, working winch, mudguards and traction boards Choose your drive – Build the car as a left-hand-drive or right-hand-drive vehicle. It comes with the choice of a diesel or a petrol engine, plus 3 different bonnet options Gift for car fans – This building set makes a gift for car-lovers and collectors, as well as anyone who likes cool vehicles and display cars Dimensions – The clean version of the model measures over 16 cm (6 in.) high, 32 cm (12.5 in.) long and 16 cm (6 in.) wide Digital building instructions – The LEGO® Builder app features a digital version of the building instructions included with this set LEGO® set for adults – This set is part of a collection of LEGO building sets for adults who appreciate intricate designs Quality guaranteed – LEGO® bricks are compatible, consistent and made from high-quality materials Safety assured – LEGO® building bricks have been rigorously tested and meet stringent safety standards

item.title: Lead (2B) - 0.9
item.description: Pencil lead is a mixture of graphite and clay. The formula of the mixture is what determines the grade – or the rating between 10H to 10B. The more clay in the formula, the harder the lead (10H), and vice versa – the more graphite, the softer the lead (10B).

item.title: WINX CONNECT Max 11-in-1 Type-C Dock
item.description: Expand your display and peripheral options with the WINX CONNECT Ultra Tri-Display Universal Type-C Dock. This versatile Type-C Dock comes with an HDMI, DP and VGA port for video displays. These ports allow you to connect up to 3x independent displays in addition to your Windows notebook screen (only a single screen is supported on Mac). It also comes with a Type-C, USB-A, and SD/TF Card reader, along with an AUX connector, and a Gigabit LAN port for a more stable network connection via Ethernet. Charge your notebook and connect all of your peripherals through the dock via a high-speed PD Type-C port. It is also universally compatible with Windows, MacOS, Linux, and Android. FEATURES: Connect 3x independent monitors to your notebook Connect to all your peripherals via a single port Ultra high definition 4K@60Hz support Charge your notebook with bi-directional power delivery Universally compatible with Windows, MacOS, Linux, and Android Supports wired audio and Gigabit network connections SPECIFICATIONS: Colour: Grey Material: Aluminium Alloy Cable Length: 40 cm Input: USB Type-C x1 Output Ports: 1x USB Type-C (PD3.0 Max 100W Charging) 1x USB Type-C Gen2 10Gbps 2x USB-A 3.2 Gen2 10Gbps 1x Display Port 1.2 1x HDMI 2.0 1x VGA 1x SD Reader 1x Micro SD Reader 1x Gigabit Ethernet Port 1x 3.5mm AUX (Speaker and microphone) Resolution: HDMI 2.0(4K@60Hz) VGA (1920×1080@60Hz) DP1.2 (4K@60Hz) Compatible System: Windows, MacOS, Linux, and Android Product Dimensions: 27.1 x 4.5 x 1.7 cm WHAT’S IN THE BOX: WINX CONNECT Tri-Display Universal Type-C Dock – Grey x1

item.title: WINX VIBE Active 2 TWS Earbuds
item.description: Enjoy quality audio without limitations with the WINX VIBE Active 2 TWS Earbuds. Beyond their balanced sound with a superb dynamic stereo range, the built-in MEMS microphone facilitates crisp calls with no audio dropouts or interruptions. Intuitive touch controls let you play or pause music, answer calls, or skip tracks with the tap of your finger. Auto-power on and pairing after opening the charging case means less fiddling and more playtime. With attention to detail, their water-resistant and ergonomic design ensures you can enjoy the freedom of true wireless with enhanced comfort and improved stability. At only 9.6g per earbud, its lightweight design is comfortable enough for all-day usage. These True Wireless Earbuds from WINX offer up to 7.5 hours of playtime, and thanks to its compact charging case, you can push that to 26 hours of playtime for uninterrupted listening. Features: Balanced and natural sound with a superb dynamic stereo range Built-in MEMS microphone facilitates crisp calls with no audio dropouts or interruptions Auto-power on and pairing after opening the charging case Intuitive touch controls let you play or pause music, change the volume, answer calls, or skip tracks Earbuds can be used individually (each earbud acts as a master) Three pairs of ear tips sizes help ensure a comfortable, secure fit Specifications: Bluetooth Version: V5.1 Bluetooth Protocol: A2DP, AVRCP, HFP Bluetooth Codec: SBC and AAC Transmission Range: 10 Meters Charging Time: Approx. 2 Hours Talk Time: 4.5 Hours Play Time (Fully Charged): Approx. 7.5 Hours Play Time (Fully Charged with Case): Approx. 26 Hours Standby Time: Approx. 150 Hours Battery Capacity (Charging Case): 380mAh IP Rating: IPX4 Compatibility: iOS/Android USB Type-C Input: 5V/400mA What's in the box 1x WINX VIBE Active 2 TWS Earbuds

item.title: Winx LINK Simple Type C to Acer Cable
item.description: Winx Link Simple Type C to Acer Cable With the WINX LINK Simple Type-C to Acer Charging Cable, you can power your notebook with a 100W Type-C adapter or power bank to stay powered on the go without hassle. Thanks to its built-in E-mark intelligence chip, the LINK Simple Type-C to Acer Charging Cable automatically adjusts current for optimal charging allowing you to power your legacy notebook with Type-C technology. Note: • The Type-C compatible wall charger or power bank connected must have the same or higher wattage than the original power supply of your notebook. Compatible power banks include the WINX GO Ultra 20000mAh 100W PD Power Bank. FEATURES: Charge your Acer notebook with a compatible Type-C power bank or wall adapter Charge legacy notebooks with the latest Type-C technology Compatible with most Acer notebooks Supports up to 100W of power SPECIFICATIONS: Input: Type-C Output: Acer Charging Port* Tip Compatibility: Acer 5.5×1.7mm Charging Port Acer/Toshiba/Asus/Lenovo/IBM 5.5×2.5mm Charging Port Cable length: 1.5m Supported voltage: 20V-5A (100W – E-mark) Colour: Black WHAT’S IN THE BOX: WINX LINK Simple Type-C to Acer Charging Cable x2

item.title: WINX Link Simple Type C and USB Adapter Combo
item.description: Simple Type C and USB Adapter Combo The WINX LINK Simple Type-C & USB Adapter Combo offers the ultimate solution to connect USB peripherals to devices with Type-C ports, and Type-C peripherals to devices with USB ports. These sleek zinc alloy adapters are compatible with MacBooks, ultrabooks, laptops, and other Type-C devices and offer 5Gbps data transmission speeds with up to 3 Amps of power. Note: • Do not use this adapter with Qc3.0, FCP, SCP, VOOC fast chargers or wireless chargers. • This adapter can charge mobile phones and tablets, but not laptops. FEATURES: Connect USB peripherals to your OTG compatible devices via Type-C Connect Type-C peripherals to devices via Type-C Built-in surge protection for safe charging & data transmission Up to 5Gbps data transmission speeds Supports output power up to 3 Amps Slim and compact for those always on-the-go SPECIFICATIONS: LINK Simple Type-C to USB OTG Adapter: Female: USB 3.0 | Male: Type-C LINK Simple USB to Type-C Adapter: Female: Type-C | Male: USB 3.0 Material: Zinc alloy Compatibility: Windows / MacOS / Android Supported voltage: 5V, 9V, 12V, 20V Dimensions: 3.3 x 1.7 x 0.8 cm Product weight: 7.6g WHAT’S IN THE BOX: WINX LINK Simple USB to Type-C Adapter x1 WINX LINK Simple Type-C to USB Adapter x1

item.title: Photo Paper Canon (Magnetic) 4x6
item.description: Accessorise your home office inkjet printer with Canon's Magnetic Photo Paper MG-101 and make your own creative, interactive photo displays. Benefits: High-quality photo printing on magnetic media Ideal for creative magnetic photo displays Decorate magnetic surfaces without damaging walls Create interactive educational games for children Free your creativity with an interactive, customised magnetic photo display. Design your magnets with the Easy-PhotoPrint Editor, ideal for creating completely personalised keepsakes or gifts, and stick your photos straight onto your fridge or any other magnetic surface for an instant eye-catching display. Keep your photos up to date with an ever-changing display. Shuffle your magnets on your fridge for a fast refresh or replace them with new customised magnets for a whole new exhibition of your favourite photos. Transform your magnets into an educational tool. Create picture puzzles, alphabet charts or number series on your fridge to make learning at home more fun and interactive. Stay on top of things with some magnetised reminders. Stick up important notes and shopping lists with an eye-catching magnet - put onto your fridge so you never lose track of those all-important things. Brighten up your home office with a magnetic mood board or project map to keep your focus on your workload and your ideas.

item.title: Instax Printer Mini Link 3 White + Film Bundle
item.description: Make instant film prints directly from your smartphone with the INSTAX MINI LINK 3 Smartphone Printer from FUJIFILM. This compact mobile printer connects to your iOS or Android smartphone via Bluetooth 5.1 and works with the free INSTAX MINI LINK app to produce 2 x 3" prints from still images or videos. Prior to printing, images can be decorated with text, frames, filters, and stickers. Or use the INSTAX AiR Studio to add "in the moment" 3D AR effects. For those seeking a photo booth experience, the Click to Collage app takes a series of six images in three-second intervals and lets you select which ones to print as a collage, while also giving you the option of turning the image sequence into an animation for social media. Remote Live View via the INSTAX AiR Studio app allows the shot to be checked via another smartphone after scanning a QR code within the app. Powered by an internal rechargeable lithium-ion battery, you can recharge the INSTAX MINI LINK 3 in 1.5 to 2 hours using the included USB-C to USB-A cable. It produces up to 100 prints per full charge. It may only be used with INSTAX MINI instant film and has LED lights on the front that pulse different colours, depending on what the printer is doing. Compact and lightweight with an easy to hold, textured design Easily print photos taken with your smartphone Requires smartphone downloading of the free INSTAX MINI LINK smartphone app and Bluetooth pairing INSTAX MINI LINK app includes INSTAX AiR Studio and Click to Collage app features Add text, frames, filters, and stickers to your smartphone images prior to printing Print photos from your smartphone videos Images print in 15 seconds (film development takes approximately 90 seconds) Printer features an LED light indicator on the front Shoot photos remotely using the power button on the side of the printer Integrated USB-C port for easy charging For use with INSTAX MINI instant film only (sold separately) Prints 2 x 3" INSTAX MINI instant photos Key Specs Functions: Print Printing Technology: Instant Film Colour Type: Color Print Resolution: 800 x 600 dpi Media Sizes: 2 x 3" / 5.1 x 7.6 cm Wireless: Bluetooth 5.1 What's in the box 1 x Instax Mini Link Printer 1x Instax Mini Instant Film (10 Sheets)

item.description: Dedicated to the joy of living in the moment, the FUJIFILM INSTAX MINI 12 Instant Film Camera provides easy-to-use controls and quickly produces memorable credit-card-sized photos. A close-up mode and selfie mirror make the camera perfect for portraits and self-portraits, and the camera's automatic flash system allows you to get shots in dimly-lit environments. Take perfect photos no matter where or when! Shutter speed, flash brightness and other settings automatically adjust to ambient light for the perfect photo every time. Easy to use for the perfect close-up! Twist the lens to turn on, twist again for Close-up mode. It's that simple! This mode is ideal for distances of 30 to 50cm. Take better selfies than ever before. Use the selfie mirror to line up your shot. Flash adjusts automatically even in Close-up mode. Get just the right amount of light without overexposing the photo. item.title: Instax Film Mini White 1 Pack (10 sheets)
item.description: This is a pack of 10 of instax mini Picture Format Instant Film from Fuji. This is an incredibly sharp, credit card-sized, daylight-balanced ISO 800 film made for use in instax mini Series Cameras. Recognized for its excellent color reproduction, the film has a glossy finish and is an excellent choice for general use, portraiture or even with electronic flash. It's also a fun film to use - easy to load, shoot and best of all - no wasted time at the lab wondering how your images came out. Due to its "mini" size, it is easier to carry, file and store when compared to larger, more traditional film formats. Even in low light scenarios, due to its high-speed rating, instax mini Film will produce amazingly sharp images. Another user benefit is that it has been improved to lessen the developing time before you see your print - a real benefit when you're photographing young children who are notorious for wanting everything "yesterday". Instax mini Film has also been enhanced to maintain its stability over the years making it a good choice for archival storage. Sharp Grain: It produces very fine grain yet with all the high-speed advantages of an ISO 800 film Vibrant Color Reproduction: No color mixing between film layers - skin tones will be neutral Faster Image Formation: Enhanced developing process produces a more rapid image - less waiting time for complete development Long-Term Stability: Resulting from improved emulsion, development accelerators and development control technology it will keep your images color-true for years Features: - ISO 800 / Works Well in Low Light - For instax mini 7, 8, 25, 50, 90 Cameras - Daylight Balanced / Glossy Finish - Credit Card-Sized Film Format - Ultra Sharp for a High-Speed Film - Vibrant Color Reproduction - Fast Development Times - Enhanced Stability for Long-Term Storage - Small Format - Easy to Carry and Store - Extended Operating Temperature Range Specifications: - Working range is 5 - 40°C (41 - 104°F)

item.title: Creality Unicorn Hardened 0.2mm Nozzle - K2 Series
item.description: Creality Unicorn Hardened 0.2mm Nozzle - K2 Series Overview The Creality Unicorn Hardened 0.2mm Nozzle is a precision‑engineered upgrade designed for high‑detail 3D printing. Built from hardened steel , this nozzle offers exceptional durability and resistance to wear, making it ideal for abrasive filaments such as carbon fiber, glow‑in‑the‑dark, and metal‑filled composites. With its ultra‑fine 0.2mm diameter , it enables highly detailed prints with smooth surfaces and sharp features. Key Features Ultra‑Fine 0.2mm Diameter: Perfect for high‑resolution prints with intricate details. Hardened Steel Construction: Superior wear resistance compared to brass or stainless steel nozzles. High Temperature Resistance: Suitable for printing at elevated temperatures without deformation. Universal Compatibility: Designed for Creality Unicorn hotend systems and compatible with standard 1.75mm filament. Abrasion Resistant: Handles abrasive filaments such as carbon fiber, wood, glow‑in‑the‑dark, and metal composites. Precision Machining: Ensures consistent extrusion and reduced clogging. Extended Lifespan: Hardened steel resists wear from abrasive filaments, reducing replacement frequency. Versatility: Works with a wide range of materials, from standard PLA to advanced composites. Reliability: Precision machining minimizes extrusion issues and ensures consistent results.

Nautilus-Honeycomb Structural Design : The Creality x BEN2C Nautilus Fan Duct is naturally designed into a spiral flow generator, forming a shell-like corridor to channel the airflow. item.title: Creality Filament Vacuum Seal Kit with Rechargeable Vacuum Pump — Moisture-Proof 3D Filament Storage
item.description: Keep your 3D printing filament dry, dust-free, and print-ready with the Creality Filament Vacuum Seal Kit. Includes reusable vacuum bags and a powerful rechargeable pump for reliable moisture control and compact spool storage. The Creality Filament Vacuum Seal Kit (SKU 4007010143) is a complete moisture-control solution for 3D printing enthusiasts and professionals. Designed to protect PLA, PETG, ABS, TPU and other hygroscopic filaments, the kit includes multiple reusable vacuum storage bags and a compact rechargeable vacuum pump that creates a strong, consistent seal to remove air and lock out humidity. Ideal for long-term filament storage, travel, or tidy workshop organisation, the kit reduces filament brittleness, stringing and print failures caused by moisture uptake. Key benefits: Extends filament life and preserves printing performance. Reusable, durable vacuum bags fit standard 1 kg spools. Rechargeable pump offers cordless convenience and robust suction. Easy one-button sealing and clear viewing window for quick spool checks. Compact, space-saving storage and simple cleaning after use. Perfect for hobbyists, small workshops, schools and FDM production environments that need reliable filament preservation and tidy spool management. Includes: Rechargeable vacuum pump; multiple reusable vacuum seal bags sized for 1kg spools; sealing clips and USB charging cable. Rechargeable Pump: Cordless operation with efficient suction for consistent vacuum sealing. Material Compatibility: Works with PLA, PETG, ABS, TPU, Nylon and other filaments. Humidity Protection: Prevents moisture absorption to reduce pops, bubbles, poor layer adhesion and stringing. Reusable Bags: Durable, zip-style vacuum bags designed for repeated use. Compact Storage: Saves shelf space and keeps spools dust-free. Easy Operation: One-button pump and clear bag windows for visual spool checks. SKU: 4007010143. Technical specifications Model: Creality Filament Vacuum Seal Kit (4007010143) Pump type: Rechargeable electric vacuum pump (USB-C/USB-A charging cable included) Bag sizes: Fits standard 1 kg filament spools (multiple bags included) Materials: Heavy-duty reclosable polymer vacuum bags (food-grade safe where applicable) Runtime / Charge: Typical pump charge supports multiple seals per charge (depends on usage) Package Contents: Vacuum pump, vacuum seal bags (qty varies by pack), sealing clips, charging cable, user manual. Compatibility: Universal for common spool widths and diameters.

item.title: Lead (HB) - 0.7
item.description: Pencil lead is a mixture of graphite and clay. The formula of the mixture is what determines the grade – or the rating between 10H to 10B. The more clay in the formula, the harder the lead (10H), and vice versa – the more graphite, the softer the lead (10B).

item.title: Creality Space Pi SE Filament Dryer
item.description: Stop stringing, popping and poor layer adhesion—this filament dryer restores and maintains your spools at the right conditions before and during prints. The Creality SpacePi SE 3D printer filament dryer uses 360° PTC hot-air heating to remove moisture evenly across the roll, helping you deliver cleaner surfaces and consistent extrusion. Set the heat anywhere from 45–70°C and choose a 0–48 hour timer, or use one-key presets tuned for common materials like PLA, PETG, ABS and TPU. A responsive touchscreen shows real-time temperature and humidity so you can lock in the sweet spot quickly. Built for everyday convenience, the SpacePi SE supports 1.75 mm and 2.85 mm filaments and lets you dry while you print for stable results in changing weather. Power-off memory resumes your last settings, while sealed outlets help keep ambient moisture out. With efficient PTC heating and a compact footprint, it’s a simple upgrade that reduces waste and failed prints—ideal for home makers, schools and small workshops alike. Upgrade your workflow with a Creality filament dryer that keeps materials consistent, jobs reliable and finishes crisp.

item.title: Creality Space Pi Filament Dryer
item.description: The Creality Space Pi Filament Dryer is a device designed to enhance the quality of your 3D printing by drying the filament during the printing process itself123. Here are some of its key features: Fast Filament Selection : It allows for efficient drying of filaments. Adjustable Temperature : You can set the temperature according to the type of filament you are using. Real-Time Humidity & Temperature Monitoring : It allows you to monitor the humidity and temperature in real-time, ensuring optimal conditions for your 3D printing. 360° Hot-Air Heating : The Space Pi Filament Dryer uses PTC 360° hot-air heating to dry up to 12 filaments efficiently. Long Drying Time : You can set the drying time up to 48 hours. By using the Creality Space Pi Filament Dryer, you can minimize the influence of external environmental factors on the printing of 3D filaments, thereby enhancing your 3D model quality

item.title: Creality Space Pi Filament Dryer Plus - Double Roll Dryer

Designed to accommodate two rolls of filament, this advanced drying box ensures your filaments remain dry and free from moisture, which can significantly impact print quality. With its sleek design and user-friendly features, the Space Pi Filament Dry Box Plus is a must-have for achieving consistent and reliable 3D printing results. Key Features: LCD Touch Screen : Easily monitor and control the drying process with the intuitive LCD touch screen interface. PTC 360-Degree Hot-Air Heating : Ensures even and efficient drying of filaments, preventing moisture absorption. One-Key Set for Filaments : Simplifies the drying process with pre-set modes for different types of filaments. 48 Hours Timer Function : Allows you to set the drying time up to 48 hours, ensuring thorough drying. Parameter Power-off Memory Function : Retains your settings even after a power outage, so you can resume drying without hassle. Specifications: Compatible Filament Sizes : 1.75mm and 2.85mm Supports High-Speed 3D Printers : Ideal for use with high-speed 3D printers and filaments from the Hyper series. Temperature Switching : Easily switch between °C and °F. Safety Features : Includes a power switch and moisture-proof silicone plug for added safety. Desiccant Compartments : Double compartments for desiccants ensure effective drying even when the unit is switched off. Input Voltage : 220V 50/60Hz Rated Power : 260W Benefits: Enhanced Print Quality : Keeps filaments dry, reducing the risk of print failures due to moisture. User-Friendly : Simple controls and clear display make it easy to use. Versatile : Compatible with a wide range of filaments and 3D printers. Invest in the Creality Space Pi Filament Dry Box Plus to ensure your filaments are always in optimal condition, leading to better print quality and more reliable results.

item.title: Creality K2 Plus Nozzle Wiper Module Kit
item.description: The Nozzle Wiper Module is a stop along the path of your Creality K2 Plus hotend as it processes fast prints and performs mid-go colour changes with the CFS. This small nozzle wipe strip is just the surface your nozzle needs to wipe away any stray filament caking around its hot surface. Keeping your nozzle sparkly clean will help avoid clogs and print mishaps. Usually, you would need to give your nozzle a quick wipe yourself before every print. But the K2 Plus is smart enough to whiz over the Nozzle Wipe Module for a quick brush. As an official Creality spare, the K2 Plus Nozzle Wipe Module is an easy replacement in only a few minutes. This spare includes the entire assembly to screw onto the filament chute at the back of your K2 Plus printer. As the hotend manoeuvres to deposit unwanted filament, this nozzle wipe strip catches the dangling filament threads that tend to get in the way. While this method does wonders to automatically clean the exterior of your K2 Plus nozzle , we recommend regularly cleaning your nozzle yourself to ensure no problems occur unexpectedly.

item.title: Creality CFS Accessory Kit for K1 Series 3D Printer
item.description: Compatible Models: K1/K1 Max/K1C/K1 SE （ With Integrated Nozzle ） This Kit DOES NOT come with the Creality CFS, it needs to be purchased separately. The CFS Upgrade Kit is not compatible with split-type nozzles. If you wish to upgrade, you will need to purchase an integrated nozzle hot end separately Designed for Multicolour 3D printing: Promising multicolour creativity with an easy and complete upgrade pack. Dedicated New Extruder: A cutter and run-out sensor are integrated for accurate filament change. Quick Connection to CFS: Enabling auto RFID filament recognition, auto filament switch & relay, etc. Tips: Please update the firmware (Creality OS) with the included USB drive upon the upgrade. For subsequent updates, you can use the OTA function. While using CFS, the print size of K1, K1C and K1 SE changes to 220 × 215 × 250 mm, and the print size for K1 Max changes to 300 × 295 × 300 mm. The print size stays unchanged if you use the stock spool holder. Note: When upgrading to multicolour printing, the USB port remains functional but will be occupied during the process. Additionally, the PTFE tube must be fed into the printer vertically, which prevents the top cover from fully closing. Improper alignment may lead to tube friction or feeding issues.

Built for durability and precision, it is ideal for makers who demand professional‑grade results from their Creality 3D printers. High Temperature Resistance: Supports printing with advanced materials such as ABS, PETG, TPU, Nylon, and composites. Precision Machining: Ensures tight tolerances for consistent extrusion and reduced clogging. Durable Construction: Ceramic and metal components designed for long‑term use under high‑temperature conditions. Easy Installation: Direct replacement kit compatible with Creality hotend systems. Stable Performance: Maintains consistent extrusion flow for smoother layers and improved adhesion. Efficiency: Faster heating reduces downtime and improves workflow

item.title: Creality CR-Touch Auto Levelling Probe
item.description: Creality CR-Touch Auto Levelling Probe (4001010034) Overview The Creality CR-Touch Auto Levelling Probe is a precision sensor designed to deliver consistent and accurate bed leveling for your 3D printer. Compatible with a wide range of Creality printers, it is the ideal upgrade for makers who demand reliability and efficiency. Durable Metal Probe : Built with a robust metal pin for extended lifespan compared to traditional plastic probes. Wide Compatibility : Supports multiple Creality models, including Ender and CR series printers. Easy Installation : Plug-and-play design with clear wiring and mounting instructions for hassle-free setup. Stable Performance : Reduces manual calibration errors and improves first-layer success rates. Benefits Improved Print Quality : Achieve smoother surfaces and stronger adhesion with precise leveling. Time-Saving : Automates the leveling process, eliminating repetitive manual adjustments. Long-Term Reliability : Designed for durability, minimizing maintenance and replacement costs. Enhanced Workflow : Perfect for hobbyists, professionals, and businesses seeking consistent 3D printing results. Specifications Model Number: 4001010034 Sensor Type: Optical with metal probe Accuracy: ±0.01mm Compatibility: Ender series, CR series, and other Creality printers supporting auto-leveling upgrades Installation: Plug-and-play with included wiring and mounting hardware What’s in the Box 1 × CR-Touch Auto Levelling Probe 1 × Set of Screws (for secure installation) Why Choose the Creality CR-Touch? item.title: Lead (HB) - 0.9
item.description: Pencil lead is a mixture of graphite and clay. The formula of the mixture is what determines the grade – or the rating between 10H to 10B. The more clay in the formula, the harder the lead (10H), and vice versa – the more graphite, the softer the lead (10B).

item.title: Lead (2H) - 0.5
item.description: Pencil lead is a mixture of graphite and clay. The formula of the mixture is what determines the grade – or the rating between 10H to 10B. The more clay in the formula, the harder the lead (10H), and vice versa – the more graphite, the softer the lead (10B).

item.title: Creality Silk Filament PLA White - 1kg
item.description: Combining a unique reel design with the fastest and most innovative winding systems on the market, the fibre optic sensors defines the exact position of the reel and place it on the winding line, where the filament is wound at an exact speed and position. This results in an excellent finish that makes the PLA glide smoothly during 3D printing. PLA or poly-lactic acid is the most practical material to start practising for the first time in the world of 3D printing. It is easy to use, offers great adhesion and is particularly suitable for long-lasting prints. Because it solidifies very quickly, it offers a higher quality of printing on smaller pieces without sacrificing speed. Technical specifications: Material: 100% Poly-lactic acid, PLA Printing features: Bed temperature 45-55 ºC Printing temperature range 190-220 ºC Density 1.25 g/cm³ Compatibility: Any printer that uses 1.75mm filament Dimensions: Filament diameter: 1.75mm Coil size (D x W): 200 x 66 mm Coil shaft diameter: 56mm Weight: 1 Kg

item.title: Creality HP ASA Filament Black 1Kg
item.description: Short description High-performance HP ASA filament (1.75 mm, Black, 1 kg — SKU 3301100002 ) engineered for UV- and weather-resistant functional parts. Low-warp, chemically robust, and built for reliable extrusion in professional and maker-grade FDM printers. Full product description HP ASA Filament Black 1 kg (SKU 3301100002) is an engineering-grade ASA designed for durable, outdoor-ready 3D prints that demand UV stability, chemical resistance and dimensional accuracy. Formulated to resist yellowing and embrittlement from sun exposure, this filament delivers strong interlayer adhesion, excellent impact resistance and a smooth satin-black finish. Each 1 kg spool maintains tight diameter tolerance for predictable extrusion and reduced rework, making it ideal for housings, enclosures, automotive parts, signage and other functional applications where long-term performance matters. Key features SKU: 3301100002 Material: ASA (Acrylonitrile Styrene Acrylate) engineered for UV and weather resistance Colour: Black (deep satin finish) Diameter: 1.75 mm with tight tolerance for consistent flow Spool weight: 1 kg net Performance: High impact resistance and heat tolerance; low warp and strong layer bonding Compatibility: Works with most FDM/FFF printers; best results with heated bed and enclosure Use cases: Outdoor fixtures, automotive parts, functional prototypes, housings and signage Technical specifications Product name: HP ASA Filament 1.75 mm — Black — SKU 3301100002 Diameter: 1.75 mm Net weight: 1 kg Tolerance: ±0.02 mm (typical) Recommended nozzle temperature: 240–260 °C Recommended bed temperature: 90–110 °C Cooling: Low to moderate (10–30%) for improved layer bonding Nozzle size: 0.4 mm recommended Storage: Store sealed with desiccant; dry at 60–70 °C if filament absorbs moisture Printing recommendations First layer: 15–30 mm/s with brim or raft for strong adhesion Print speed: 30–70 mm/s depending on part complexity and printer capability Enclosure: Recommended to reduce warping and improve dimensional accuracy Retraction: 1–6 mm depending on drive type; tune to minimize oozing and stringing Post-processing: Sanding and painting work well; solvent smoothing not recommended for ASA like for ABS Adhesion aids: Use PEI, glue stick, BuildTak, or ABS slurry for large flat surfaces

item.title: Creality Hyper High-Speed PLA Carbon Filament 1Kg
item.description: Creality Hyper High‑Speed PLA Carbon Filament 1Kg Overview The Creality Hyper High‑Speed PLA Carbon Filament (1Kg) is a specialized material engineered for fast printing speeds and enhanced mechanical performance . Infused with carbon additives, this filament offers increased rigidity, reduced warping, and a sleek matte finish , making it ideal for functional parts, prototypes, and models requiring both strength and precision. Designed for high‑speed extrusion, it delivers consistent results even under demanding print conditions. Key Features Carbon‑Enhanced PLA: Provides improved stiffness and durability compared to standard PLA. High‑Speed Printing: Optimized for rapid extrusion with stable flow and minimal stringing. Matte Black Finish: Produces professional‑looking prints with reduced surface shine. Excellent Layer Adhesion: Strong bonding reduces warping and improves overall print strength. Low Shrinkage: Maintains dimensional accuracy for precise models. Wide Compatibility: Works with Creality Hyper series and most FDM 3D printers supporting PLA. Specifications Material: Hyper PLA with carbon additives Color: Matte black/charcoal tone Weight: 1Kg spool Filament Diameter: 1.75mm ± 0.02mm tolerance Print Speed: Optimized for high‑speed printing up to 300mm/s (depending on printer capability) Recommended Print Temperature: 200–230°C Bed Temperature: 25–70°C Compatibility: Creality Hyper series printers and other FDM printers using 1.75mm PLA Benefits Stronger Prints: Carbon reinforcement improves rigidity and mechanical performance. Professional Finish: Matte surface reduces reflections and enhances aesthetics. Reliable Performance: Consistent extrusion reduces clogging and print failures. Versatility: Suitable for functional parts, prototypes, and decorative prints.

item.title: Creality PLA Carbon Filament 1Kg
item.description: This is a PLA based material impregnated with fibres to increase strength. It has the same printing properties as PLA and does not require a special size nozzle The fibres do wear out the brass nozzles very quickly. a Hardened nozzle is recommended with this filament. Creality PLA Carbon Filament is a high-performance 3D printing material designed to improve the strength, rigidity, and overall quality of your prints. Combining the ease of PLA with the superior mechanical properties of carbon fibers, this filament offers both durability and a sleek, matte finish. Ideal for hobbyists and professionals alike, this filament ensures precision and style in every print. Key Features: Carbon Fiber Reinforced : The blend of PLA and carbon fibers enhances the filament's strength, stiffness, and durability, making it ideal for projects that require superior mechanical properties. Matte Black Finish : Thanks to the carbon fiber content, the filament delivers a unique, matte black appearance, adding an elegant and professional look to your printed objects. Easy to Print : Despite its enhanced strength, PLA Carbon prints with settings similar to standard PLA, offering a hassle-free experience even for beginners. Reduced Warping : Enjoy smoother and more consistent prints with minimal warping, ensuring better results for complex designs. Environmentally Friendly : Non-toxic, odorless, and eco-friendly, this filament is safe to use for a variety of projects. Generous 1KG Spool : Comes with a full kilogram of filament, providing ample material for all your creative endeavors. Specifications: Material: PLA Carbon (Polylactic Acid with Carbon Fiber) Spool Weight: 1KG Matte black finish for a sleek look Compatible with most FDM 3D printers Achieve high-quality, durable prints with Creality PLA Carbon Filament, designed to deliver precision and strength with a professional matte finish. Specification Details Product Name CR-PLA Carbon 3D Printer Filament Density 1.25 g/cm³ Tensile Strength 49 MPa Bending Strength 78 MPa Charpy Impact Strength 7 J/ ㎡ Recommended Printing Temperature 195–230 ℃ Recommended Hotbed Temperature 25–60 ℃ Recommended Print Speed 40–80 mm/s Recommended Fan Speed 100% Recommended Print Surface Carborundum glass platform, PEI platform, Crepe tape, PVP glue Filament Diameter 1.75 ± 0.03 mm Product Net Weight 1 kg / 2.2 lb Product Gross Weight 1.29 kg / 2.8 lb Packing Size 210 × 210 × 70 mm Certification RoHS, REACH, MSDS

item.title: Creality TPU Filament White 1Kg
item.description: Product Description: Are you ready to take your 3D printing projects to the next level? Look no further than the Creality TPU Filament a premium filament designed to deliver outstanding results and unparalleled durability. This versatile 3D printing material is the key to unlocking your creative potential and bringing your designs to life with precision and reliability. Key Features: – High-Quality TPU Material: Crafted from premium TPU (Thermoplastic Polyurethane), this filament offers exceptional flexibility, resilience, and wear resistance. It’s perfect for creating intricate and functional prints, including phone cases, shoe soles, and more. – 1Kg Spool: With a generous 1Kg (2.2lb) of filament on each spool, you’ll have plenty of material to tackle large-scale projects without worrying about frequent refills, ensuring a smoother printing experience. – Bright White Color: The bright white hue of this filament provides a sleek and professional finish to your 3D prints. Whether you’re crafting prototypes, cosplay props, or decorative items, the rich black color will make your creations stand out. – Optimized Diameter and Tolerance: Creality ensures precision with a consistent filament diameter and tight tolerance, reducing the risk of jams and improving overall print quality. – Low Odor and Low Warping: The Creality TPU Filament emits minimal odors during printing, ensuring a more pleasant working environment. Additionally, its low warping characteristics make it easier to print complex shapes with minimal distortion. – Shock Absorption and Flexibility: TPU is renowned for its shock-absorbing properties and flexibility, making it an ideal choice for creating impact-resistant and flexible parts such as RC car tires, vibration dampeners, and prosthetic components. Specifications: – Material: TPU (Thermoplastic Polyurethane) – Weight: 1Kg – Diameter: 1.75mm – Tolerance: 0.05mm – Printing Temperature: 200-220 C – Bed Temperature: 40-60 C (Optional) – Printing Speed: 20-40mm/s – Compatibility: Compatible with a wide range of 3D printers supporting TPU filament

item.title: Creality PETG Filament Green - 1kg
item.description: Creality PETG Filament stands as a versatile and dependable 3D printing material, delivering exceptional performance across a wide spectrum of applications. Crafted from Polyethylene Terephthalate Glycol (PETG), this filament marries the robustness and endurance of ABS with the user-friendly attributes and printability of PLA. Its impressive impact resistance and minimal warping make it an optimal choice for crafting functional prototypes, mechanical components, and finished products. Key Features and Benefits Superior Durability and Strength: Creality PETG filament is renowned for its exceptional impact resistance, making it ideal for creating durable and long-lasting parts. Whether you’re printing mechanical components or functional prototypes, this filament ensures your creations can withstand daily wear and tear. Ease of Printing: This PETG filament boasts a low printing temperature and minimal shrinkage, simplifying the printing process while ensuring consistent, high-quality output. The recommended extrusion temperature ranges from 230-250°C, with a printing speed of 40-60 mm/s, making it compatible with most 3D printers that support PETG filament. item.title: Creality Hyper PETG Filament Black 1kg
item.description: Hyper PETG Filament stands as a versatile and high-performance 3D printing material, engineered to deliver faster print speeds without compromising strength or quality. Made from advanced Polyethylene Terephthalate Glycol (PETG), this upgraded filament combines the toughness of ABS with the ease of PLA—while introducing enhanced flow and rapid printing capabilities. Its excellent impact resistance and low warping make it an ideal choice for functional prototypes, mechanical parts, and end-use products. Key Features and Benefits High-Speed Performance: Hyper PETG is specifically formulated for high-speed 3D printing, allowing significantly faster print times compared to standard PETG. This makes it perfect for rapid prototyping and efficient production workflows. Superior Durability and Strength: Known for its excellent impact resistance, Hyper PETG ensures durable, long-lasting prints that can handle mechanical stress and everyday use. Ease of Printing: Despite its enhanced performance, Hyper PETG remains easy to print. It features stable extrusion, low shrinkage, and consistent results. Recommended extrusion temperatures typically range from 230–260°C , with higher speeds supported depending on your printer setup. Outstanding Layer Adhesion: Hyper PETG maintains excellent interlayer bonding, ensuring strong, reliable prints even at elevated speeds. This results in parts that are both precise and structurally sound. Smooth Surface Finish: Designed for both speed and aesthetics, Hyper PETG produces smooth, clean surfaces with reduced stringing. Available in a range of vibrant and translucent colors, it delivers visually appealing results. Versatility: Whether you're a professional or a hobbyist, Hyper PETG adapts to a wide range of applications—from detailed models to large functional components—making it a dependable all-rounder. Technical Specifications Material: Hyper PETG (Modified PETG for high-speed printing) Recommended Extrusion Temperature: 230–260°C Printing Speed: Optimized for high-speed printing (can exceed standard PETG speeds significantly) Compatibility: Compatible with most modern 3D printers that support PETG, especially high-speed capable machines Key Advantages: Enhanced flow, faster printing, strong layer adhesion, excellent durability Why Choose Hyper PETG Filament? Hyper PETG filament is designed for users who demand both speed and performance. It offers the perfect balance between strength, reliability, and efficiency, enabling faster turnaround times without sacrificing print quality. Whether you're producing functional prototypes, mechanical parts, or finished products, Hyper PETG empowers you to print smarter and faster. In conclusion , embrace the speed, strength, and versatility of Hyper PETG filament to take your 3D printing projects to the next level. Unlock faster production and outstanding results with this next-generation material.

item.title: Creality Hyper ABS Filament Red
item.description: Short description Tough, low-warp Creality Hyper ABS filament (1.75 mm, 1 kg) engineered for stronger, heat-resistant functional parts and smooth finishes — reliable extrusion, consistent diameter, and excellent layer bonding in any colour. Full product description Creality Hyper ABS Filament (SKU 3301020056) is a premium-grade ABS designed for demanding FDM prints that need toughness, thermal resistance, and dimensional stability. Formulated to reduce warping and improve interlayer adhesion, Hyper ABS prints clean, strong parts with a smooth, slightly satin surface finish. Each 1 kg spool offers consistent 1.75 mm diameter tolerance for steady flow and predictable results across Bowden and direct-drive extruders. Use Hyper ABS for functional prototypes, mechanical components, enclosure parts, tooling aids, and outdoor-ready models where higher heat resistance and impact strength are required. Available in a full spectrum of colours with the same print behaviour and reliability. Key features Material: Creality Hyper ABS (enhanced ABS formulation) Diameter: 1.75 mm with tight tolerance for consistent extrusion Spool weight: 1 kg standard spool Performance: High impact resistance; improved heat resistance vs PLA; low warp and strong layer bonding Finish: Smooth satin surface with good post-processing (sanding, acetone smoothing) Compatibility: Works with most FDM/FFF printers; suited to both Bowden and direct-drive setups Use cases: Functional parts, enclosures, jigs, mechanical components, automotive and outdoor parts Technical specifications SKU: 3301020056 Diameter: 1.75 mm Net weight: 1 kg (spool) Tolerance: ±0.02 mm (typical manufacturing tolerance) Recommended nozzle temp: 230–260 °C (tune per printer and colour) Recommended bed temp: 90–110 °C; use PEI, glass with a suitable adhesive, or BuildTak Nozzle size: 0.4 mm recommended; adapt for detail or speed Spool dimensions: Standard Creality spool fit (check printer spool holder compatibility) Moisture handling: Store sealed and dry; dry at 60–70 °C if needed before printing Printing recommendations First layer: Slow speed (20–30 mm/s), nozzle 230–250 °C, bed 95–105 °C, use brim or raft for best adhesion. Print speed: 40–80 mm/s for optimal strength; faster speeds possible after calibration. Cooling: Minimal part cooling (0–20%) to improve layer bonding and reduce cracking. Enclosure: Recommended for best dimensional stability and reduced warping. Post-processing: Sanding, painting, and acetone vapor smoothing produce professional finishes. Storage: Keep in vacuum bags with desiccant to preserve filament quality.

item.title: Creality Hyper ABS Filament Black 1kg
item.description: Creality Hyper ABS Black 3D Printing Filament: The New Standard for Speed and Strength Unleash the full potential of your 3D printer with Creality Hyper ABS Black . Engineered to redefine the limits of FDM printing, this advanced filament offers a perfect blend of high-speed performance, superior durability, and user-friendly features, making advanced printing Much Easier than ever before. Feature Benefit Five Times Faster, More Efficient Experience revolutionary printing speeds, allowing for rapid prototyping and mass production without sacrificing print quality. The optimized fluidity of Hyper ABS enables up to 5x faster printing compared to standard ABS. High Impact Resistance Your printed parts will be exceptionally strong and resilient, suitable for demanding, stress-prone applications. High-temperature Resistance The printed models maintain structural integrity in warmer environments. The material offers a heat distortion temperature of approx. 80 degrees (higher than standard PLA), broadening the range of practical applications. Reduced Warping & Cracking Special stress-relief properties in the formula significantly minimize shrinkage, reducing the risk of warpage and cracking. This results in reliable, high-quality parts even without a heated chamber (for most common models). Safer and More Environmentally Friendly Formulated from lower residual monomer materials, Hyper ABS is designed to reduce the release of harmful volatile emissions during thermal decomposition, promoting a cleaner and healthier printing environment. Superior Compatibility Highly Compatible with Creality’s 3D Printers and Compatible with Most Creality 3D Printers . Continuous quality testing ensures optimal performance and a high degree of adaptability across the Creality ecosystem.

item.title: Creality ABS Filament Blue
item.description: Short description High-strength Creality ABS filament (1.75 mm, 1 kg — SKU 3301020036) in vibrant Blue. Engineered for durable functional parts, good impact resistance, and reliable extrusion with low warp when printed with proper bed temperature and enclosure. Full product description Creality ABS Filament Blue (1.75 mm, 1 kg — SKU 3301020036) is a professional-grade ABS designed for makers and engineers needing sturdy, heat-resistant prints. Prints with a smooth satin finish and excellent mechanical properties, making it ideal for functional prototypes, housings, mechanical parts, jigs, and automotive components. With correct temperature settings and an enclosure, Creality ABS reduces warping and produces dimensionally stable parts in a reliable, saturated blue that holds paint and post-processing well. Key features • SKU : 3301020036 • Material : ABS (Acrylonitrile Butadiene Styrene) • Diameter : 1.75 mm; tolerance: ±0.02 mm (typical) • Net weight : 1 kg spool • Colour : Blue — vibrant, even coloration across the spool • Mechanical properties : High impact resistance, good tensile strength, heat-resistant vs PLA • Surface finish : Smooth satin; accepts sanding, priming, and painting well • Compatibility : Works with most FDM/FFF printers; recommended with heated bed and enclosure Technical specifications • Recommended nozzle temperature : 230–260 °C • Recommended bed temperature : 90–110 °C • Print speed : 40–80 mm/s (tune per printer) • Cooling: Minimal to moderate (0–20%) to improve layer bonding • Nozzle size : 0.4 mm recommended; adjust for detail or speed • Storage : Keep sealed with desiccant; dry at 60–70 °C if filament absorbs moisture Printing recommendations • First layer : Print slow (15–30 mm/s) with brim or raft for best adhesion • Enclosure : Highly recommended to reduce warping and cracking on large parts • Adhesion aids : Use PEI sheet, glue stick, ABS slurry, or hairspray depending on bed surface • Retraction settings : 1–6 mm depending on extruder type; tune to reduce stringing • Post-processing : Sanding, priming, painting, and acetone smoothing for ABS-like finishes

item.title: Creality Soleyin Ultra PLA - Pineapple Yellow 1Kg
item.description: Creality Soleyin Ultra PLA Matte Filament is an environmentally conscious 3D printing material, crafted from renewable plant-based resources. This filament is specifically designed for high-speed printing, reaching speeds up to 300mm/s, allowing for significantly faster print times without sacrificing quality. It produces prints with a sophisticated, non-reflective matte finish, which effectively minimizes glare and enhances the visibility of fine details and textures. The high purity of the material and its excellent fluidity ensure smooth and consistent extrusion, reducing the risk of nozzle clogs. Soleyin Ultra PLA Matte also exhibits low shrinkage, leading to minimal warping and strong adhesion to the print bed. This makes it an ideal choice for functional parts, prototypes, and aesthetically pleasing models that require a professional, understated look. Available in a range of attractive matte colors, this filament combines ease of use with high performance and a sustainable approach to 3D printing. High-Speed Printing Capability: Supports print speeds up to 300mm/s, significantly reducing printing time. Eco-Friendly Material: Made from renewable plant-based resources, offering a more sustainable printing option. Elegant Matte Finish: Produces prints with a smooth, non-glossy surface that minimizes reflections and enhances detail. Warp-Free Printing: Low shrinkage properties ensure minimal warping and improved dimensional accuracy. Smooth Printing & Anti-Clogging: High purity and excellent fluidity prevent nozzle blockages for consistent extrusion. Strong Bed Adhesion: Ensures prints adhere firmly to the build plate, reducing curling and movement. Dimensional Accuracy: Precise diameter tolerance for consistent and high-quality results. Neat Spool Winding: Automated winding process reduces tangles and filament breaks. Moisture-Resistant Packaging: Vacuum-sealed with desiccant to maintain filament quality during storage. Wide Compatibility: Compatible with most 1.75mm FDM 3D printers, including Creality models. Variety of Matte Colors: Available in a range of aesthetically pleasing, non-reflective shades. Enhanced Detail Visibility: The matte finish reduces glare, making intricate features and textures more prominent. Ideal for Functional Parts: The understated finish is well-suited for practical applications and prototypes.

item.title: Ender Fast PLA White plus Black Value Pack (2Kg) - 300mm/s
item.description: Short description High-speed Ender FAST PLA filament twin pack (White + Black) — 2 kg total (1kg of each colour) (300 mms), engineered for fast printing, smooth surface finish, excellent layer adhesion and low warping. Ideal for hobbyists, prototyping and production runs. Full product description The Ender FAST PLA White + Black 2 kg pack (SKU 3301010395) delivers reliable, high-speed 3D printing performance with consistent diameter tolerance and vivid, uniform colour. Formulated for fast print speeds and strong layer bonding, FAST PLA reduces stringing and improves bridging while maintaining an attractive matte finish. Each pack contains two 1 kg spools (White and Black) totalling 2 kg and offering about 300 mms of filament length for versatile projects from quick prototypes to finished parts. Designed for hobbyists, educators and small-batch production, this filament works smoothly with Bowden and direct-drive extruders and is compatible with most FDM/FFF printers. Low-odour and easy to print, Ender FAST PLA helps you increase throughput without sacrificing detail — fewer reprints, cleaner surfaces and predictable results. Key features • Twin pack: 2 × 1 kg spools (White + Black), total 2 kg; SKU 3301010395 • Optimised for speed: Engineered for higher print speeds with consistent extrusion • Diameter tolerance: ±0.02 mm for accurate layering and minimal clogging • Surface finish: Smooth, matte finish with crisp detail and minimal stringing • Compatibility: PLA-friendly printers; works well on Bowden and direct-drive setups • Print reliability: Low warping, good bed adhesion on PEI, glass, and blue tape with recommended bed temps • Application: Prototyping, parts, scale models, educational use, and decorative prints Technical specifications • Product name: Ender FAST PLA White + Black Pack • SKU: 3301010395 • Pack size: 2 kg (2 × 1 kg spools) • Filament length: ~300 mms (total) • Diameter: 1.75 mm (standard) • Tolerance: ±0.02 mm • Print temperature: 190–220 °C (adjust per printer and part) • Bed temperature: 20–60 °C (often not required; use 50–60 °C for stronger adhesion) • Material: Polylactic Acid (PLA) — biodegradable, low-odour • Colours included: White; Black Printing recommendations • Nozzle: 0.4 mm standard; adjust for desired detail/speed • Speed: 50–120 mm/s recommended for FAST PLA; calibrate for your machine • Retraction: 5–7 mm (Bowden) or 1–2 mm (direct drive) starting point; tune to reduce stringing • Cooling: 100% part cooling fan for best bridging and detail • Drying/storage: Store in a dry box or vacuum bag to avoid moisture absorption

item.title: Ender PLA+ Filament Grey 1kg
item.description: The Creality Ender PLA+ Filament is an upgraded version of standard PLA, designed to deliver superior strength, durability, and ease of use for all your 3D printing needs. PLA+ (Polylactic Acid Plus) provides enhanced mechanical properties, making it more impact-resistant and less brittle than regular PLA. This makes it the ideal choice for users who need stronger, more durable prints while maintaining the easy printability of traditional PLA. Key features of Creality PLA+ filament include: Stronger and More Durable : PLA+ boasts improved tensile strength and impact resistance compared to regular PLA. It’s perfect for creating functional parts, prototypes, or models that require extra durability and resilience. Easy to Print : Creality Ender PLA+ retains the simplicity of PLA in terms of printing, with excellent layer adhesion and minimal warping. It’s highly compatible with most FDM 3D printers and requires no special adjustments, making it ideal for both beginners and professionals. Low Warping & High Precision : The enhanced formula of PLA+ ensures better performance with less shrinkage and warping, allowing for more accurate and reliable prints even on large models. Smooth and Consistent Finish : PLA+ provides a high-quality finish, with smooth surfaces and vibrant colors that give your models a professional, polished look. Environmentally Friendly : Like regular PLA, PLA+ is made from renewable resources and is biodegradable, offering an eco-friendly option without compromising on strength and performance. Minimal Odor : PLA+ emits very little odor during printing, ensuring a comfortable workspace even during long print jobs. With a printing temperature range of 190°C – 220°C , the Creality Ender PLA+ Filament ensures consistent, high-quality prints while offering greater durability and flexibility compared to standard PLA. It’s the perfect filament for those who need tough, dependable parts while enjoying the ease of PLA printing.
