item.title: Brother DCP-T230 Ink Tank Printer
item.description: Compact-sized printer, perfect for both home and business environments The Brother InkBenefit Tank Series DCP-T230 3-in-1 Colour Inkjet Printer makes home printing simple and efficient. It offers impressive print speeds of up to 27 pages per minute (black) and 11 pages per minute (colour) in Eco mode. Standard print speeds are 16 ipm (black) and 9 ipm (colour), based on ISO/IEC 24734 standards. The intuitive control panel provides quick access to all printer functions, while the 150-sheet paper tray and single-sheet manual feed slot enable you to print on a variety of paper sizes, including envelopes and photos. Connectivity is seamless, with an included USB 2.0 cable allowing easy integration between the printer and your computer. The DCP-T230 features redesigned ink bottles with spill-proof nozzles, ensuring quick and mess-free refilling while preventing mix-ups between colours. Additionally, this printer comes with ultra-high-yield ink bottles, capable of printing approximately 7,500 pages in black and 5,000 pages in colour, making it a cost-effective and reliable choice for all your printing needs. Key Features Print, Copy, Scan Super low cost USB connectivity Print speeds of up to 16/9 ipm (ISO) 150 Sheet paper input Manual feed slot LED display Simple user interface Free 3-year/30,000 Page Carry-in Warranty What's in the box The DCP-T230 Ink Tank Printer 3-in-1 ships with the following: 7,500 Page black ink bottle, 5,000 Pg/CMY colour ink bottles Power supply cord and USB cable Full Driver & Software Package on support.brother.com Free 3-year/30,000 Page Carry-in Warranty

item.title: Brother DCP-T530DW Ink Tank Printer
item.description: The wireless DCP-T530DW Ink Tank Printer 3-in-1 features a plug-and-play design for quick set up The Brother InkBenefit Tank Series DCP-T530DW 3-in-1 Colour InkTank Printer with Wireless Connectivity offers efficient, cost-effective printing in a compact design, perfect for home use. It delivers impressive speeds of up to 27 pages per minute (black) and 11 pages per minute (colour) in Eco mode, or 16 ipm (black) and 9 ipm (colour) based on ISO/IEC 24734 standards. The user-friendly control panel provides quick access to essential functions, including paper size selection for printing and copying. Enhance your productivity with a 150-sheet paper tray and a 1-sheet manual feed slot, which supports various paper types, including envelopes and photo paper. Enjoy versatile connectivity options with wireless and USB 2.0 for seamless integration with your devices. You can also print and scan directly from your mobile device using the Brother Mobile Connect app. The DCP-T530DW features an upgraded ink refill system with redesigned, spill-proof nozzles, ensuring quick and mess-free refilling. Each ink bottle is designed for hassle-free insertion. The printer comes with two high-yield black ink bottles, providing up to 15,000 pages, and cyan, magenta, and yellow ink bottles, capable of printing up to 5,000 colour pages. With its reliability, functionality, and low operating costs, the Brother InkBenefit Tank DCP-T530DW is an excellent choice for all your home printing needs. Key Features Print, Copy, Scan Wireless connectivity Print speeds of up to 16/9 ipm (ISO) 150 Sheet paper input Manual feed slot Mobile and email print capable iPrint&Scan for Desktop and Mobile Free 3-year/30,000 Page Carry-in Warranty What's in the box The DCP-T530DW Ink Tank Printer 3-in-1 ships with the following: 1 7,500 Page black ink bottle, 5,000* Pg/CMY colour ink bottles Power supply cord and USB cable Full Driver & Software Package on support.brother.com Quick Set-Up Guide

item.title: Brother SP-1 A4 Sublimation Printer
item.description: Unlock your bold and creative potential with the Brother SP-1! The Brother SP-1 is perfect for makers, artists, and designers, bringing your imagination to life with vibrant, full-colour projects. Whether you're customizing T-shirts, tote bags, ceramic mugs, metal tumblers, coasters, or more, this compact and user-friendly printer ensures stunning, high-quality results. Using Artspira¹, you can effortlessly design and transfer your creations with ease, making it simple to personalize gifts, create small business products, or explore your creativity like never before. With its seamless wireless connectivity and intuitive features, the SP-1 is the perfect tool for bringing your artistic vision to reality. Get started straight away with a set of 4 full-size inks and 10 sheets of sublimation paper included in the box. You just need your imagination and inspiration. Note: A heat press is required (not included). Key Features Create designs up to 215 x 355mm Compact footprint – fits on your desktop High quality, vibrant colour – print in high or eco mode Print in Speed or Quality mode Wireless enabled What's in the box The Sp-1 Sublimation Printer ships with the following: A full-size set of Brother Genuine CMYK Sublimation Ink Cartridges 10 Sheets Sublimation Paper Quick setup guide Power cord * Heatpress Required - not included

item.title: BMP280 + AHT20 Temperature, Humidity, And Atmospheric Pressure Sensor
item.description: Description The AHT20 + BMP280 Sensor Module is a high-precision digital environmental sensor , combining the AHT20 temperature & humidity sensor with the BMP280 barometric pressure sensor . This compact module provides accurate real-time measurements, making it ideal for weather stations, IoT projects, industrial monitoring, and environmental sensing applications . Technical Specifications: AHT20 Temperature & Humidity Sensor: ✔ Temperature Range: -40°C to 85°C ✔ Temperature Accuracy: ±0.3°C ✔ Humidity Range: 0% to 100% RH ✔ Humidity Accuracy: ±2% RH ✔ Operating Voltage: 2.2V – 5.5V DC ✔ Interface: I2C (Address: 0x38) BMP280 Barometric Pressure Sensor: ✔ Pressure Range: 300 – 1100 hPa ✔ Pressure Accuracy: ±1 hPa ✔ Temperature Range: -40°C to 85°C ✔ Temperature Accuracy: ±1.0°C ✔ Operating Voltage: 1.8V – 3.6V DC ✔ Interface: I2C (Address: 0x76 or 0x77) / SPI Key Features: High-Precision Sensing: Accurate temperature, humidity, and pressure readings Low Power Consumption: Ideal for battery-powered applications I2C & SPI Compatibility: Easy integration with microcontrollers like Arduino, ESP32, and Raspberry Pi Compact Design: Small form factor for easy embedding in projects Weather & Altitude Measurement: BMP280's pressure sensor can estimate altitude Applications: Weather stations & environmental monitoring IoT smart home automation Industrial climate control Altitude & barometric pressure measurement Agriculture & greenhouse monitoring This AHT20 + BMP280 module delivers precise and reliable environmental data for a variety of applications. Whether you're building a smart weather system or an IoT project , this sensor module provides the perfect balance of accuracy, efficiency, and ease of use .

item.title: ESP32 Basic Starter Kit
item.description: ESP32 Basic Starter Kit – Technical Specifications: Main Controller – ESP32 Development Board (Wi-Fi + Bluetooth) Display – 0.96" OLED (128 × 64px, I2C Interface) Breadboard – 830 Tie-Point Solderless Breadboard Temperature & Humidity Sensor – DHT11 Module (0–50°C / 20–90% RH) Motion Sensor – HC-SR501 PIR Passive Infrared Motion Sensor Obstacle Detection – Infrared Obstacle Avoidance Module Light Sensing – Photosensitive (LDR) Resistor Module Relay Module – 5V 2-Channel Relay Module (10A / 250V AC) Potentiometer – 10KΩ Rotary Potentiometer Resistors – 30 Pieces (10× 220Ω, 10× 1KΩ, 10× 10KΩ) Buzzers – 1× Active Buzzer + 1× Passive Buzzer Push Buttons – 6× Tactile Momentary Switches LEDs – 5× Red, 5× Yellow, 5× Green, 2× RGB (17 Total) DuPont Cables – 10× Male to Male, 10× Male to Female, 10× Female to Female USB Cable – 1× Micro USB Cable Compatible IDE – Arduino IDE, ESP-IDF, MicroPython, PlatformIO Handy Tips for Using the ESP32 Basic Starter Kit: 1: The ESP32 is the heart of this kit — a powerful dual-core microcontroller with built-in Wi-Fi and Bluetooth , significantly more capable than an Arduino Uno or Nano. It runs at up to 240MHz, has 34 programmable GPIO pins, and supports analogue input, PWM, I2C, SPI, UART, and touch sensing. Program it using the Arduino IDE by installing the ESP32 board package via the Board Manager, or use MicroPython for a beginner-friendly Python-based approach. 2: The 0.96" OLED display connects via the I2C bus — typically SDA to GPIO21 and SCL to GPIO22 on most ESP32 boards. Use the Adafruit SSD1306 and Adafruit GFX libraries in Arduino IDE to get it up and running quickly. It is perfect for displaying sensor readings, status messages, or simple graphics without needing a computer or serial monitor connected. 3: The DHT11 sensor measures both temperature (0–50°C) and relative humidity (20–90% RH) from a single data pin. Use the DHT sensor library by Adafruit in Arduino IDE. Note that the DHT11 has a minimum sampling interval of 2 seconds — reading it faster than this will return stale or incorrect data. For higher accuracy, the DHT22 is an upgraded alternative with a wider range and better resolution. 4: The HC-SR501 PIR sensor has two onboard potentiometers — one adjusts detection sensitivity (range) and the other adjusts the output hold time (how long the output stays HIGH after motion is detected). It also has a jumper to select between single trigger (output goes LOW immediately after hold time) and repeat trigger (output stays HIGH as long as motion continues) modes. Set these before mounting the sensor in your project. 5: The 2-channel relay module allows the ESP32 to switch mains-voltage appliances (up to 250V AC / 10A) using a low-power GPIO signal. Most relay modules of this type are active LOW — meaning the relay activates when the control pin is pulled LOW, not HIGH. Always test relay behaviour with a low-voltage load first before connecting any mains wiring, and exercise appropriate caution when working with high voltages. 6: Use the 10KΩ potentiometer connected to one of the ESP32's ADC (analogue input) pins to explore analogue reading in code. Note that the ESP32's ADC has a known non-linearity issue — readings between approximately 0.1V and 3.1V are most accurate. For precise analogue measurements, consider applying a calibration offset in your code or using an external ADC module. 7: The passive buzzer requires a PWM signal to produce sound — you control the frequency to change the pitch, making it capable of playing tones and simple melodies. The active buzzer has an internal oscillator and simply turns on and off with a HIGH/LOW signal, producing a single fixed tone. They look similar but behave very differently — check the underside of the component for the label before connecting.

item.title: DS18B20 Temperature Sensor Kit with Adapter Board
item.description: DS18B20 Temperature Sensor Kit with Adapter Board – Technical Specifications: Sensor Type – 1-Wire Digital Temperature Sensor Sensor IC – DS18B20 (Dallas / Maxim Integrated) Operating Voltage – 3.0V to 5.5V DC Operating Current – ≤ 1.5mA (Active) / 1µA (Standby) Temperature Range – -55°C to +125°C Temperature Accuracy – ±0.5°C (between -10°C and +85°C) Resolution – Configurable 9-bit to 12-bit (0.5°C to 0.0625°C) Default Resolution – 12-bit (0.0625°C steps) Communication Protocol – 1-Wire (Single Data Pin) Unique Device ID – 64-bit Serial Code (Factory Programmed) Onboard Pull-Up Resistor – 4.7kΩ (Included on Adapter Board) Indicator LED – Activity LED (Flashes During Communication) Interface – 3-Pin Header (VCC, DATA, GND) Sensor Package – TO-92 Through-Hole Adapter Board Dimensions – 28 × 12 × 10mm Operating Temperature – -55°C to +125°C Compatible Platforms – Arduino, ESP8266, ESP32, Raspberry Pi, STM32 Handy Tips for Using the DS18B20 Temperature Sensor Kit: 1: The DS18B20 uses the 1-Wire communication protocol — it requires only a single data pin to communicate with your microcontroller, in addition to VCC and GND. The adapter board included in this kit already has the required 4.7kΩ pull-up resistor built in, so no additional components are needed. Simply connect VCC, DATA, and GND to your microcontroller and you are ready to go. 2: Install two libraries in Arduino IDE to get started — the OneWire library by Paul Stoffregen and the DallasTemperature library by Miles Burton . Both are available directly from the Arduino Library Manager. Once installed, reading the temperature takes just a few lines of code using sensors.requestTemperatures() and sensors.getTempCByIndex(0) . 3: One of the most powerful features of the DS18B20 is that each sensor has a unique factory-programmed 64-bit address . This means you can connect multiple DS18B20 sensors to the same single data wire and read each one individually by its address — no additional pins or multiplexers required. This makes it ideal for multi-point temperature monitoring such as aquariums, greenhouses, HVAC systems, and server rooms. 4: The DS18B20 supports configurable resolution from 9-bit (0.5°C steps, ~94ms conversion time) up to 12-bit (0.0625°C steps, ~750ms conversion time). The default is 12-bit for maximum precision. If your project needs faster readings and can tolerate lower resolution, reduce the resolution in code using sensors.setResolution(9) to speed up conversion time significantly. 5: The DS18B20 also supports parasite power mode — where the sensor draws its operating power directly from the data line, eliminating the need for a separate VCC connection. While useful for minimising wiring in remote sensing applications, parasite power can cause instability during temperature conversion at high currents. For reliable operation, always use the standard three-wire connection (VCC, DATA, GND) rather than parasite mode wherever possible.

item.title: 100pcs Diode Set
item.description: 100-Piece Commonly Used Diode Assortment Kit – Technical Specifications: Total Quantity – 100 Pieces Included Types – IN4148, IN4007, IN5819, IN5408 (and others) Package Style – Through-Hole (DO-35 / DO-41) Operating Voltage – ≤ 36V DC IN4148 – Type – Small Signal Switching Diode IN4148 – Voltage – 100V / 200mA IN4007 – Type – General Purpose Rectifier Diode IN4007 – Voltage – 1000V / 1A IN5819 – Type – Schottky Barrier Rectifier Diode IN5819 – Voltage – 40V / 1A IN5408 – Type – General Purpose Rectifier Diode IN5408 – Voltage – 1000V / 3A Packaging – Individually Bagged per Type Handy Tips for Using the 100-Piece Diode Assortment Kit: 1: A diode only allows current to flow in one direction — always check the polarity before inserting it into a circuit. The cathode (negative end) is marked with a stripe band on the diode body. In a circuit diagram, current flows from anode (+) to cathode (–). 2: The IN4148 is a fast-switching signal diode ideal for logic circuits, clipping, and clamping. It is not rated for mains or high-current rectification — use the IN4007 or IN5408 for those applications instead. 3: The IN5819 is a Schottky diode with a very low forward voltage drop (~0.3V), making it the best choice for circuits where power efficiency matters — such as battery-powered projects, reverse polarity protection, and flyback protection on relay coils. 4: When using diodes as rectifiers in power supply circuits, always check the Peak Inverse Voltage (PIV) of your circuit and ensure the diode's rated voltage is comfortably higher than the peak voltage it will experience. 5: The diodes in this kit are through-hole components and are fully compatible with standard 2.54mm pitch breadboards, perfboard, and PCBs. Each type is individually bagged for easy identification and storage.

item.title: Creality PETG Filament Transparent - 1kg
item.description: Creality PETG Filament stands as a versatile and dependable 3D printing material, delivering exceptional performance across a wide spectrum of applications. Crafted from Polyethylene Terephthalate Glycol (PETG), this filament marries the robustness and endurance of ABS with the user-friendly attributes and printability of PLA. Its impressive impact resistance and minimal warping make it an optimal choice for crafting functional prototypes, mechanical components, and finished products. Key Features and Benefits Superior Durability and Strength: Creality PETG filament is renowned for its exceptional impact resistance, making it ideal for creating durable and long-lasting parts. Whether you’re printing mechanical components or functional prototypes, this filament ensures your creations can withstand daily wear and tear. Ease of Printing: This PETG filament boasts a low printing temperature and minimal shrinkage, simplifying the printing process while ensuring consistent, high-quality output. The recommended extrusion temperature ranges from 230-250°C, with a printing speed of 40-60 mm/s, making it compatible with most 3D printers that support PETG filament. Outstanding Layer Adhesion: One of the standout features of Creality PETG filament is its excellent layer adhesion. This ensures that each layer of your print bonds seamlessly with the next, resulting in precise, intricate, and robust prints every time. Impeccable Surface Finish: With Creality PETG filament, you can achieve an impeccable surface finish. The filament’s transparency, along with a diverse array of vibrant colors, bestows a captivating and polished appearance upon your creations. This makes it perfect for both functional and aesthetic applications. Versatility: Whether you’re a seasoned professional or a passionate creator, Creality PETG filament emerges as a reliable choice to breathe life into your 3D printing endeavors. Its adaptability and high performance make it suitable for a variety of projects, from intricate models to large-scale prints. Technical Specifications Material: PETG (Polyethylene Terephthalate Glycol-Modified) Recommended Extrusion Temperature: Typically advised to print within the range of 230-250°C Printing Speed: Generally recommended to maintain a speed of 40-60 mm/s Compatibility: Compatible with most 3D printers that support PETG filament Key Advantages: PETG offers an excellent blend of strength, flexibility, and ease of printing, coupled with outstanding layer adhesion Why Choose Creality PETG Filament? Creality PETG filament is designed to meet the needs of both hobbyists and professionals. Its unique blend of durability, ease of use, and high-quality output ensures that your 3D printing projects reach new heights. Whether you’re creating functional prototypes, mechanical components, or finished products, this filament provides the reliability and performance you need. In conclusion, embrace the dependability, robustness, and adaptability of Creality PETG filament to elevate your 3D printing projects to new heights. Explore the world of 3D printing with Creality and discover how this versatile filament can transform your creative ideas into reality.

item.title: ESP32 - C3 Super Mini Development Board
item.description: Here's the description for the ESP32-C3 Super Mini, clearly differentiated from the larger ESP32 WROOM board: ESP32-C3 Super Mini Development Board – Technical Specifications: Module – ESP32-C3 Super Mini Chip – ESP32-C3 (Espressif Systems) Architecture – 32-bit RISC-V Single-Core Processor CPU Speed – Up to 160MHz SRAM – 400KB Flash Memory – 4MB (Onboard SPI Flash) Wi-Fi – 802.11 b/g/n (2.4GHz) Bluetooth – Bluetooth 5.0 BLE (Low Energy only — no Classic Bluetooth) Total GPIO Pins – 11 Programmable GPIOs Analogue Inputs (ADC) – 4 Channels (12-bit ADC) Communication – SPI, I2C, UART PWM – Available on all GPIO pins Deep Sleep Current – ~43µA (Typical) USB Interface – USB-C (Native USB — No External USB-to-Serial Chip) Operating Voltage – 3.3V (Logic) Input Voltage (USB-C) – 5V Onboard LED – 1 × Blue LED (GPIO8, Inverted) Onboard Buttons – EN (Reset) + BOOT (Flash Mode) Operating Temperature – -40°C to +85°C Dimensions – 37.4 × 22.5mm Compatible IDEs – Arduino IDE, ESP-IDF, MicroPython, ESPHome, PlatformIO ESP32-C3 Super Mini vs ESP32 WROOM-32 — Key Differences: ESP32-C3 Super Mini ESP32 WROOM-32 Architecture RISC-V Single-Core Xtensa Dual-Core CPU Speed 160MHz 240MHz GPIO Pins 11 Usable 30 Usable Bluetooth BLE 5.0 Only BLE 4.2 + Classic Deep Sleep ~43µA ~10mA Size 37.4 × 22.5mm 51 × 28mm Best For Compact, battery-powered IoT Feature-rich, high-performance projects Handy Tips for Using the ESP32-C3 Super Mini: 1: The ESP32-C3 Super Mini uses a RISC-V single-core processor — a different architecture from the dual-core Xtensa processor found in the standard ESP32 WROOM. While it is less powerful in raw processing terms, it is significantly more power efficient , making it the better choice for battery-powered and always-on IoT applications where deep sleep current matters. 2: This board uses native USB — there is no separate USB-to-serial chip (like CH340 or CP2102). The ESP32-C3 handles USB communication directly. On first use, you may need to enable "USB CDC on Boot" in Arduino IDE under Tools → USB CDC on Boot → Enabled to ensure the serial monitor works correctly after a reset. Without this enabled, the serial port may disappear after the board restarts. 3: To enter flash/bootloader mode manually — hold the BOOT button , press and release the EN (Reset) button , then release BOOT. The board will enter download mode and Arduino IDE can then upload your sketch. If your board has not been programmed before, it will typically enter bootloader mode automatically when plugged in via USB. 4: The onboard blue LED on GPIO8 is inverted — it turns ON when GPIO8 is set LOW and turns OFF when set HIGH. This is the opposite of most other development boards. Account for this in your code: digitalWrite(8, LOW) turns the LED on, and digitalWrite(8, HIGH) turns it off. GPIO8 is also a strapping pin — avoid connecting external pull-down resistors to it as this can prevent the board from booting correctly. 5: GPIO pins 4 through 7 are reserved for JTAG debugging and should be used with caution in general projects. Additionally, GPIO2 is a strapping pin used to enter bootloader mode — avoid using it as a general output with external pull-down circuits. For safe general-purpose use, stick to GPIO0–1, GPIO3, GPIO8–GPIO10, and GPIO18–GPIO21 for the most reliable operation.

item.title: TP4056 5V 1A 18650 Lithium Battery Charging Board - USB C
item.description: Here's the description for the TP4056: TP4056 1A Lithium Battery Charging Module – Technical Specifications: Module Type – Single-Cell Li-Ion / Li-Po Battery Charger Charging IC – TP4056 Protection IC – DW01A (Overcharge, Over-Discharge, Overcurrent, Short Circuit) Input Voltage – 4.5V to 5.5V DC (Typically 5V via USB) Input Connector – Micro-USB Charging Voltage – 4.2V (±1%) Charging Current – 1A (Max) Standby Current – ≤ 2µA Charging Cutoff Current – 130mA Battery Connector – Solder Pads (B+ / B-) Output Connector – Solder Pads (OUT+ / OUT-) Indicator LEDs – Red = Charging / Blue or Green = Charge Complete Operating Temperature – 0°C to +85°C Dimensions – 25 × 19mm Weight – ±3g Compatible Batteries – Single Cell 3.7V Li-Ion / Li-Po (Max 4.2V) Handy Tips for Using the TP4056 1A Lithium Battery Charging Module: 1: This module has three sets of connections — the Micro-USB input (5V power in), the B+/B- pads (battery connection), and the OUT+/OUT- pads (regulated output to your circuit). Always connect your battery to B+/B- and power your project from OUT+/OUT- — never connect your project directly to the battery pads, as the protection circuit is only active on the OUT pads. 2: The onboard DW01A protection IC safeguards your battery against four critical failure modes: overcharging (above 4.2V), over-discharging (below ~2.4V), overcurrent (excessive load), and short circuit. This makes the module safe for use with bare Li-Po and Li-Ion cells that do not have their own internal protection circuit. 3: The charging current is set at 1A by default via a 1.2kΩ resistor (R3) on the board. If your battery capacity is less than 1000mAh, you should reduce the charge current — a general rule is to charge at no more than 1C (1× the battery capacity in amps). For example, a 500mAh battery should be charged at no more than 500mA. Replace R3 with a higher value resistor to reduce the current: 2kΩ = 580mA, 3kΩ = 400mA, 10kΩ = 130mA. 4: The LED indicators tell you the charging status at a glance — a solid Red LED means the battery is actively charging, and a solid Blue or Green LED means charging is complete and the battery is at 4.2V. If both LEDs flash or neither lights up, check that your input voltage is stable and within the 4.5V–5.5V range. 5: This module charges one single cell (3.7V nominal) Li-Ion or Li-Po battery only — it is not suitable for charging multiple cells in series, NiMH, NiCd, or LiFePO4 batteries. The fixed 4.2V charge voltage is incompatible with LiFePO4 cells, which require 3.6V, and using it to charge them will cause damage or fire risk.

item.title: DC Voltage Regulator Step-Down Module 3A 5V/12V/24V to 3.3V Fixed Output
item.description: DC Voltage Regulator Step-Down Module – 3A Fixed 3.3V Output – Technical Specifications: Module Type – DC-DC Buck (Step-Down) Voltage Regulator Input Voltage Range – 4.8V to 24V DC Output Voltage – 3.3V Fixed Output Current – 3A Continuous Output Power (Max) – ~10W Minimum Input/Output Difference – 1.5V (Input must be at least 4.8V for stable 3.3V output) Conversion Efficiency – Up to 96% Output Ripple – ≤ 30mV (at full load) Switching Frequency – 380kHz (Typical) Protection Features – Overcurrent / Overtemperature / Short Circuit Input Capacitor – Onboard Output Capacitor – Onboard Interface – Screw Terminal or Solder Pad (IN+, IN-, OUT+, OUT-) Operating Temperature – -40°C to +85°C Dimensions – 43 × 21 × 14mm (approx.) Weight – ±8g Common Use Cases: Input Voltage Application 5V → 3.3V Powering 3.3V microcontrollers and modules from a USB power bank or 5V supply 12V → 3.3V Powering ESP8266 / ESP32 / sensors directly from a 12V system or car supply 24V → 3.3V Industrial panel or solar system stepping down to logic-level supply voltage Handy Tips for Using the DC 3.3V Fixed Step-Down Module: 1: This module outputs a fixed 3.3V — the output voltage cannot be adjusted. It is specifically designed to supply 3.3V logic-level microcontrollers and modules such as the ESP8266, ESP32, STM32, and associated sensors and peripherals. Unlike an LDO linear regulator, this buck converter steps down voltage with very high efficiency, generating far less heat and wasting far less power in the process. 2: The input voltage must be at least 1.5V higher than the output at all times — meaning a minimum input of approximately 4.8V is required for a stable 3.3V output. A 5V USB supply will work but is right at the margin; a 6V or higher input is recommended for reliable operation. The module supports inputs up to 24V , making it suitable for 6V, 9V, 12V, and 24V supply rails. 3: The module is rated for 3A continuous output current . For loads approaching 3A, ensure adequate airflow around the module as it will generate heat at high current. For sustained loads above 2A, attaching a small heatsink to the main regulator IC is recommended to ensure long-term reliability and prevent thermal shutdown. 4: This is a switching regulator , which means it produces a small amount of high-frequency electrical noise on the output — this is normal and unavoidable. The onboard capacitors reduce this ripple to ≤30mV under load. For noise-sensitive applications such as RF modules, audio circuits, or precision ADC readings, add an additional 100µF electrolytic capacitor and a 100nF ceramic capacitor across the output terminals close to the sensitive load. 5: When wiring the module, always double-check input polarity before applying power — connecting the input in reverse will damage the module. Connect IN+ to your positive supply rail and IN- to ground, then connect OUT+ and OUT- to your load. If your board does not include reverse polarity protection, add a series Schottky diode (such as an IN5819) on the input line as a low-cost safeguard.

item.title: Brother MFC-T930DW Ink Tank Printer
item.description: Designed for Business. Building a Better Workspace, Effortless Productivity Boost your productivity with the Brother InkBenefit Tank Series MFC-T930DW, a powerful all-in-one colour InkTank printer designed for seamless printing, copying, scanning, and faxing. This efficient machine delivers high-quality prints at speeds of up to 30 pages per minute (black) and 26 pages per minute (colour) in Eco mode, with ISO/IEC 24734 speeds of 17 ipm (black) and 16 ipm (colour). The intuitive 4.5cm colour LCD and user-friendly control panel make operation effortless. Equipped with a 150-sheet paper tray, an 80-sheet multipurpose tray, and a 20-page automatic document feeder, this printer is built for efficiency. Stay connected with multiple web applications, ensuring easy access to your online documents. Print and scan directly from your mobile device using the Brother Mobile Connect app. The MFC-T930DW offers versatile connectivity options, Wi-Fi, Ethernet, high-speed USB 2.0, and direct USB flash drive printing. The redesigned ink refill system features spill-proof nozzles for quick and mess-free refilling, ensuring the correct ink bottle is inserted every time. The printer includes two high-yield black ink bottles, delivering up to 15,000 pages, along with cyan, magenta, and yellow ink bottles capable of printing up to 5,000 colour pages. With its advanced features and reliable performance, the Brother InkBenefit Tank MFC-T930DW is the perfect all-in-one solution for your home or office needs. Key Features Print, Copy, Scan Wireless connectivity Print speeds of up to 17/16.5 ipm (ISO) 150 Sheet paper input 20 Sheet ADF Mobile and email print capable iPrint&Scan for Desktop and Mobile Free 3-year/50,000 Page Carry-in Warranty What's in the box The MFC-T930DW Ink Tank Printer 3-in-1 ships with the following: 2X 7,500 Page black ink bottles, 1X 5,000 Pg/CMY colour ink bottles ea Power supply cord and USB cable Full Driver & Software Package on support.brother.com Quick Set-Up Guide

Designed for efficiency, this printer delivers fast speeds of up to 30 pages per minute (black) and 26 pages per minute (colour) in Eco mode, with SO/IEC 24734 speeds of 17 ipm (black) and 16 ipm (colour). item.title: 6010 Axial Fan 24v
item.description: Motherboard cooling fan for Creality KE 3D Printers

item.title: 24V 4010 AXIAL FAN
item.description: It’s no surprise that the Ender 3 3D Printer has changed the name of the game in desktop 3D printers, with an incredibly low price despite the high quality components and plethora of features that it offers. However, even these machines can experience minor problems and faults, and this is especially so for mechanical parts like cooling fans and other moving bits and pieces. Fortunately, we’ve got you covered with a range of spares like these 4024 Axial Fans for Ender 3 printers. These fans are designed to exact same specification as the fans that come installed on Ender 3 printers, with a 24V compatibility and compact size to accommodate the unique spec’s of the Ender 3 compared to other Creality 3D Printers . This ensures that you experience as little downtime as possible, and that you don’t have to call for professional assistance or waste hours trying to get the fan to work. Instead, the clever design means you can simply remove the previous fan, self-solder the new leads using provided heatshrink self-solder joiners, and mount the new fan. You will get back to your 3D Printing fun as quickly and seamlessly as possible. 24V 4010 AXIAL FAN – TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS: Fan Type – Axial Fan Operating Voltage – 24V DC Operating Current – 0.1A Dimensions – 40 x 40 x 10mm TYPICAL APPLICATIONS FOR THESE 24V 4010 AXIAL FANS: These 4010 Axial Fans are designed and stocked specifically for the Ender 3 and CR-20, and have been designed with the 24V supply in mind to accommodate the unique voltages that the Ender 3 utilises. This, however, means that it may not be compatible with the rest of Creality’s 3D Printer Range.

item.title: 4010 Hotend Blower Fan 24V
item.description: A simple but powerful 24V 4010 Blower Fan for Creality Ender 3 and CR-20 3D printers, to prevent warping, sagging and other distortions. 3D Printing is complicated, but can be so rewarding when you finally get the right settings and start enjoying the results that you’ve been working towards. However, even the slightest deformations can mean wasted time and Filament, as some parts need to be printed to perfect dimensions in order to achieve their desired purpose. This is why we stock Spare Parts like the 4010 24V Blower Fan for the Ender 3 and CR-20 3D printers, which cools down printed parts in order to avoid sagging by speeding up the solidification process and ensuring that it hardens in just the right way. This fan helps to improve overall printing quality by ensuring that the results of your printing are accurate to your original design, without any strange distortions that could cause the parts to be the wrong size, often rendering them useless – or relegating them to the “Shelf of Fancy Paper Weights”. 24V 4010 BLOWER FAN – TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS: Fan Type – Brushless Blower Fan Bearing Type – Oil Bearing Operating Voltage – 24V DC Operating Current – 0.1A Dimensions – 40 x 40 x 10mm TYPICAL APPLICATIONS FOR THESE 4010 24V BLOWER FANS: This 4010 24V Blower Fan has been designed and stocked specifically for the Ender 3 and CR-20 printers, and is 24V to accommodate the unique 24V supplies of these controller boards. It features all of the necessary wiring and mounting hole configurations that the Ender 3 and CR-20 use, and are specially designed to fit on the side of the Hotend Assembly to direct effective airflow onto the prints below the nozzle.

item.title: CR Falcon A1 Laser Engraver 10W Enclosed with Air Assist
item.description: The Creality Falcon A1 Laser Engraver is a compact, high-speed CoreXY diode laser engraver with smart camera integration, auto material recognition, and a fully enclosed safety design. It’s built for both beginners and professionals, offering precision, ease of use, and support for hundreds of materials. Key Features Smart Camera System – full-frame HD camera with real-time preview, auto positioning, batch filling, and contour tracing Auto Material Recognition – built-in QR code system automatically detects materials and adjusts settings High Precision Laser – ultra-fine 0.06 × 0.08 mm compressed spot for sharp, lifelike engraving details 10W Dual-Beam Laser – powerful cutting performance across wood, acrylic, leather, plastics, and more CoreXY Motion System – speeds up to 600 mm/s , 3× faster than conventional engravers Auto Belt Tensioning – ensures slip-free, stable movement with precision up to 0.01 mm No Assembly Required – pre-assembled, plug-and-play setup with starter material kit included Compact Design – space-efficient footprint (447.5 × 553 × 200 mm), weighing only 20 lbs (≈9 kg) Safety Features – Class 1 laser safety, lid-open stop, emergency stop button, enclosed cover with eye protection, and smoke extraction fans Easy-to-Use Software – Falcon Design Space with editing tools, plus compatibility with LightBurn and LaserGRBL Specifications Machine Power (Max): 120W Optical Power: 10W (dual-beam diode laser) Engraving Area: 305 × 381 mm Operating Temperature: 5°C – 35°C Laser Source: Diode Laser Laser Spot Size: 0.06 × 0.08 mm Laser Wavelength: 455 ± 15 nm Laser Class: Class 1 (FDA certified) Software Compatibility: LightBurn, LaserGRBL, Falcon Design Space Operating Systems: Windows, MacOS Supported File Formats: JPEG, JPG, PNG, BMP, SVG, DXF, etc. Supported Materials: Cardboard, wood, bamboo, rubber, leather, fabric, acrylic, plastic, glass, PU, jewelry, and more Product Size: 567 × 468 × 196 mm Equipment Weight: 15.55 kg Input Voltage: 100–240V ~ 50/60Hz Output Voltage: DC 24V 5A Certifications: EC60825, FDA, CE, ROHS, FCC, UL, PSE, SAA, RCM Package Size: 770 × 645 × 285 mm Gross Weight: 25.74 kg What’s in the Box Creality Falcon A1 main unit Exhaust pipe & hose clamp Air assist equipment & silicone tube Power supply Basswood test sheet (300 × 300 × 3 mm) Calibration card Rotary kit connection cable Fixed focus block Type-A to Type-C cable Anti-static brush Allen wrench User documentation Highlights Beginner-Friendly: Plug-and-play setup with auto material detection and starter kit Professional Performance: High-speed CoreXY system with precision up to 0.01 mm Safe for Home Use: Enclosed design, eye-protection cover, smoke extraction, and emergency stop Versatile Applications: Engraves and cuts hundreds of materials, suitable for crafts, signage, jewelry, packaging, and more The Creality Falcon A1 Laser Engraver is a compact, high-speed, and safe diode laser engraver with smart automation features. It’s ideal for hobbyists, small businesses, and professionals who need precision engraving and cutting across a wide range of materials.

item.title: DXC Extruder for K1 series printers
item.description: The Phaetus DXC Extruder is a high-performance direct-drive extruder engineered for precision filament control and seamless integration with Creality K1 series printers. Designed with a patented spiral gear system and dual synchronized drive wheels, the DXC delivers consistent extrusion, reduced filament wear, and enhanced material compatibility. Its adaptive compression mechanism and open-frame cooling architecture make it ideal for multi-material setups and high-temperature printing environments. Whether you're upgrading a Prusa i3 clone or customizing a Creality K1, the DXC offers plug-and-play simplicity with industrial-grade durability—perfect for makers demanding reliability and finesse. Key Advantages 60% less filament abrasion thanks to spiral gear engagement No slipping or skipping with dual synchronized drive wheels Plug-and-play installation for Creality K1 series Efficient heat management for high-temp materials Auto-adaptive pressure for flexible filament handling Product Name: Phaetus DXC Extruder Model: DXC Extruder Compatible Printers: Creality K1, K1 Max, K1C, K1 SE Drive System: Dual Gear (Spiral Tooth Design) Gear Coating: RNC Hard Coating (HV3300) Filament Diameter: 1.75 mm Material Compatibility: PLA, ABS, PETG, TPU, Nylon, PC, Carbon Fiber blends Compression Mechanism: Adaptive Spring Suspension Cooling Architecture: Open-frame design for efficient air circulation Sensor Integration: Built-in Filament Runout Detection Mounting Interface: Direct-fit for K1 series; modifiable for Prusa-style frames Firmware Requirement: Optional update for filament sensor support Weight: Approximately 120 g Dimensions: Approximately 45 × 45 × 50 mm

item.title: SA Filament Tri Color Silk PLA+ 750g (1.75mm) Velvet Twilight (Royal Blue & Merlot & Indigo Purple)
item.description: Elevate your 3D printing projects with SA Filament Tri Silk PLA+ Velvet Twilight , crafted to deliver silky-smooth, luxurious prints with a mesmerizing three-tone colour effect. This premium filament weaves together three complementary silk shades in a single strand, producing vibrant, dynamic colour transitions that shift with light and perspective—ideal for artistic creations, standout decorative pieces, and striking prototypes. Key Features: Tri-Colour Silk Finish: Achieve glossy, high-impact prints with seamless transitions that add depth and a refined look to every design. Exclusive Colour Blends: Each spool features a carefully balanced tri-colour mix, engineered for fluid transitions—giving your prints a polished, professional finish without painting or extra post-processing. Enhanced Printability: Unlike standard silk filaments that often struggle with adhesion or speed, our Tri Silk PLA+ Northern Lights prints smoothly at regular PLA settings, merging visual brilliance with reliability. Precision Engineering: Manufactured to a strict 1.75mm ± 0.05mm tolerance for consistent extrusion, smooth feeding, and reduced risk of print failures. Technical Specs: Print Temp: 200 – 230°C (depending on printer) Heat Bed: 0 – 60°C Cooling/Fan: 100% Spool Size: Ø200mm | Hub 58mm | Width 55mm Packaging: Vacuum-sealed and boxed for lasting freshness Experience the magic of three-tone silk elegance with SA Filament Tri Silk PLA+ Northern Lights — where premium performance meets breathtaking visual impact.

item.title: Brother DCP-T430W Ink Tank Printer
item.description: Designed for Hassle-Free Printing at Home The Brother InkBenefit Tank Series DCP-T430W 3-in-1 Colour InkTank Printer with Wireless Connectivity offers efficient, low-cost printing, making it a perfect choice for home use due to its compact design. It prints at impressive speeds of up to 27 pages per minute in black and 11 pages per minute in color in Eco mode, with ISO/IEC 24734 speeds of 16 ipm for black and 9 ipm for color. The easy-to-use control panel provides access to essential functions, including a button for selecting paper sizes for printing or copying. Boost productivity with the 150-sheet paper tray and a 1-sheet manual feed slot, accommodating a variety of paper sizes such as envelopes and photos. The printer offers wireless (2.4 GHz) and USB 2.0 connectivity for seamless connections with your devices. Additionally, you can print and scan directly from your mobile device using the Brother Mobile Connect app. The InkBenefit Tank DCP-T430W features redesigned ink bottles with a spill-proof nozzle for quick and hassle-free refilling, with clear guidance on correct bottle insertion. The printer includes high-yield ink bottles, capable of printing up to 7,500 pages in black and 5,000 pages in colour. Basic Specs Functions Print, Scan, Copy Printer Type InkTank Printer Product Dimensions (Width X Depth X Height) 390 mm × 343 mm × 148.5 mm Weight 6.3 kg Print Speed Up to 16.0/9.0 ipm Paper Type Plain paper Inkjet, Glossy(cast/resin), Recycled Paper Size A4, Letter, Executive, A5, A6, Photo 10x15 cm, Indexcard 13x20 cm, C5 Envelope, COM-10, DL Envelope, Photo 10x15 cm, Photo 9x13 cm, Photo 13x18 cm Maximum Paper Capacity Up to 150 sheets Warranty 5 Year or 30k pages Carry-in Warranty What's in The Box 1 x 7,500 Page black ink bottles, 5,000 Pg/CMY colour ink bottlesPower supply cord and USB cableFull Driver & Software Package on support.brother.comFree 5-year*/30,000 Page Carry-in Warranty

item.title: SA Filament PETG Speed (1.75mm) Blue
item.description: SA Filament PETG Speed – High-Speed Commercial Printing Made Easy! Ready to take your prints to the next level? SA Filament PETG Speed is designed for effortless high-speed printing—delivering the strength and durability of PETG while printing as easily as PLA, at speeds of up to 500mm/s! Key Advantages of SA Filament PETG Speed: Blazing Fast Printing Speeds Specially engineered for smooth, high-speed printing at up to 500mm/s without sacrificing print quality. Increased productivity and reduced print times while maintaining precision. Superior Strength and Durability Tougher than PLA, making it ideal for functional and mechanical parts. High impact resistance ensures long-lasting performance. Exceptional Print Quality Delivers ultra-smooth surfaces with reduced layer lines for professional-looking results. Excellent clarity and gloss, perfect for high-quality prints. Higher Heat Resistance Withstands higher temperatures than PLA, making it suitable for applications requiring heat resilience. Improved Bed Adhesion & Reduced Warping Strong first-layer adhesion prevents warping, ensuring reliable, hassle-free printing. Reduced shrinkage means dimensionally accurate prints every time. Increased Layer Adhesion Stronger interlayer bonding results in durable, impact-resistant prints that can handle stress and load. Easy to Print Prints effortlessly with minimal stringing and oozing, even at high speeds. Whether you need strength, speed, or stunning print quality, SA Filament PETG Speed is your go-to choice for high-performance 3D printing! Push the limits of your 3D printer – print faster, stronger, and better with SA Filament PETG Speed! Difficulty printing Heat resistance UV resistance Impact resistance Biodegradability Printing Speed ★★★★★ ★★★☆☆ ★★★★★ ★★★★☆ ★☆☆☆☆ ​ ★★★★★ Print Temperature: 225 – 255°C, dependent on printer model Heat Bed temperature: 60 – 80°C​ Fan speed / Cooling: 100% Printing Speed: 200 - 500mm/s 1Kg net weight - 340m per roll​

item.title: Solderless Breadboard - 830 points - full size
item.description: Here's the description for the 830-point breadboard, consistent with your existing style: Solderless Breadboard – 830 Points – Technical Specifications: Total Tie Points – 830 Terminal Strip – 2 × 63 Rows, 5 Holes per Row (A–E and F–J) Power Rails – 4 × Bus Strips (2 per Side, Positive & Negative) Hole Pitch – 2.54mm (Standard 0.1" / 100mil) Compatible Wire Gauge – 0.4mm to 0.9mm (26AWG to 20AWG) Contact Material – Nickel-Plated Phosphor Bronze Body Material – ABS Plastic (Flame Retardant) Colour – White Dimensions – 165 × 55 × 9mm (approx.) Weight – ±90g Handy Tips for Using the 830-Point Solderless Breadboard: 1: The board is split into two halves (A–E and F–J). Each row of 5 holes is connected internally side-by-side, but the two halves are not connected across the centre divider — this gap is precisely sized to seat DIP ICs and chips without bridging the two halves, giving each pin its own isolated row. 2: The 830-point board features four power rails — two on each side of the board (top and bottom). Unlike the 400-point board, the power rails on the 830-point board are often split in the middle and not continuous along the full length. Check your specific board and bridge the gap with a short jumper wire if you need a continuous rail along the full length. 3: This 830-point board is the full-size standard for prototyping — large enough to comfortably accommodate an Arduino Uno or Nano, multiple ICs, and supporting passive components all on one board simultaneously. It is the recommended size for beginners and intermediate projects alike. 4: Insert and remove components gently and straight. Forcing bent leads into the holes at an angle can deform the internal spring contacts over time, leading to intermittent connections that are difficult to diagnose. Always straighten component leads before inserting them. 5: This breadboard is designed for through-hole components only with standard 2.54mm pitch leads — resistors, capacitors, LEDs, DIP ICs, jumper wires, transistors, and similar parts. It does not support surface-mount (SMD) components. Multiple 830-point boards can be clipped together side-by-side using the interlocking tabs on the casing for even larger builds.

item.title: DHT22/AM2302 Digital Temperature and Humidity Sensor Module
item.description: DHT22 / AM2302 Digital Temperature and Humidity Sensor Module – Technical Specifications: Sensor Type – Capacitive Digital Temperature & Humidity Sensor Model – DHT22 / AM2302 (Identical Specification) Operating Voltage – 3.3V to 5.5V DC Operating Current – 1.5mA (Measuring) / 40µA (Standby) Temperature Range – -40°C to +80°C Temperature Accuracy – ±0.5°C Temperature Resolution – 0.1°C Humidity Range – 0% to 100% RH Humidity Accuracy – ±2% RH Humidity Resolution – 0.1% RH Output Type – Single-Wire Digital Serial (1-Wire) Minimum Sampling Interval – 2 Seconds Interface – 3-Pin Header (VCC, DATA, GND) Dimensions – 25 × 15 × 8mm (approx.) Weight – ±4g Compatible Platforms – Arduino, ESP8266, ESP32, Raspberry Pi, STM32 DHT22 vs DHT11 — Key Differences: DHT22 / AM2302 DHT11 Temperature Range -40°C to +80°C 0°C to +50°C Temperature Accuracy ±0.5°C ±2°C Humidity Range 0–100% RH 20–90% RH Humidity Accuracy ±2% RH ±5% RH Resolution 0.1°C / 0.1% RH 1°C / 1% RH Sampling Interval 2 Seconds 2 Seconds Best For Precision & wide range Budget & basic projects Handy Tips for Using the DHT22 / AM2302 Sensor Module: 1: The DHT22 and AM2302 are electrically identical — the AM2302 is simply the wired, non-module version of the same sensor in a larger housing with leads attached. Both use the same code, libraries, and wiring. The module version (DHT22) typically includes an onboard pull-up resistor on the data line, making it easier to use directly without additional components. 2: Use the DHT sensor library by Adafruit in Arduino IDE for the quickest setup. Install it via the Library Manager, then initialise the sensor with DHT dht(PIN, DHT22); — make sure to specify DHT22 and not DHT11, as they use different communication protocols and the wrong selection will return incorrect readings. The same library supports both sensor types. 3: The DHT22 has a mandatory minimum sampling interval of 2 seconds between readings — reading it faster than this will return the previously cached value rather than a fresh measurement. In your code always include a delay(2000) or use a non-blocking timer to ensure at least 2 seconds pass between each call to dht.readTemperature() and dht.readHumidity() . 4: Always validate your readings before using them in your project — the DHT22 can occasionally return NaN (Not a Number) due to timing issues on the single-wire interface. Add a check in your code: if (isnan(temperature) || isnan(humidity)) and skip or retry the reading if either value is invalid. This is especially important in fast-running loops. 5: The DHT22 is significantly more capable than the DHT11 — with a wider temperature range of -40°C to +80°C , ten times better resolution (0.1° vs 1°), and far greater accuracy (±0.5°C vs ±2°C). It is the recommended choice for any project where measurement precision matters, outdoor sensing is required, or temperatures below 0°C may be encountered.

item.title: SA Filament Dual Silk PLA 750g (1.75mm) Mystic Forest - Dark Green & Indigo Purple
item.description: SA Filament Dual Silk PLA+ Mystic Forest Filament Elevate your 3D printing projects with SA Filament Dual Silk PLA+ Mystic Forest Filament, which is meticulously crafted to deliver stunning, silky-smooth prints with a mesmerizing dual-colour effect. This innovative filament combines two harmonious silk tones within a single strand, producing captivating, colour-shifting visuals that change with the light and viewing angle—ideal for artistic creations, decorative items, and standout prototypes. Key Features: Dual-Colour Silk Finish: Achieve eye-catching, glossy prints with dynamic colour transitions that enhance the aesthetic appeal of your models. Enhanced Material Properties: Formulated with improved heat deflection temperature and increased impact strength, this filament offers greater durability compared to standard PLA. Optimized Printing Performance: Unlike traditional silk PLA’s that may suffer from poor layer adhesion and require slower print speeds, SA Filament’s unique formulation allows for reliable printing at standard PLA temperatures and speeds, ensuring a smooth printing experience without compromising quality. Precision Manufacturing: Produced with an accurate diameter of 1.75mm ± 0.05mm, ensuring consistent extrusion and reducing the risk of jams or clogs. Technical Specifications: Print Temperature: 200 – 230°C (dependent on printer model) Heat Bed Temperature: 0 – 60°C Fan Speed/Cooling: 100% Spool Dimensions: Diameter 200mm, inner hub 58mm, width 55mm Packaging: Vacuum-sealed and packaged in a sturdy cardboard box to maintain filament quality and longevity Experience the perfect fusion of beauty and functionality with SA Filament Dual Silk PLA+ Mystic Forest Filament – where your creative visions are brought to life with unparalleled elegance and strength.

Quick Connection to CFS: Enabling auto RFID filament recognition, auto filament switch & relay, etc. Tips: Please update the firmware (Creality OS) with the included USB drive upon the upgrade. For subsequent updates, you can use the OTA function. While using CFS, the print size of K1, K1C and K1 SE changes to 220 × 215 × 250 mm, and the print size for K1 Max changes to 300 × 295 × 300 mm. The print size stays unchanged if you use the stock spool holder. Note: When upgrading to multicolour printing, the USB port remains functional but will be occupied during the process. Additionally, the PTFE tube must be fed into the printer vertically, which prevents the top cover from fully closing. Improper alignment may lead to tube friction or feeding issues. Features - 4 Filament Auto Dispenser: 4 Filament Slots with status indicators Multicolor 3D Printing Auto Filament Relay (Switches Filament Automatically if spool depletes) RFID-tag Reader Filament Run-out Detection Filament Buffer Not compatible with TPU, damp filament or other flexible filaments

Key Features 14K Ultra-High Resolution – 13320 × 5120 pixels with 16.8 × 24.8 μm pixel size for unmatched detail Large Build Volume – 223 × 126 × 230 mm, ideal for bigger projects or batch printing DynaX+ Ultra-Fast Mode – printing speeds up to 150 mm/h for rapid production Integral Light Source 3.0 – strong, uniform UV light ensures consistent curing across the entire screen Dual Linear Rails + Closed-Loop Motor – reduces wobble and improves accuracy on tall or heavy prints Smart Air Purifier – built-in activated carbon filter minimizes resin odor and fumes Professional-Grade Precision – perfect for jewelry, miniatures, dental models, and high-detail prototypes User-Friendly Workflow – intuitive operation with Creality’s HALOT OS and wide slicing software compatibility Specifications Printing Technology: MSLA (Masked Stereolithography) Build Volume: 223 × 126 × 230 mm Printing Speed: Up to 150 mm/h (DynaX+ mode) LCD Screen: 10.1” monochrome LCD Resolution: 14K (13320 × 5120) Pixel Size: 16.8 × 24.8 μm Light Source: Integral Light Source 3.0 Light Uniformity: >90% Z-Axis System: Dual linear rails + closed-loop motor Air Purifier: Built-in activated carbon filter Connectivity: USB, LAN, WiFi, Creality Cloud Slicing Software: HALOT BOX, CHITUBOX, Lychee Slicer, Voxeldance Tango File Formats: STL / OBJ Operating Systems: Windows / Mac Product Dimensions: ~333 × 270 × 608 mm Highlights Exquisite detail with 14K resolution for lifelike textures and organic shapes High-speed printing with DynaX+ mode for faster turnaround Stable performance thanks to dual rails and closed-loop motor Odor-free workspace with advanced air purification system Versatile applications for jewelry, miniatures, dental models, and professional prototyping The Creality Halot Mage S 14K is a premium resin printer that combines ultra-high resolution, large build volume, and ultra-fast speeds . It’s best suited for professionals and advanced makers

A single short press will switch between these. 2 : The onboard display can be turned off if necessary by pressing and holding the button down for two seconds before releasing. After this, the display can be turned back on with a single short press of the button. 3 : Although this module is capable of up to 3A and 20W, if you are using it for more than 2A or 15W then you will need to equip it with a heatsink to keep the regulator chip cool. 4 : This module can be calibrated, and it’s recommended to calibrate it with a constant voltage supply and a multimeter when first acquiring it. 4.1 : To enter calibration mode, press and hold the button down for four seconds before releasing it. This will take you to INPUT calibration mode, and the “IN” LED will turn on. 4.2 : From the INPUT calibration mode, once again press and hold the button down for four seconds before releasing. This will take you to OUTPUT calibration mode, and the “OUT” LED will turn on. 4.3 : In either of these calibration modes, a single short press is used to adjust the settings. 4.4 : Once you are done calibrating INPUT and OUTPUT, press and hold the button for four seconds before

item.title: 10pcs 4N35 Optocoupler
item.description: 4N35 Optocouplers provides reliable electrical isolation between input and output circuits. Each optocoupler consists of a gallium arsenide infrared emitting diode optically coupled to a silicon phototransistor, housed in a standard 6-pin DIP package. Ideal for general-purpose applications, they offer a high current transfer ratio and are commonly used in power supply regulation, digital logic isolation, and noise reduction circuits.

item.title: SA Filament Dual Silk PLA 750g (1.75mm) Blue Blood
item.description: SA Filament Dual Silk PLA Blue Blood Filament Elevate your 3D printing projects with SA Filament Dual Silk PLA Blue Blood Filament, which is meticulously crafted to deliver stunning, silky-smooth prints with a mesmerizing dual-color effect. This innovative filament combines two harmonious silk tones within a single strand, producing captivating, colour-shifting visuals that change with the light and viewing angle—ideal for artistic creations, decorative items, and standout prototypes. Key Features: Dual-Color Silk Finish: Achieve eye-catching, glossy prints with dynamic color transitions that enhance the aesthetic appeal of your models. Enhanced Material Properties: Formulated with improved heat deflection temperature and increased impact strength, this filament offers greater durability compared to standard PLA . Optimized Printing Performance: Unlike traditional silk PLAs that may suffer from poor layer adhesion and require slower print speeds, SA Filament’s unique formulation allows for reliable printing at standard PLA temperatures and speeds, ensuring a smooth printing experience without compromising quality. Precision Manufacturing: Produced with an accurate diameter of 1.75mm ± 0.05mm, ensuring consistent extrusion and reducing the risk of jams or clogs. Technical Specifications: Print Temperature: 200 – 230°C (dependent on printer model) Heat Bed Temperature: 0 – 60°C Fan Speed/Cooling: 100% Spool Dimensions: Diameter 200mm, inner hub 58mm, width 55mm Packaging: Vacuum-sealed and packaged in a sturdy cardboard box to maintain filament quality and longevity Experience the perfect fusion of beauty and functionality with SA Filament Dual Silk PLA Blue Blood Filament – where your creative visions are brought to life with unparalleled elegance and strength.

item.title: Solderless Breadboard - 400 points - half size
item.description: Breadboard 400 Points – Technical Specifications: Tie Points – 400 Bus Strips – 2 × Power Rails (Positive & Negative) Terminal Strip Rows – 30 Rows × 5 Holes per Row (each side) Hole Spacing – 2.54mm (Standard 0.1" / 100mil pitch) Compatible Wire Gauge – 0.4mm to 0.9mm (26AWG to 20AWG) Contact Material – Nickel-Plated Phosphor Bronze Body Material – ABS Plastic (Flame Retardant) Colour – White Dimensions – 85 x 55 x 9mm Weight – ±40g Handy Tips for Using the 400-Point Breadboard: 1: The breadboard is divided into two halves (A–E and F–J). Each row of 5 holes is internally connected horizontally, but the two halves are not connected to each other across the centre gap — this gap is designed to straddle DIP ICs. 2: The two power rails (red = positive, blue = negative) run vertically along each side of the board. These are internally connected along their full length and are used to distribute your supply voltage and ground to your circuit. 3: This 400-point board is ideal for small to medium circuits. If your project needs more space, multiple breadboards can be snapped together side-by-side using the interlocking tabs built into the casing. 4: Always insert and remove components gently and straight — forcing angled components into the holes can damage or loosen the internal metal contacts over time, causing unreliable connections. 5: This breadboard does not support surface-mount (SMD) components. It is designed for through-hole components with standard 2.54mm pitch leads (e.g., resistors, LEDs, ICs, capacitors, jumper wires).

item.title: Creality Halot-R6 Resin 3D Printer
item.description: Creality Halot R6 Resin 3D Printer The Halot R6 is Creality’s entry-level resin 3D printer, designed to be compact, affordable, and user-friendly. Despite its budget-friendly positioning, it packs impressive features that make it suitable for beginners, hobbyists, and anyone looking to add a reliable resin printer to their workshop. Key Features Compact Design – small footprint, perfect for desktops and workshops 2K Monochrome LCD – 6.08” screen provides crisp detail and faster curing times compared to RGB LCDs Beginner-Friendly – simple setup and intuitive operation for newcomers to resin printing Affordable Entry Point – budget resin printer with professional-grade results WiFi & USB Connectivity – supports remote printing and easy file transfer Compatible with 405nm Resins – wide material support for standard resin types Lightweight Build – only 4.25 kg, easy to move and store Halot Box Software Included – Creality’s slicing solution optimized for Halot printers, with support for Chitubox Specifications Printing Technology: UV Curing (MSLA) Build Volume: 130 × 82 × 160 mm LCD Screen: 6.08” monochrome LCD LCD Resolution: 2K Connection Modes: USB, WiFi Slicing Software: Halot Box (included), Chitubox Power Input: 200–240V AC, 50/60Hz Compatible Resins: 405 nm photosensitive resins Machine Weight: 4.25 kg Machine Size: 235 × 230 × 395 mm Highlights Perfect for Beginners: Easy to use, reliable, and cost-effective Compact Yet Capable: Small footprint with decent build volume for miniatures, prototypes, and hobby projects Fast & Efficient: Monochrome LCD allows quicker curing and longer screen lifespan Flexible Workflow: Supports both Creality’s Halot Box and third-party slicers like Chitubox Workshop-Friendly: Lightweight, portable, and simple to operate The Creality Halot R6 is a budget-friendly, entry-level resin printer that combines ease of use, compact design, and solid performance . It’s ideal for newcomers to resin printing, hobbyists, and makers who want a reliable tool without breaking the bank.

item.title: Ender PLA+ Filament - Black 1kg
item.description: Description Ender PLA+ filament is a premium upgrade to traditional PLA, designed to elevate your 3D printing experience. Using advanced materials and manufacturing techniques, this filament offers enhanced durability, flexibility, and print quality, making it the perfect choice for both beginners and seasoned 3D printing enthusiasts. Key Features: Superior Strength : Ender PLA+ offers increased tensile strength and impact resistance, resulting in tougher and more durable printed objects compared to standard PLA. Enhanced Flexibility : Improved flexibility reduces the risk of brittleness, allowing for a wider range of applications. Reduced Warping : Minimized warping tendencies ensure smoother printing and reduce the chances of print failure. Excellent Layer Adhesion : Achieve superior surface quality and structural integrity with enhanced layer adhesion. Precise and Consistent Printing : With reliable diameter consistency and low tolerance levels, Ender PLA+ delivers precise, clog-free prints. Vibrant and Vivid Colors : Available in a wide array of striking colors, making your prints visually appealing and eye-catching. Eco-Friendly : Derived from biodegradable materials, Ender PLA+ is a sustainable choice for environmentally-conscious users. Wide Compatibility : This filament is compatible with a variety of 3D printers, ensuring seamless printing across multiple machines. Upgrade your 3D printing projects with Ender PLA+ filament, and enjoy the perfect balance of strength, flexibility, and quality for all your creations. item.title: Synchronous Belt Kit K1/ K1 Max
item.description: Enhance the performance and reliability of your K1 or K1 Max 3D printer with the Creality Synchronous Belt Kit 1.8m . Engineered for precision, this upgrade kit delivers smoother, more accurate, and higher-quality prints by addressing key aspects of your printer's movement system. Key Features: Enhanced Print Accuracy : Achieve impeccable layer alignment and dimensional precision with synchronized X and Y axis movements. This kit minimizes artifacts and ensures your prints are as accurate as possible. Improved Print Speed and Quality : Handle faster print speeds without sacrificing quality. The kit allows for quicker, smoother prints while eliminating layer shifts and other common issues. Durable and High-Quality Construction : Built to last, the synchronous belts are made from premium materials to resist wear and tear, ensuring long-term reliability and consistent performance. Ease of Installation : Upgrade your printer with minimal hassle. The kit comes with clear instructions and all necessary hardware, making it accessible even for those with limited technical experience. Quiet and Smooth Operation : Enjoy a quieter printing environment as the synchronous belts reduce vibrations and noise, contributing to a more pleasant workspace. Improved Print Consistency : Achieve consistent and repeatable results with every print. The synchronized movement of the belts eliminates variations in layer alignment, ensuring your models come out as intended each time.

item.title: Brother DCP-1610W Printer Black and White Wireless 3-in-1 Mono Laser Multifunction Printer
item.description: The DCP-1610W Black & White Laser Printer offers effortless print with no complications The Brother DCP-1610W Black & White Laser Printer 3-in-1 is stylishly designed and compact enough to fit onto a shelf or workstation. It produces outputs with the speed and quality you would expect from a more expensive machine. Installation is simple – connect using wireless or the USB cable, and you will be printing in no time. Plus innovative anti-jam technology allows you to print wirelessly with no hassle. Productivity is kept at its maximum with high print speeds of up to 20 pages per minute (ppm). Equipped with a 2-in-1 ID Copy feature, you can copy both sides of an ID Card onto one page, at the simple touch of a button. The Brother series is specially designed for more savings by allowing you to replace the toner cartridges and drum units separately. What’s more, Brother’s affordable printers and genuine toner cartridges can deliver up to 1,000 pages of high quality prints. Key Features Print, Copy, Scan Fast print speeds of up to 20ppm Up to 150 sheet paper input 1,000 Page inbox toner 16 Character, 2 line LCD display USB and wireless networking iPrint&Scan Innovative anti-jam technology Free 3-year carry-in warranty What's in the box The DCP-1610W Mono Laser Printer 3-in-1 ships with the following: 1,000 Page toner 10,000 Page drum unit Power supply cord and USB cable Driver software for Windows® Quick Set-Up Guide Free 3-year carry-in warranty

Inkjet Waterslide Decal Paper is perfect for any personal or business project, which can be used in cups, coffee cups, water bottles, bowls, plates, vases, candles, manicures, soaps, key chains. item.title: Sublimation Stickers - White - A4 - 10 Pack
item.description: One of the best things about sublimation is the lasting power it has on your projects. Colors won’t fade or disappear, even after multiple washes or uses. Our new sublimation sticker vinyl is perfect for digital decorators who want to put unique designs in unconventional places or use unusual shapes. One of the most exciting features of this product is its repositionable vinyl, which allows you to quickly change signage or pricing on signs or menu boards. The vinyl can be reused and removed indefinitely, as long as it remains clean. Instructions to use: Import your desired pattern into the operating software of your cutting machine and print it with sublimation paper and ink. Place the sublimation sticker vinyl face up on the heat press machine plate, then align the printed sublimation paper face down. Cover it with high-temperature oil paper or high-temperature Teflon fabric. Set the temperature of the heat press machine to 190 ℃ for 40 seconds, with light pressure. Press the heat press machine and wait until it reaches zero. Use a cutting machine to cut the pattern (ensuring that the direction of the cut pattern is consistent with that of the transferred pattern), and then discard any excess material. Note: You can directly mirror and print the pattern of thermal sublimation paper, transfer it to the sublimation sticker vinyl product, and then use scissors to cut the desired pattern.

item.title: SA Filament SBS 1kg (1.75mm) Black
item.description: SBS (Styrene-Butadiene-Styrene) filament is a type of thermoplastic elastomer commonly used in 3D printing. It combines the rigidity of polystyrene with the flexibility and durability of butadiene rubber, making it a versatile material for a variety of applications. Characteristics: Flexible and Durable SBS is known for its flexibility and impact resistance, which makes it suitable for producing parts that need to endure stress or bending. Smooth Surface Finish Prints made with SBS typically have a smooth surface finish, which is often sought after in applications like packaging or consumer products. Transparent SBS filament can be translucent, and when used in thin layers, it can produce transparent or semi-transparent objects. Easy to Print It has relatively low printing temperatures and easy extrusion, making it easier to work with compared to some other flexible filaments like TPU. Low Odor : SBS emits less odor during printing compared to materials like ABS, making it more pleasant to work with in indoor environments. Smooth able As SBS is Styrene based it can be smoothed using Acetone vapor or applying D-Limonene to your prints. Comparison with Other Filaments: SBS vs. ABS While ABS is more rigid and heat-resistant, SBS offers more flexibility and is easier to print due to lower warping. SBS vs. TPU TPU is more flexible than SBS, but SBS is easier to print and has better transparency. If you're considering using SBS filament, it's a good choice for projects where flexibility, transparency, and a smooth finish are important. Applications: Prototyping Its durability and ease of printing make it ideal for creating prototypes that need to be both flexible and strong. Wearable Devices Due to its flexibility, SBS is sometimes used for printing wearable items like custom wristbands or grips. Print Temperature: 210 – 240°C, dependent on printer model Heat Bed temperature: 60 – 80°C​ Fan speed / Cooling: 0 - 100% Printing Speed: 50 - 500mm/s 1Kg net weight - 420m per roll​ 1.5Kg Total shipping weight Accurate diameter of 1.75mm with a tolerance of ± 0.05mm Spool Size: diameter 200mm, inner hub 58mm & Width 55mm Vacuum bagged and packaged in card board box

item.title: SA Filament Hyper PLA 1kg (1.75mm) Cool White
item.description: Ready for high-speed printing? SA Filament PLA Hyper is a superior choice compared to standard PLA filament due to several key enhancements that cater to both professional and hobbyist 3D printing needs. With SA Filament PLA Hyper printing speeds of up to 600mm/s is a breeze without compensating on strength and quality. Key Advantages of SA Filament PLA Hyper: Faster Printing Speeds The advanced formulation allows for faster printing speeds without compromising print quality, increasing productivity and efficiency in the printing process. Enhanced Strength and Durability SA Filament PLA Hyper is engineered to provide higher tensile strength and impact resistance, making it suitable for creating functional parts and models that need to withstand more stress and wear compared to standard PLA. Improved Print Quality The filament delivers an ultra-smooth finish, significantly reducing the layer lines and surface imperfections commonly seen in standard PLA prints. This results in professional-grade prints straight off the printer. Higher Heat Resistance SA Filament PLA Hyper is designed to withstand higher temperatures without deforming, making it more versatile for applications where the printed parts may be exposed to warmer environments. Reduced Warping and Shrinkage SA Filament PLA Hyper offers better adhesion to the print bed and between layers, minimizing the risk of warping and shrinking, which is often a challenge with standard PLA. Increased Layer Adhesion The improved layer adhesion of SA Filament PLA Hyper makes printed parts even stronger, enhancing the structural integrity and durability of the final product. Eco-Friendly and Sustainable Like standard PLA, SA Filament PLA Hyper is made from renewable resources. However, its enhanced properties do not come at the cost of increased environmental impact, maintaining its status as an eco-friendly choice. item.title: SA Filament Hyper PLA 1kg (1.75mm) Black
item.description: Ready for high-speed printing? SA Filament PLA Hyper is a superior choice compared to standard PLA filament due to several key enhancements that cater to both professional and hobbyist 3D printing needs. With SA Filament PLA Hyper printing speeds of up to 600mm/s is a breeze without compensating on strength and quality. Key Advantages of SA Filament PLA Hyper: Faster Printing Speeds The advanced formulation allows for faster printing speeds without compromising print quality, increasing productivity and efficiency in the printing process. Enhanced Strength and Durability SA Filament PLA Hyper is engineered to provide higher tensile strength and impact resistance, making it suitable for creating functional parts and models that need to withstand more stress and wear compared to standard PLA. Improved Print Quality The filament delivers an ultra-smooth finish, significantly reducing the layer lines and surface imperfections commonly seen in standard PLA prints. This results in professional-grade prints straight off the printer. Higher Heat Resistance SA Filament PLA Hyper is designed to withstand higher temperatures without deforming, making it more versatile for applications where the printed parts may be exposed to warmer environments. Reduced Warping and Shrinkage SA Filament PLA Hyper offers better adhesion to the print bed and between layers, minimizing the risk of warping and shrinking, which is often a challenge with standard PLA. Increased Layer Adhesion The improved layer adhesion of SA Filament PLA Hyper makes printed parts even stronger, enhancing the structural integrity and durability of the final product. Eco-Friendly and Sustainable Like standard PLA, SA Filament PLA Hyper is made from renewable resources. However, its enhanced properties do not come at the cost of increased environmental impact, maintaining its status as an eco-friendly choice.
