item.title: Active Buzzer
item.description: Description The Ultra-Thin Active Piezo Buzzer is a compact sound alert component designed for precise and reliable audio signaling. Measuring just 9 × 4.2 mm , it operates at a low voltage of 3V and includes positive and negative leads for easy integration. With a built-in oscillator, no external components are required—simply apply DC voltage, and the buzzer produces a high-pitched sound. Ideal for Arduino , Raspberry Pi , and other DIY electronics projects, this buzzer is perfect for applications such as security systems , doorbells , and industrial alerts . Its slim design makes it suitable for home, automotive, and industrial environments where space-saving and efficiency are essential. Technical Details / Specs Type : Active Piezo Buzzer Dimensions : 9 × 4.2 mm Operating Voltage : 3V DC Power Mode : Uncharged Battery Properties : Without Battery Operation : Requires DC voltage Feature : Built-in oscillator (no external components needed)

item.title: 22pf Ceramic Capacitor (5 Pack)
item.description: 22pF Ceramic Capacitor – 5 Pack – Technical Specifications: Capacitance Value – 22pF (22 Picofarads) Capacitance Code – 220 (22 × 10⁰ pF = 22pF) Capacitor Type – Multilayer Ceramic Capacitor (MLCC) Voltage Rating – 50V DC Tolerance – ±5% (J) Temperature Coefficient – C0G / NP0 (Stable, Low Loss) Package Style – Radial Through-Hole (Disc) Lead Pitch – 2.54mm (Standard 0.1" / 100mil) Operating Temperature – -25°C to +85°C Quantity – 5 Pieces per Pack Compatible Platforms – Arduino, ESP8266, ESP32, Breadboards, PCBs Handy Tips for Using the 22pF Ceramic Capacitor: 1: The marking "22pF" means 22 picofarads — this is a very small capacitance value at the low end of the ceramic capacitor range. On a capacitor marked with a three-digit code, "220" would represent this value: the first two digits (22) are the significant figures, and the third digit (0) is the multiplier — 22 × 10⁰ = 22pF . You may also see it written as 0.000022µF or 0.022nF — all three mean exactly the same thing. 2: The 22pF ceramic capacitor is most commonly used as a crystal load capacitor . When using a quartz crystal oscillator with a microcontroller or real-time clock (RTC) — such as a 16MHz crystal with an Arduino, or a 32.768kHz crystal with a DS3231 RTC — two 22pF capacitors are typically required, one connected from each leg of the crystal to ground. These set the correct oscillation frequency and are critical for accurate timing. 3: The C0G / NP0 temperature coefficient means this capacitor's value is extremely stable across temperature and voltage changes — it has near-zero drift compared to Y5V or Z5U types. This makes it the correct choice for frequency-sensitive applications such as crystal oscillators, RF filters, and timing circuits where even small capacitance shifts would affect accuracy. 4: Like all ceramic capacitors, the 22pF is non-polarised — it has no positive or negative leg and can be inserted into a circuit in either orientation without risk of damage. This makes it quick and easy to use on a breadboard or PCB. 5: At only 22pF, this capacitor has a very high reactance at low frequencies and only becomes effective at filtering or bypassing at very high frequencies (RF and above). It is not suitable as a general-purpose decoupling or bypass capacitor — use a 100nF (104) ceramic capacitor for that purpose. The 22pF is best reserved for crystal load, RF tuning, and high-frequency filter applications.

item.title: 104 Ceramic Capacitor (5 Pack)
item.description: 104 Ceramic Capacitor 100nF (0.1µF) – 5 Pack – Technical Specifications: Capacitance Code – 104 (10 × 10⁴ pF = 100,000pF = 100nF = 0.1µF) Capacitance Value – 100nF (0.1µF) Capacitor Type – Multilayer Ceramic Capacitor (MLCC) Voltage Rating – 50V DC Tolerance – ±10% (K) Temperature Coefficient – Y5V / Z5U (General Purpose) Package Style – Radial Through-Hole (Disc) Lead Pitch – 2.54mm (Standard 0.1" / 100mil) Operating Temperature – -25°C to +85°C Quantity – 5 Pieces per Pack Compatible Platforms – Arduino, ESP8266, ESP32, Raspberry Pi, Breadboards, PCBs Handy Tips for Using the 104 Ceramic Capacitor (100nF / 0.1µF): 1: The code "104" is a standard capacitor marking, not a part number. It is read as: the first two digits (10) are the significant figures, and the third digit (4) is the multiplier — meaning 10 × 10⁴ picofarads = 100,000pF = 100nF = 0.1µF . All three values mean exactly the same thing and you will see all three used interchangeably on datasheets and in tutorials. 2: The 100nF ceramic capacitor is one of the most widely used components in electronics and is found in almost every circuit. Its primary role is as a decoupling or bypass capacitor — placed between the VCC and GND pins of ICs and microcontrollers to filter out high-frequency noise and voltage spikes on the power supply line. As a rule of thumb, place one 100nF capacitor as close as possible to the power pin of every IC in your circuit. 3: Unlike electrolytic capacitors, ceramic capacitors are non-polarised — they have no positive or negative leg and can be inserted into a circuit in either orientation without risk of damage. This makes them very beginner-friendly and quick to use on a breadboard. 4: The 50V voltage rating means the capacitor can safely handle up to 50V DC across its terminals. For typical 3.3V and 5V microcontroller projects this provides a large safety margin. Always ensure the voltage rating of any capacitor exceeds the maximum voltage it will experience in your circuit. 5: Ceramic capacitors have very low ESR (Equivalent Series Resistance) and are excellent at filtering high-frequency noise — making them the preferred choice for decoupling, signal filtering, and timing circuits. For bulk energy storage or low-frequency filtering (such as smoothing a rectified power supply), an electrolytic capacitor with a much higher capacitance value is more appropriate.

item.title: Electronic Speed Controller (ESC)
item.description: Product Specifications 1.1 Output capacity: continuous current 30A, short-term current 40A (not less than 10 seconds). 1.2 Power input: 5.6V-16.8V (2-3-cell lithium battery pack or 5-12-cell NiMH/NiCd battery pack). 1.3BEC output: linear voltage stabilization method, 2A 1.4 High speed: 210000 rpm for 2-pole motor, 70000 rpm for 6-pole motor, 35000 rpm for 12-pole motor. 1.5 Size: 45mm24mm11mm 1.6 Weight :25g Product Features 1. Safe power-on function: When the power is turned on, the motor will not start immediately no matter what position the throttle stick is in, to avoid personal injury. 2. Throttle stroke calibration function: adapts to the differences in throttle, improves the linearity of throttle response, and has smooth and delicate speed control feel and excellent speed control linearity. 3. Program setting items: Brake setting: no brake/with brake, the factory default value is no brake. Battery type: Li-xx (lithium battery) / Ni-xx (nickel cadmium or nickel metal hydride), the default value is Li-xx (lithium battery). Low voltage protection mode: reduce power/turn off output, the default value is to reduce power. Low voltage protection threshold: low/medium/high, default value is medium cut-off voltage. When the setting is to use Li-xx batteries, the number of lithium batteries will be automatically determined. The cut-off voltage of each battery under low/medium/high conditions is: 2.6V, 2.85V, 3.1V respectively. When Ni-xx batteries are used in the setting, the ESC automatically detects the voltage of the battery pack when it is powered on. The low/medium/high cut-off voltages are 0%, 45%, and 60% of the input voltage at startup (0% means Without low voltage protection) Start mode: normal/soft/super soft start, the default value is normal start. Normal start is suitable for fixed wings and can start the motor quickly within 0.2 seconds. Soft start/super soft start is suitable for helicopters; the initial speed of soft start and super soft start is relatively low, and it takes 1 second and 2 seconds respectively from start to full speed. , but if you close the throttle after starting, and start again within 3 seconds, it will start in the normal mode to avoid crashing due to slow response when doing some aerobatic manoeuvres. Timing angle: low/medium/high, the default value is medium timing. Low timing angle can adapt to more motors, but in order to improve efficiency, it is recommended to use low timing angle for 2-pole motors and medium timing angle for motors with 6 poles and above. To increase the speed, the timing can be set to a high timing. After changing angle settings, test them on the ground before flying. Restore factory defaults. 4. Comprehensive protection functions: under-voltage protection: set by the user through the program. over-voltage protection: the input voltage exceeds 18 volts and will not start, automatically protects, and emits a rapid "beep" alarm sound. over-heat protection: built-in temperature Detection circuit, the ESC automatically shuts down when the MOS tube temperature is too high. remote control signal loss protection: reduce the power after 1 second of remote-control signal loss and turn off the output if there is no remote-control signal for another 2 seconds. Process characteristics. 1. The power input end uses high-quality ultra-low impedance large-capacity electrolytic capacitors, which greatly improves the anti-interference ability. 2. The output MOSFET power tube is equipped with an independent heat sink to reduce the temperature rise of the device and improve the system's high current working capability. 3. It is controlled by a single chip microcomputer. 4 The microcontroller uses an independent voltage regulator chip to avoid power supply interference caused by BEC load changes and improve the working stability of the microcontroller. Red positive pole, black negative pole, yellow signal line Setting method 1. Turn on the transmitter and push the throttle to high (FUTABA series transmitters need to select REV for the throttle channel). 2. Connect the receiver and motor. 3. Turn on the power of the ESC and if the transmitter is normal, there will be the following sound: (If there is a long "beep" after the sound ends and there is no more sound, then check the reverse setting of the throttle channel of the transmitter.) BB means LIPO automatic protection. BB BB means NIMH/NICD automatic protection. BBB BBB means brake selection. (When there is no operation, all sounds will continue to cycle until there is an operation request.) There are settings you want during the sound cycle. When you hear the prompt When there are syllables in the sound, (for example, if you select LIPO automatic protection and hear a B sound, pull the throttle to the low position) quickly pull the throttle to the low position. At the same time, the motor will make a sharp sound to confirm. Currently, if there are other settings, quickly push the throttle to the maximum to select th

item.title: Soil Moisture Sensor Module – Resistive Hygrometer with Analogue & Digital Output (1 Piece)
item.description: Soil Moisture Sensor Module – Technical Specifications: Sensor Type – Resistive Soil Moisture Sensor Operating Voltage – 3.3V to 5V DC Operating Current – ≤ 20mA Output Type – Dual Output (Analogue + Digital) Digital Output – TTL (HIGH = Dry / LOW = Wet) Analogue Output – 0V to VCC (Higher Voltage = Drier Soil) Onboard Comparator – LM393 Sensitivity Adjustment – Onboard Potentiometer (Digital Threshold) Indicator LEDs – Power LED (Red) + Digital Output LED (Green) Probe Material – Nickel-Plated Dual Copper Traces Interface – 4-Pin Header (VCC, GND, DO, AO) Operating Temperature – -10°C to +85°C Dimensions (Control Board) – 32 × 16mm Dimensions (Probe) – 60 × 20mm Quantity – 1 Piece Compatible Platforms – Arduino, ESP8266, ESP32, Raspberry Pi, STM32 Handy Tips for Using the Soil Moisture Sensor Module: 1: This module has four pins — VCC (power), GND (ground), DO (digital output), and AO (analogue output). The digital output gives a simple HIGH/LOW signal based on a moisture threshold set by the onboard potentiometer — ideal for simple wet/dry trigger events such as activating a pump or relay. The analogue output gives a continuously variable voltage proportional to soil moisture — useful when you need to know exactly how dry or wet the soil is, not just whether it has crossed a threshold. 2: The onboard potentiometer adjusts the sensitivity threshold for the digital output only. Turn it clockwise to increase sensitivity (triggers at lower moisture levels) and anticlockwise to decrease it (triggers only at higher moisture levels). Use a small flathead screwdriver and test in both dry and wet soil to dial in your desired trigger point. 3: Only power the sensor when actively taking a reading — do not leave it permanently powered with the probes inserted in soil. Continuous current through the probes causes electrolytic corrosion of the nickel plating over time, significantly shortening the sensor's lifespan. In your code, control power via a digital output pin on your microcontroller and switch it on for only 1–2 seconds per reading cycle. 4: This is a resistive soil moisture sensor — it measures electrical resistance between the two probes. Wet soil conducts electricity better than dry soil, which lowers resistance and changes the output voltage accordingly. It is well suited to general hobby and educational use. For long-term outdoor or precision applications, a capacitive soil moisture sensor is recommended as it does not suffer from probe corrosion over time. 5: When reading the analogue output, note that the voltage relationship is inverse — a higher analogue voltage means drier soil , and a lower voltage means wetter soil . This is the opposite of what many beginners expect. On an Arduino, use the following mapping to convert the raw reading into a human-readable moisture percentage: map(analogRead(AO), 1023, 0, 0, 100) — this returns 0% for completely dry and 100% for fully saturated soil.

item.title: Obstacle Avoidance IR Infrared Sensor Module
item.description: Obstacle Avoidance IR Infrared Sensor Module – Technical Specifications: Sensor Type – Infrared (IR) Reflective Obstacle Detection Operating Voltage – 3.3V to 5V DC Operating Current – ≤ 20mA Output Type – Digital (TTL) Digital Output – LOW = Obstacle Detected / HIGH = Clear Onboard Comparator – LM393 Detection Range – 2cm to 30cm (Adjustable) Sensitivity Adjustment – Onboard Potentiometer Indicator LEDs – Power LED (Red) + Output LED (Green) IR Emitter – 940nm Infrared LED Interface – 3-Pin Header (VCC, GND, OUT) Dimensions – 32 × 14mm Operating Temperature – -10°C to +50°C Compatible Platforms – Arduino, ESP8266, ESP32, Raspberry Pi, STM32 Handy Tips for Using the Obstacle Avoidance IR Infrared Sensor Module: 1: This module works by emitting an infrared beam from the IR LED and detecting whether it reflects back to the onboard IR receiver. When an object is close enough to reflect the beam, the output pin goes LOW and the green LED lights up. When no obstacle is present, the output stays HIGH . Note that this is the opposite of what many beginners expect — always account for this active-LOW behaviour in your code. 2: The onboard potentiometer adjusts the detection distance threshold. Turn it clockwise to increase the detection range (up to ~30cm) and anticlockwise to decrease it (down to ~2cm). Adjust it with a small flathead screwdriver while pointing the sensor at a test surface to dial in the exact range your project requires. Small adjustments make a big difference — turn slowly. 3: This sensor works best with solid, light-coloured, matte surfaces . Dark or black surfaces absorb infrared light instead of reflecting it, which can cause the sensor to fail to detect an obstacle even at close range. Highly reflective or shiny surfaces may trigger false positives at longer distances than expected. Always test with the actual surface materials your project will encounter. 4: The sensor is sensitive to ambient infrared light — bright sunlight and incandescent bulbs both emit significant IR radiation, which can cause false triggers or reduced detection reliability outdoors or in brightly lit environments. For outdoor use, consider shielding the sensor from direct sunlight or switching to an ultrasonic sensor (such as the HC-SR04), which is not affected by light conditions. 5: Because this module outputs a simple digital HIGH/LOW signal , it only tells you whether an obstacle is present or absent — it cannot tell you exactly how far away the obstacle is. For applications requiring actual distance measurement, pair this module with an HC-SR04 ultrasonic sensor or a Sharp GP2Y0A infrared distance sensor, which provide a proportional analogue output corresponding to distance.

item.title: 5V Relay Module with Optocoupler Isolation Low Level Trigger Development Board
item.description: Product Description: This module complies with the necessary standards, and there are isolation slots between the control area and the load area; It has a power supply and relay action indication, which lights up when it is connected When there is a signal at the signal input terminal, the common terminal and the normally open terminal will be connected This can be used as a microcontroller development board module and home appliance control It is controlled by DC or AC signals and can control 220V AC load The blue KF301 terminal is more convenient for connecting control lines. Electrical parameters: High-level triggering refers to a triggering method where there is a voltage between the signal input terminal and the ground. It can be understood as a triggering method where the signal input terminal is short-circuited to the VCC positive pole; Low-level triggering refers to a triggering method in which the voltage between the signal input terminal and the ground is OV. It can be understood as a triggering method in which the signal input terminal is short-circuited with the negative pole of GND.

item.title: Sublimation Stickers - Transparent - A4 - 10 Pack
item.description: One of the best things about sublimation is the lasting power it has on your projects. Colors won’t fade or disappear, even after multiple washes or uses. Our new sublimation sticker vinyl is perfect for digital decorators who want to put unique designs in unconventional places or use unusual shapes. One of the most exciting features of this product is its repositionable vinyl, which allows you to quickly change signage or pricing on signs or menu boards. The vinyl can be reused and removed indefinitely, as long as it remains clean. Instructions to use: Import your desired pattern into the operating software of your cutting machine and print it with sublimation paper and ink. Place the sublimation sticker vinyl face up on the heat press machine plate, then align the printed sublimation paper face down. Cover it with high-temperature oil paper or high-temperature Teflon fabric. Set the temperature of the heat press machine to 190 ℃ for 40 seconds, with light pressure. Press the heat press machine and wait until it reaches zero. Use a cutting machine to cut the pattern (ensuring that the direction of the cut pattern is consistent with that of the transferred pattern), and then discard any excess material. Note: You can directly mirror and print the pattern of thermal sublimation paper, transfer it to the sublimation sticker vinyl product, and then use scissors to cut the desired pattern.

item.title: 120Pcs - DuPont Bundle - 30cm
item.description: 120Pcs DuPont Jumper Cable Bundle – 30cm – Technical Specifications: Total Quantity – 120 Pieces Cable Length – 30cm Pin Spacing Compatibility – 2.54mm (Standard 0.1" / 100mil Pitch) Included Types – 40× Male to Male, 40× Male to Female, 40× Female to Female Conductor Material – Tinned Copper Insulation Material – PVC Connector Type – DuPont 1P-1P Single Pin Header Colours – Multicolour Assortment (for easy circuit identification) Operating Voltage – ≤ 300V Operating Current – ≤ 1A Operating Temperature – -20°C to +80°C Handy Tips for Using the 120Pcs DuPont Jumper Cable Bundle – 30cm: 1: This bundle includes all three connector combinations in one pack — Male to Male (breadboard to breadboard), Male to Female (breadboard to module pin header), and Female to Female (module to module). Having all three types on hand covers virtually every common prototyping wiring scenario. 2: The 30cm length is ideal for larger builds where components are spread across multiple breadboards, mounted in enclosures, or wired to external modules and displays with more physical separation. For compact desktop builds, the 10cm or 20cm variants will keep your workspace tidier. 3: The multicolour wires are not just cosmetic — use a consistent colour convention throughout your project to make debugging easier. A common convention is: Red = VCC/Power, Black or Brown = GND, Yellow = Signal, Blue = SDA, Green = SCL, Orange = TX, White = RX. 4: DuPont connectors are designed for repeated insertion and removal, but excessive force or sideways stress will loosen the pin contacts over time. Always insert and remove connectors by gripping the plastic housing — never pull by the wire itself. 5: These cables are fully compatible with standard 2.54mm pin headers, Arduino boards, Raspberry Pi GPIO, ESP8266/ESP32 modules, breadboards, and most development boards and sensor modules available on the market.

item.title: HC-SR04 Ultrasonic Ranging Module
item.description: HC-SR04 Ultrasonic Ranging Module – Technical Specifications: Module Type – Ultrasonic Distance Sensor Operating Voltage – 5V DC Operating Current – 15mA (Typical) Operating Frequency – 40kHz Measuring Range – 2cm to 400cm Measuring Accuracy – ±3mm Measuring Angle – 15° (Effective Cone) Trigger Input Signal – 10µs TTL Pulse (HIGH) Echo Output Signal – TTL PWM Signal Interface – 4-Pin Header (VCC, Trig, Echo, GND) Dimensions – 45 × 20 × 15mm Weight – ±9g Compatible Platforms – Arduino, ESP8266, ESP32, Raspberry Pi, STM32 Handy Tips for Using the HC-SR04 Ultrasonic Ranging Module: 1: The HC-SR04 has four pins — VCC (5V power), Trig (trigger input), Echo (distance output), and GND (ground). To take a measurement, send a 10 microsecond HIGH pulse to the Trig pin. The module will emit 8 ultrasonic pulses and the Echo pin will go HIGH for a duration proportional to the distance of the detected object. Use the formula: Distance (cm) = Echo Duration (µs) ÷ 58 to convert the pulse width into a distance reading. 2: The HC-SR04 operates at 5V , which means the Echo pin also outputs a 5V signal. If you are using a 3.3V microcontroller (such as an ESP8266, ESP32, or Raspberry Pi), you must use a voltage divider or logic level shifter on the Echo pin to avoid damaging your board. The Trig pin is input-only and will accept 3.3V signals without issue. 3: For best accuracy, mount the sensor so the two transducer "eyes" are facing the target surface perpendicularly . Angled surfaces, soft materials (fabric, foam), and very small objects can absorb or deflect the ultrasonic pulses, causing missed readings or inaccurate results. 4: The minimum reliable measuring distance is 2cm — objects closer than this fall within the sensor's blind spot and will return inaccurate or no readings. If your application requires detection of very close objects, add a software check to discard any readings below 2cm. 5: When taking continuous readings in a loop, add a delay of at least 60ms between measurements. This gives the ultrasonic pulse time to fully dissipate before the next trigger cycle, preventing the sensor from picking up echoes from a previous pulse and returning false distance readings.

item.title: Passive Split Buzzer
item.description: 1 x 8.5mm Passive split buzzer 1.5V 3V AC 16 OHM Pin 12085 Buzzer 2048HZ Passive buzzers do not have a built-in oscillator, so they need an AC audio signal to produce sound. They require more complex circuitry to control them, like an oscillating timer or a programmable microcontroller. The advantage of passive buzzers is that they can vary the pitch or tone of the sound. They can be programmed to emit a wide range of frequencies or musical notes

item.description: 40Pcs DuPont Jumper Cable – Male to Male – 20cm – Technical Specifications: Total Quantity – 40 Pieces Cable Length – 20cm Connector Type – Male to Male (Pin to Pin) Pin Spacing Compatibility – 2.54mm (Standard 0.1" / 100mil Pitch) Conductor Material – Tinned Copper Insulation Material – PVC Connector Style – DuPont 1P-1P Single Pin Header Colours – Multicolour Assortment (for easy circuit identification) Operating Voltage – ≤ 300V Operating Current – ≤ 1A Operating Temperature – -20°C to +80°C Handy Tips for Using the 40Pcs Male to Male DuPont Jumper Cables – 20cm: 1: Male to Male jumper cables are used to connect two breadboard points or two male pin headers directly together. They are the most commonly used cable type for pure breadboard prototyping — routing signals and power between rows, bridging sections, and connecting components across the board. 2: The 20cm length is the most versatile all-round size — long enough to reach comfortably across a full-size 830-point breadboard or connect to an adjacent module, but short enough to keep your workspace neat and tangle-free. For very compact builds, the 10cm variant is a tidier option; for widely spaced components, the 30cm variant gives extra reach. 3: The multicolour wires are not just cosmetic — use a consistent colour convention throughout your project to make debugging easier. A common convention is: Red = VCC/Power, Black or Brown = GND, Yellow = Signal, Blue = SDA, Green = SCL, Orange = TX, White = RX. 4: DuPont connectors are designed for repeated insertion and removal, but excessive force or sideways stress will loosen the pin contacts over time. Always insert and remove connectors by gripping the plastic housing — never pull by the wire itself. 5: These cables are fully compatible with standard 2.54mm pin headers, Arduino boards, Raspberry Pi GPIO, ESP8266/ESP32 modules, breadboards, and most development boards and sensor modules available on the market. For connections to female pin headers or module sockets, use Male to Female cables instead.

item.title: 40Pcs - DuPont - Male to Female - 20cm
item.description: This is a set of 40 male-to-female jumper cables that are 20cm long and compatible with 2.54mm spacing pin headers . item.title: 40Pcs - DuPont - Male to Male - 30cm
item.description: 40Pcs DuPont Jumper Cable – Male to Male – 30cm – Technical Specifications: Total Quantity – 40 Pieces Cable Length – 30cm Connector Type – Male to Male (Pin to Pin) Pin Spacing Compatibility – 2.54mm (Standard 0.1" / 100mil Pitch) Conductor Material – Tinned Copper Insulation Material – PVC Connector Style – DuPont 1P-1P Single Pin Header Colours – Multicolour Assortment (for easy circuit identification) Operating Voltage – ≤ 300V Operating Current – ≤ 1A Operating Temperature – -20°C to +80°C Handy Tips for Using the 40Pcs Male to Male DuPont Jumper Cables – 30cm: 1: Male to Male jumper cables are used to connect two breadboard points or two male pin headers directly together. They are the most commonly used cable type for pure breadboard prototyping — routing signals and power between rows, bridging sections, and connecting components across the board. 2: The 30cm length is ideal for larger builds where components are spread across multiple breadboards, mounted in enclosures, or connected to external modules and displays with more physical separation between them. For standard single-board builds, the 20cm variant will keep your workspace tidier; for very compact builds, consider the 10cm variant. 3: The multicolour wires are not just cosmetic — use a consistent colour convention throughout your project to make debugging easier. A common convention is: Red = VCC/Power, Black or Brown = GND, Yellow = Signal, Blue = SDA, Green = SCL, Orange = TX, White = RX. 4: DuPont connectors are designed for repeated insertion and removal, but excessive force or sideways stress will loosen the pin contacts over time. Always insert and remove connectors by gripping the plastic housing — never pull by the wire itself. 5: These cables are fully compatible with standard 2.54mm pin headers, Arduino boards, Raspberry Pi GPIO, ESP8266/ESP32 modules, breadboards, and most development boards and sensor modules available on the market. For connections to female pin headers or module sockets, use Male to Female cables instead.

item.title: 5-8mm Flexible Coupler
item.description: A shaft coupler are devices that connect two shafts to transmit power from the driveshaft to the driven shaft while absorbing some degrees of misalignments and mounting errors between the two shafts. Misalignments exist between two shafts as a result of the changes in temperature and deterioration of positioning accuracy over time. A shaft coupler provides mechanical flexibility to allow smooth rotation between the shafts and reduce impact, wear, vibration, noise, and risk of equipment failure.

item.title: eSun ePLA Filament - Matte - Light Blue - 1.75 - 1kg
item.description: eSUN Upgraded Matte PLA Filament 1.75mm, Excellent Adhesion Matte 3D Printer PLA Filament,1KG Spool 3D Printing Filament for 3D Printers, Paper Reel Brand： eSUN Material： Polylactic Acid Item Weight： 1 Kilograms Colour : Light Blue About this item 【Delicate Matte PLA】With an excellent matte printed surface, eSUN Matte PLA has a better printing effect and doesn't have obvious layer lines than normal PLA. Not easy to break. The supporting structure of it is easy to peel off. 【High Toughness & Better Adhesion】Compared to normal PLA filament, eSUN Matte PLA has higher toughness. Printed models are not easy to break or crack, and can be widely used in accessories, home decoration, toys, sculptures, shells, and COSPLAY. With upgraded paper reel, eSUN Matte PLA has better adhesion and printibility which improves the problem of bottom adhesion on the plate. 【Stable Dimensional Tolerance】Minimum tolerance and low warping to ensure consistent feeding and stable prints, good layer bonding, less stringing, no bubbles, and easy handling, resulting in an outstanding surface finish and are highly precise. 【Tangle Free & No Plugging】Full 1KG 3D printer filament reel, perfect roundness, very tight diameter tolerance, good winding, does not overlap or tangle. Melt well, feed smoothly and constantly without clogging the nozzle or extruder, high successful printing rate. 【Environmental Friendly Package & Reel】Scrap is reused to produce recyclable spool and packaging box. eSUN filament comes in a sealed vacuum bag with a desiccant bag, easily keeping your 3D printer filaments in optimal storage condition and free from dust or dirt before opening the vacuumed sealed packaging. 【Compatibility Printers】Compatible with Most of FDM 3D Printers, such as: Bambu Lab P1P /X1, Voron 2.4, Raise3D, Prusa, Creality Ender 3 and Ender 7.

item.description: ​ PLA (Polylactic Acid) is a biodegradable (under the correct conditions) thermoplastic derived from renewable resources such as corn starch or sugarcane. It is one of the most popular bioplastics, used for many applications ranging from plastic cups to medical implants. PLA in its raw form is also FDA and EU commission regulation approved as Food Contact Safe. item.title: SA Filament PLA+ 1kg (1.75mm) Sky Blue
item.description: Taking PLA to the next level is SA Filament Silk PLA+. If you want a breathtakingly beautiful shiny and silky prints then look no further. With higher Heat Deflection temperature, impact strength and improved durability makes SA Filament Silk PLA+ the perfect PLA alternative to all that want more wow factors from their prints. Silk PLA is known for bad layer adhesion and usually requires much slower printing speeds. SA Filament has developed a formula that prints at normal PLA temperatures and speeds, making it easy for everyone to enjoy! item.title: Patriot SSD P220 2.5 512GB + Enclosure
item.description: The next generation of 2.5″ SATA III SSD are here with the Patriot P220 2.5″ SATA Solid State Drives. Designed with the latest SATA 3 controller, the P220 is a premier storage solution designed for top system performance. With read and write speeds of up to 550 and 500 MB/s, the P220 gives you the performance you need to get the job done. As a 7mm high 2.5” form factor SSD, the P220 is a compact storage drive that provides stronger overall performance and productivity. The P220 is perfect for fast upgrades, storing large files and providing efficiency in your workspace for a great price. FEATURES: Latest SATA III controller 2.5″ SATA III backwards to SATA II S.M.A.R.T health info supported TRIM command supported Widely Compatible SPECIFICATIONS: Format: 2.5″ Interface: SATA III Capacity: 512GB 4K Aligned Random Read: up to 40K IOPs 4K Aligned Random Write: up to 50K IOPs Sequential Read (CDM): up to 550MB/s Sequential Write (CDM): up to 500MB/s Terabytes Written (TBW): up to 240TB O/S Supported: Windows® 7/8.0/8.1/10 (Drivers may be required on older Operating Systems) Product Dimensions: 10 x 6.9 x 0.7 cm Product Weight: 46g DESCRIPTION: The Orico 2.5-inch USB3.0 Micro-B to USB-A Hard Drive Enclosure is the perfect solution for those looking to expand their storage capacity. It features a USB3.0 Micro-B port, allowing you to connect your hard drive to your laptop or desktop computer. It supports up to 6TB of storage capacity, making it ideal for storing large amounts of data. It also features a tool-free design, making it easy to install and use. With its sleek and stylish design, this enclosure is perfect for those looking to upgrade their storage capacity without sacrificing style. FEATURES: USB Micro-B port All-round protection Inner cushion to protect the hard drive Connectivity compatibility to various devices Supports 5Gbps transmission speed 10-minute auto sleep mode SPECIFICATIONS: Material: ABS Output Interface: USB3.0 Micro-B Transmission Rate: 6Gbps Installation: Tool-free Compatible: 2.5″ SATA HDD/SSD with thickness 7mm-9.5mm Support Capacity: 6TB Max Data Cable: USB Micro-B/Male to USB Type-A/Male, 0.3m Supported System: Windows/Mac OS/Linux Colour: Black Product Dimensions: 13 x 8 x 1.4 cm

item.title: Heatflex 3D Puff - 30 x 25cm
item.description: Heatflex 3D Puff - 30 x 25cm 3D Puff is a foaming vinyl that self-expands by heat pressing. It looks like Classic Flex but puffs up creating a 3D effect. Features of 3D Puff Flex Three-dimensional and voluminous designs​ Soft and warm texture​ Easy to cut and weed Various colors available Puff PU is suitable for Stretchable fabric It may not be puffed up well if the design cut is too large Press Temperature : 150 C Press Time: 30 sec Keep out of direct sunlight Colour Disclaimer Due to the limitations of desktop scanners and the relative inconsistencies of various display monitors, the colors you see on your screen may not be a totally accurate reproduction of the actual product. We strive to make our colors as accurate as possible, but screen images are intended as a guide only and should not be regarded as absolutely correct.

item.title: Christmas Infusible Ink Sheets (1 Piece)
item.description: Christmas-inspired infusible ink sheets. These sublimation sheets can be cut out in various designs for your Christmas Projects and gifts. It is suitable for T-shirt, keychains, mouse pads, coasters, pillowcases, mugs and stockings etc. These infusible sheets are compatible with most major brands of cutting and heat press machines, or household iron. Though our sublimation paper is thin, it has extremely high ink content and the ink has a high transfer rate. After transfer, the color of the product you get will be much darker than the color on the sublimation paper! Variety of designs - please refer to pictures to ensure you select the correct one Size per sheet: 11.45 x 30cm

item.title: XT60 Connector Kit
item.description: Here's the description for the XT60 Connector Kit: XT60 Connector Kit – Technical Specifications: Connector Type – XT60 High-Current Power Connector Gender Included – Male (Plug) + Female (Socket) Pairs Rated Current – 60A Continuous Peak Current – 120A (Short Duration) Rated Voltage – ≤ 500V DC Contact Material – Gold-Plated Copper Housing Material – High-Temperature Nylon (PA66) Wire Gauge Compatibility – 10AWG to 14AWG (2.5mm² to 6mm²) Operating Temperature – -20°C to +120°C Insulation Resistance – ≥ 1000MΩ Contact Resistance – ≤ 0.5mΩ Colour Coding – Yellow Housing (Standard) Applications – LiPo Batteries, ESCs, RC Vehicles, eBikes, Solar Systems, DIY Power Packs Handy Tips for Using the XT60 Connector Kit: 1: The XT60 uses a keyed housing — the male and female connectors can only mate in one orientation, making reverse polarity connection physically impossible. By convention, the female connector (socket) is always wired to the battery or power source , and the male connector (plug) is wired to the load (ESC, inverter, charger, etc.). Following this convention ensures that no live pins are ever exposed on a disconnected battery lead. 2: XT60 connectors are designed to be soldered , not crimped. Use a soldering iron rated at least 60W — the large gold-plated copper contacts act as a heat sink and a low-powered iron will produce cold, unreliable joints. Apply flux, pre-tin both the wire and the contact cup, then feed solder into the cup while holding the wire in place. The whole process should take no more than 3–5 seconds per contact to avoid melting the nylon housing. 3: Always solder one contact at a time and allow it to cool fully before soldering the second contact. Soldering both contacts in quick succession builds up heat in the housing and can warp or melt the nylon body, misaligning the contacts and making the connector difficult or impossible to mate. 4: For high-current applications, always match your wire gauge to the current load — 10AWG wire is recommended for continuous loads approaching 60A, while 12AWG or 14AWG is adequate for lighter RC and hobby applications. Using a wire that is too thin for the load will cause resistive heating at the connector and risk fire. 5: XT60 connectors have a positive locking friction fit — they require a firm push to mate and a firm pull to separate, which prevents accidental disconnection under vibration. If your connectors feel loose or mate too easily, the contacts may be worn or the housing damaged. Replace connectors that no longer hold firmly, as a loose connection under high current causes arcing, heat, and potential fire risk.

item.title: HC-SR505 Mini Infrared PIR Motion Sensor
item.description: HC-SR505 Mini PIR Motion Sensor Module – Technical Specifications: Sensor Type – Passive Infrared (PIR) Motion Sensor Operating Voltage – 4.5V to 20V DC (5V Typical) Quiescent Current – Output Type – Digital TTL (HIGH = Motion Detected / LOW = Clear) Output Voltage (HIGH) – 3.3V Output Voltage (LOW) – 0V Detection Range – Up to 3 Metres Detection Angle – Trigger Mode – Repeatable Trigger (Default) Output Hold Time – ~8 Seconds (±30%) Interface – 3-Pin Header (GND, OUT, VCC) Dimensions – 10 × 23mm Operating Temperature – -20°C to +80°C Compatible Platforms – Arduino, ESP8266, ESP32, Raspberry Pi, STM32 Handy Tips for Using the HC-SR505 Mini PIR Motion Sensor Module: 1: The HC-SR505 is a miniature PIR motion sensor — functionally similar to the larger HC-SR501 but significantly smaller, making it ideal for compact builds, wearable projects, and battery-powered devices. It detects motion by sensing changes in infrared radiation emitted by warm bodies such as humans and animals. When motion is detected, the output pin goes HIGH (3.3V) for approximately 8 seconds before returning LOW. 2: Unlike the HC-SR501, the HC-SR505 has no adjustable potentiometers — detection range and output hold time are fixed. The detection range is set at a maximum of 3 metres, and the output hold time is fixed at approximately 8 seconds . If your project requires adjustable sensitivity, range, or hold time, the HC-SR501 is the better choice as it includes onboard tuning potentiometers for all. 3: The HC-SR505 works on infrared technology and can automatically control itself with high sensitivity and high reliability. Because of its minimum size and low-power operation mode, it is widely used in battery-powered applications. The quiescent current of under 60µA makes it extremely efficient for always-on sensing in low-power designs. 4: After powering on the module, allow at least 30–60 seconds for the sensor to calibrate to the ambient infrared environment before trusting its output. During this initialisation period the output may trigger randomly — this is normal. In your code, add a startup delay before beginning to monitor the output pin to avoid false triggers on power-up. 5: The output pin of the HC-SR505 outputs 3.3V logic when motion is detected — making it directly compatible with both 3.3V microcontrollers (ESP8266, ESP32, Raspberry Pi) and 5V microcontrollers (Arduino Uno, Nano) without the need for a logic level shifter. Simply connect VCC, GND, and the output pin to a digital input pin on your microcontroller and use digitalRead() to detect motion events.

item.title: HC-SR501 PIR Sensor Detector Module
item.description: HC-SR501 PIR Motion Sensor Detector Module – Technical Specifications: Sensor Type – Passive Infrared (PIR) Motion Sensor Operating Voltage – 4.5V to 20V DC (5V Typical) Operating Current – ≤ 65mA Quiescent Current – Output Type – Digital TTL (HIGH = Motion Detected / LOW = Clear) Output Voltage (HIGH) – 3.3V Output Voltage (LOW) – 0V Detection Range – 3 to 7 Metres (Adjustable) Detection Angle – ≤ 110° Cone Angle Trigger Modes – Single Trigger (L) / Repeatable Trigger (H) Output Hold Time – 5 to 300 Seconds (Adjustable) Sensitivity Adjustment – Onboard Potentiometer Time Delay Adjustment – Onboard Potentiometer Interface – 3-Pin Header (GND, OUT, VCC) Dimensions – 32 × 24mm Operating Temperature – -15°C to +70°C Compatible Platforms – Arduino, ESP8266, ESP32, Raspberry Pi, STM32 Handy Tips for Using the HC-SR501 PIR Motion Sensor Detector Module: 1: The HC-SR501 has two onboard potentiometers — the first adjusts detection sensitivity (range from ~3m to ~7m), and the second adjusts the output hold time (how long the output stays HIGH after motion is detected, from ~5 seconds up to ~300 seconds). Adjust both with a small flathead screwdriver. Turn clockwise to increase and anticlockwise to decrease. Set the hold time to its minimum when first testing so you are not waiting long between triggers. 2: The module has a trigger mode jumper with two positions — Single Trigger (L) and Repeatable Trigger (H) . In Single Trigger mode, the output goes HIGH once, holds for the set time, then goes LOW and enters a ~3 second blocking period before it can trigger again. In Repeatable Trigger mode, the output stay HIGH and the hold timer resets as long as motion continues to be detected. For most home automation and security applications, Repeatable Trigger (H) is the more useful mode. 3: After powering on the module, allow 1 to 2 minutes for the sensor to fully calibrate to the ambient infrared environment before trusting its output. During this warm-up period the output will trigger randomly — this is completely normal. Always add a startup delay in your code before beginning to monitor the output pin to avoid acting on false triggers during initialisation. 4: The HC-SR501 outputs 3.3V logic when motion is detected, making it directly compatible with both 3.3V microcontrollers (ESP8266, ESP32, Raspberry Pi) and 5V microcontrollers (Arduino Uno, Nano) without needing a logic level shifter. Simply connect VCC, GND, and the OUT pin to a digital input pin on your microcontroller and use digitalRead() to detect motion events. 5: For the most reliable detection, mount the sensor so the Fresnel lens faces the direction of expected movement and is not obscured. The sensor detects motion best when a person moves across the field of view rather than directly toward or away from the lens. Avoid mounting near heat sources such as radiators, air vents, or windows with direct sunlight, as these can cause false triggers by creating changes in the ambient infrared environment.

item.title: Digital Speaker Module from DFRobot
item.description: This Digital Speaker Module removes the need for an amplifier, allowing for easy audio integration for your next project! If you love to tinker with Electronics, but often feel like your projects are simply incomplete without audio, then this compact little Digital Speaker Module from DFRobot is the perfect solution! Known affectionately in many Maker communities as the DFSpeaker, these fantastic little Audio Modules are more than just capable of playing sound, and actually have an integrated 8002 Speaker Amplifier IC built directly into the units. This means you don’t need any other equipment or converters to turn the data signals you send into audio packets for the speaker, making integration as easy as possible – Just like it should be for Arduino projects. DIGITAL SPEAKER MODULE FROM DFROBOT - TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS: Operating Voltage – 2V to 5.5V DC Interface Type – Digital Power Rating (Speaker) – 0.5W Impedance (Speaker) – 8Ω Integrated Amplifier IC – 8002 Speaker Amplifier IC (Datasheet) Volume Control – Onboard Potentiometer Gain Control – Unity-Gain Stable / External Configuration Compatible Extra Features – “Pop & Click Circuitry” for Noise-Free On/Off Transitions Dimensions – 40 x 40mm TYPICAL APPLICATIONS FOR THESE DIGITAL SPEAKER MODULES FROM DFROBOT: The DFRobot Digital Speaker Module is one of the simplest Audio Modules available to Makers, with a built-in amplifier to handle all of the complicated signal conversions and audio translations that we as Electronics tinkerers shouldn’t NEED to know. This allows us Makers (and sound “non-specialists”) to benefit from the countless hours of hard work that sound engineers and specialists in the audio field. And just to sweeten this already awesome deal, this Digital Speaker Module has been tested to work perfectly on expansion boards like the Arduino I/O Expansion Shield, allowing you to integrate audio into almost any Arduino project with absolute ease. ADDITIONAL RESOURCES: Official DFRobot Digital Speaker Module Wiki DFRobot Digital Speaker Module Schematics Download

item.title: Creality Water Washable Resin - Flesh - 1kg
item.description: Creality water washable UV resin plus is a high quality resin designed for LCD resin 3D printers with the big advantage that it can be washed off with water instead of alcohol. This resin is usually slightly more expensive than the standard resin, but you do have to spend money on alcohol and work with chemical which effect your skin. This resin works with LCD based UV resin printers working at 405nm. It is designed with a fast curing time, high stability and low shrinkage. The result of this is accurate smooth parts that can be used in a wide variety of applications. This resin is specifically designed for the Creality range of 3D printers, but can also be used on other LCD resin printers, like the Anycubic, Wanhao, Elegoo, Phrozen, Geetech, Nova3D and Sparkmaker 3D printers. The resin comes in a strong metal bottle which keeps all light away from the resin and is very well packaged in protective plastic bubble wrapping inside the box. Spesifications: Colour: Grey Amount: 1000g Curing frequency: 405nm Shelf life: 12 Months Hardness: 85-88 Shore D Viscosity (@25 ℃ ): 200-350MPa.s Shrinkage: 3.62 - 4.24% Storage instructions: Keep away from light. (Sunshine contains a lot of UV light, it will solidify photosensitive resin). It is recommended to store at 15℃ - 35℃ ambient temperature, the lower the temperature, the higher the viscosity of the resin. Keep resin sealed during storage. Excessive dust or moisture can affect print quality. Usage instructions: Shake well before use, some resins do contain sediment which will sag to the bottom of the container. Wear gloves during use to avoid direct contact with skin and keep the room well ventilated. In an event of contact with skin, rinse with running water. If you feel unwell, seek medical attention. Printed models need to be cleaned with a high-concentration alcohol (IPA) to clean the printed part for about 30s (recommended concentration of 95% or more, the higher the better). Water washable resins can be washed off with water. Do not pour the resin into the resin vat which contains unused resin. The resin in the vat can be dirty and pollute the new resin. Do not leave the resin in the resin vat for a long period of time without use to avoid resin pollution affect the printing quality. Rather pour the clean unused resin into a light blocking container. Resin has a shelf life of up to 18 months.

item.title: Creality 24V 4010 Axial Fan
item.description: It’s no surprise that the Creality Ender 3 3D Printer has changed the name of the game in desktop 3D printers, with an incredibly low price despite the high quality components and plethora of features that it offers. However, even these machines can experience minor problems and faults, and this is especially so for mechanical parts like cooling fans and other moving bits and pieces. Fortunately, we’ve got you covered with a range of Creality Original Spares like these 4024 Axial Fans for Ender 3 printers. These fans are designed to exact same specification as the fans that come installed on Ender 3 printers, with a 24V compatibility and compact size to accommodate the unique spec’s of the Ender 3 compared to other Creality 3D Printers . This ensures that you experience as little downtime as possible, and that you don’t have to call for professional assistance or waste hours trying to get the fan to work. Instead, the clever design means you can simply remove the previous fan, self-solder the new leads using provided heatshrink self-solder joiners, and mount the new fan. You will get back to your 3D Printing fun as quickly and seamlessly as possible. Please note: This Creality 24V 4024 Axial Fan is made as an easy replacement part for the Creality Ender 3 3D Printer . Instead of a connector head, these fans come with a short lead wire and two heatshrink self-solder joiners. This means you won’t need to hassle with dismantling your wire harness, but simply cut off your old fan and use a standard heat gun to reattach your new Creality 24V 4024 Axial Fan with the heatshrink self-solder joiners. A cable tie is also included for your convenience. CREALITY 24V 4010 AXIAL FAN – TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS: Fan Type – Axial Fan Operating Voltage – 24V DC Operating Current – 0.1A Dimensions – 40 x 40 x 10mm TYPICAL APPLICATIONS FOR THESE CREALITY 24V 4010 AXIAL FANS: These 4010 Axial Fans are designed and stocked specifically for the Ender 3 and CR-20, and have been designed with the 24V supply in mind to accommodate the unique voltages that the Ender 3 utilises. This, however, means that it may not be compatible with the rest ofCreality’s 3D Printer Range . So if you are looking for a 12V version of these 4010 Creality Fans, be sure to look at our Creality 12V 4010 Axial Fan to see if it will accommodate your printer’s needs.

item.title: RJ11 Male To RJ11 Male Telephone Network Cable
item.description: A registered jack (RJ) cable is a standardized telecommunication network interface for connecting voice and data equipment. To a service provided by a local exchange carrier or long-distance carrier. Registration interfaces were first defined in the Universal Service Ordering Code (USOC) system of the Bell System in the United States for complying with the registration program for customer-supplied telephone equipment mandated by the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) in the 1970s. They were subsequently codified in title 47 of the Code of Federal Regulations Part 68. Registered Jack connections began to see use after their invention in 1973 by Bell Labs. The specification includes physical construction, wiring, and signal semantics. Accordingly, registered jacks are primarily named by the letters RJ, followed by two digits that express the type. Additional letter suffixes indicate minor variations. For example, RJ11, RJ14, and RJ25 are the most commonly used interfaces for telephone connections. For one-, two-, and three-line services, respectively. Although these standards are legal definitions in the United States, some interfaces are used worldwide. The connectors used for registered jack installations are primarily the modular connector and the 50-pin miniature ribbon connector. For example, RJ11 uses a six-position two-conductor connector (6P2C), RJ14 uses a six-position four-conductor (6P4C) modular jack, while RJ21 uses a 25-pair (50-pin) miniature ribbon connector.

Unleash your creativity! Design and print your own temporary tattoos with ease. 5 Sheets

item.title: SA Filament Dual Silk PLA 750g (1.75mm) Arctic Frost – Sky Blue & Gloss White
item.description: SA Filament Dual Silk PLA Arctic Frost Filament Elevate your 3D printing projects with SA Filament Dual Silk PLA Arctic Frost Filament, which is meticulously crafted to deliver stunning, silky-smooth prints with a mesmerizing dual-color effect. This innovative filament combines two harmonious silk tones within a single strand, producing captivating, colour-shifting visuals that change with the light and viewing angle—ideal for artistic creations, decorative items, and standout prototypes. Key Features: Dual-Color Silk Finish: Achieve eye-catching, glossy prints with dynamic color transitions that enhance the aesthetic appeal of your models. Enhanced Material Properties: Formulated with improved heat deflection temperature and increased impact strength, this filament offers greater durability compared to standard PLA . Optimized Printing Performance: Unlike traditional silk PLAs that may suffer from poor layer adhesion and require slower print speeds, SA Filament’s unique formulation allows for reliable printing at standard PLA temperatures and speeds, ensuring a smooth printing experience without compromising quality. Precision Manufacturing: Produced with an accurate diameter of 1.75mm ± 0.05mm, ensuring consistent extrusion and reducing the risk of jams or clogs. Technical Specifications: Print Temperature: 200 – 230°C (dependent on printer model) Heat Bed Temperature: 0 – 60°C Fan Speed/Cooling: 100% Spool Dimensions: Diameter 200mm, inner hub 58mm, width 55mm Packaging: Vacuum-sealed and packaged in a sturdy cardboard box to maintain filament quality and longevity Experience the perfect fusion of beauty and functionality with SA Filament Dual Silk PLA Arctic Frost Filament – where your creative visions are brought to life with unparalleled elegance and strength.

item.title: Envelope (C4) A4 White

item.title: Printable Decal Paper Waterslides Clear Sticker
item.description: Print your own decal paper at home using your PC and a inkjet printer. It is easy to print your own water slide decal which you can put on candle, soap, ceramic, glass and many other gloss finished items. How To Use Print the image from your computer onto your inkjet water-slide decal paper with your inkjet printer Use a hair dryer to heat and dry the ink. Spray a clear varnish topcoat over the image ( you can get the varnish from a paint store ) Use your hair dryer to heat and dry the varnish or leave it to dry natuarly for an hour Cut out the image you want with home scissors. Place it in water for about 60 seconds and then transfer it onto of material you wish to decorate. Wipe excess water off your decal transfer using gentle strokes with a rubber Scrubber. Allow to set dry for 3 hours at least , or dry with with your hair dryer.

item.title: Heat Press (Single Mug Press 7.5cm – 9.5cm)
item.description: Features & Specifications: Perfect mug heat press for crafters, hobbyists, and home-based entrepreneurs. 7.5cm x 9.5cm mug press. Non-stick press. An easy-to-read digital screen for viewing your settings. 3 simple buttons for adjusting temperature, time, and other settings. Easily adjustable pressure ensuring the perfect press every time. This 75mm x 95mm mug heat press is robust and practical. It is a staple for any size sublimation business looking to offer customized drink-ware to their customers. What can I press with the 7.5cm x 9.5cm single mug heat press? With this mighty machine, you can press a variety of sublimation-ready drink-ware. Drink-ware blanks, such as: 10oz Ceramic and metal mugs. Skinny mugs. Travel mugs. Water bottles. Our popular sippy cups. Partial prints on our wine tumblers. 10oz Glass mugs. 2-tone mugs. Magic mugs.15oz Jumbo mugs. With an ever-growing list of compatible sublimation blanks, you will be spoiled for choice. In conclusion: Small but incredibly versatile, this single mug press is perfect for beginners and experts alike. With various attachments sold separately, you can easily expand its awesome capabilities.

item.title: Bed Spring Yellow Single
item.description: Upgrade for Ender 3, Ender 3 Pro, or Ender 3 V2 Our 20mm springs is made of high quality spring steel, fatigue and heat-resistant,durable for use. These springs may seem trivial, but the springs used on 3D printers can improve print quality and stability. Replacing the original spring on the printing bed of the Ender-3 3D printer to obtain a stronger spring, will allow you to print at a higher speed without worrying about any wobble. These strong and well-compressed springs are a cheap and easy way to upgrade the Ender-3 3D printer. SPECIFICATIONS Material: Spring steel Color: Yellow Length: 20 mm/0.78" Hole Diameter: 8 mm/0.31" Rod Diameter: 4 mm/0.16" Model: TF spring QUICK AND EASY INSTALLATION 1.Unscrew the adjustment knobs from the bottom of your print bed. 2.And replace those stock springs with these new ones. 3.Screw the adjustment knobs back into the print bed with these new springs. 4.Then you're free to go! Level your bed and keep on printing

item.title: CR Touch Auto Leveling Standard Kit without Bracket
item.description: Creality CR-Touch Auto Leveling Standard Kit Without Bracket (4001010027) Overview The Creality CR-Touch Auto Leveling Standard Kit (without bracket) is a professional-grade sensor upgrade designed to automate bed leveling for Creality 3D printers. This kit provides precise calibration, improved first-layer adhesion, and reduced print failures. It is ideal for users who already have a compatible mounting bracket or prefer custom installation solutions. Key Features High Precision Sensor : Delivers accurate bed leveling with a tolerance of ±0.01mm for consistent print quality. Durable Metal Probe : Built with a wear-resistant metal pin for long service life compared to plastic alternatives. Universal Compatibility : Works with multiple Creality printers, including Ender and CR series models. Plug-and-Play Installation : Simple wiring harness ensures quick setup without complex modifications. Stable Performance : Minimizes manual calibration errors and enhances first-layer success rates. Benefits Improved Print Quality : Achieve smoother surfaces and stronger adhesion with precise leveling. Time-Saving Automation : Eliminates the need for manual adjustments, streamlining your workflow. Cost-Effective Upgrade : Standard kit without bracket is perfect for users who already own or plan to customize mounting hardware. Reliable Results : Ensures consistent performance across multiple print jobs. Specifications Model Number: 4001010027 Sensor Type: Optical with metal probe Accuracy: ±0.01mm Compatibility: Ender series, CR series, and other Creality printers supporting auto-leveling upgrades Installation: Plug-and-play with included wiring and mounting hardware (bracket not included) What’s in the Box 1 × CR-Touch Auto Levelling Probe 1 × Wiring Harness (for easy connection) 1 × Set of Screws (for secure installation) Note : Mounting bracket is not included in this kit. Why Choose the Creality CR-Touch Standard Kit? The Creality CR-Touch Auto Leveling Standard Kit without Bracket is the perfect choice for makers who want a cost-effective, reliable upgrade. By automating bed leveling, it enhances productivity, reduces print failures, and ensures professional-grade results every time—without unnecessary extras if you already have a bracket solution.

item.description: Taking PLA to the next level is SA Filament Silk PLA+. If you want a breathtakingly beautiful shiny and silky prints then look no further. With higher Heat Deflection temperature, impact strength and improved durability makes SA Filament Silk PLA+ the perfect PLA alternative to all that want more wow factors from their prints. Silk PLA is known for bad layer adhesion and usually requires much slower printing speeds. SA Filament has developed a formula that prints at normal PLA temperatures and speeds, making it easy for everyone to enjoy! item.title: Laminating Pouches
item.description: What are they and why are they useful? Laminating pouches provide a protective covering that seals paper articles between two layers of plastic. This affords an all-round protective surface that is both flexible and sturdy. Laminating pouches can thus be employed for a wide range of uses, everything from to protecting documents to creating ID cards. There is a variety to choose from, which can be brought directly from our website. All laminating pouches that we stock are high quality and excellent value for money. They are just what you need for protecting your professional documentation, for creating signs and notices, or for protecting treasured personal pictures, postcards or letters. They are perfect for both office and home use. Excellent reasons for laminating Laminating paper based articles, such as documents or photographs , can protect them from getting damaged over time. Paper can be a flimsy and easily damaged material, and laminating pouches can help prevent this. Our laminating pouches range can keep your articles from getting creased or wrinkled, grazed, stained or smeared, or marked by grease or fingerprints; These kinds of damage are likely to occur if the documents pass through many hands during use. It can also protect them from water damage, or fading over time as a result of exposure to the air. This is an important consideration if you wish to maintain articles in pristine condition for a long period of time.

item.title: Creality K2 CoreXY High-Speed 3D Printer (260x260x260mm)
item.description: Creality K2 3D Printer – High-Speed CoreXY FDM Printer with Auto Leveling (260×260×260 mm) The Creality K2 is a next-generation FDM 3D printer designed for high-speed, intelligent printing. Powered by Klipper-based Creality OS, it features a compact CoreXY motion system, smart auto leveling, and quiet operation. With plug-and-play setup, it’s ideal for creative professionals, educators, and advanced hobbyists. Key Specifications Build Volume: 260 × 260 × 260 mm Max Print Speed: Up to 600 mm/s (recommended 300 mm/s) Acceleration: Up to 20,000 mm/s² Firmware: Creality OS (Klipper-based) with input shaping and pressure advance Extruder Type: Direct drive with hardened steel nozzle – supports flexible and abrasive filaments Nozzle Diameter: 0.4 mm (standard, quick-swap) Max Nozzle Temperature: 300°C – compatible with PLA, PETG, TPU, ABS, ASA, PC, carbon fiber composites Max Bed Temperature: 120°C – for strong adhesion and warp resistance Bed Leveling: Smart auto leveling with strain gauge sensor and targeted area calibration Motion System: CoreXY architecture with lightweight printhead and step-servo motors Build Surface: PEI-coated flexible magnetic plate Connectivity: WiFi, USB-C, microSD – supports Creality Cloud remote printing Control Interface: 4.3-inch color touchscreen with model preview Frame Material: All-metal enclosed chassis Dimensions: Approx. 500 × 500 × 600 mm Weight: Approx. 20 kg Assembly: Pre-assembled for plug-and-play setup Highlights Klipper-powered firmware for ultra-fast, low-vibration printing Smart auto leveling for consistent first layers and reduced setup time Quiet operation with step-servo motors and enclosed design Ideal for creative projects, multi-material models, and professional-grade prototyping Optional Upgrade The Creality Filament System (CFS) can be added separately to enable automatic filament switching, RFID material recognition, and multicolor printing with support for up to 16 filaments.

item.title: Creality K2 Plus Combo 3D Printer – Large-Format CoreXY with CFS Multicolor System, AI Cameras, and Heated Chamber
item.description: Creality K2 Plus Combo 3D Printer with CFS – Large-Format CoreXY Multicolor FDM Printer with AI Cameras, Heated Chamber, and 350×350×350 mm Build Volume The Creality K2 Plus Combo is a professional-grade FDM 3D printer designed for high-speed, multicolor, and multi-material printing. Featuring a robust CoreXY motion system , Klipper-based Creality OS , and the Creality Filament System (CFS) for automatic filament switching, it delivers exceptional performance for advanced prototyping, functional parts, and creative production. With a massive build volume and dual AI cameras, it’s ideal for serious makers and professionals. Key Specifications Build Volume: 350 × 350 × 350 mm Max Print Speed: Up to 600 mm/s (recommended 300 mm/s) Acceleration: Up to 30,000 mm/s² Firmware: Creality OS (Klipper-based) with input shaping and pressure advance Extruder Type: All-metal direct drive with dual hardened steel gears and filament cutter Nozzle System: Quick-swap nozzle with titanium heatbreak, copper body, and hardened steel tip Max Nozzle Temperature: 350°C – supports PLA, PETG, TPU, ABS, ASA, PC, carbon fiber composites Max Bed Temperature: 120°C – for strong adhesion and warp resistance Bed Leveling: Strain gauge auto leveling with Z-offset calibration Build Surface: Epoxy-coated flexible magnetic steel plate Chamber Heating: Actively heated to 60°C with air filtration for ABS/ASA compatibility Motion System: CoreXY architecture with step-servo motors for ultra-smooth movement AI Features: Dual AI Cameras for real-time monitoring, failure detection, and time-lapse capture Self-diagnostics and one-tap calibration Multicolor Printing: CFS (Creality Filament System) supports 4 filaments (expandable to 16) RFID filament recognition for automatic material tracking Connectivity: WiFi, LAN, USB-C, microSD – supports Creality Cloud remote printing Control Interface: 4.3-inch color touchscreen with model preview Frame Material: Fully enclosed all-metal chassis Dimensions: Approx. 550 × 550 × 650 mm Weight: Approx. 25 kg Assembly: Fully assembled Highlights Large-format multicolor printing with automatic filament switching and RFID tracking Klipper-powered firmware for ultra-fast, low-vibration printing AI-assisted monitoring and calibration for consistent, hands-free operation Actively heated chamber for high-temp engineering materials Ideal for professional prototyping, multi-material models, and production-grade workflows

item.title: Creality Ender-3V4 Combo 3D Printer with CFS 220x220x235 500mm/s
item.description: Ender‑3 V4 Combo 3D Printer Ultra‑Fast Precision Printing Print at speeds up to 500 mm/s with dimensional accuracy of 100 ± 0.1 mm, ensuring fast results without sacrificing quality. Flawless Surface Finish Input Shaping technology reduces vibration artifacts, delivering smooth surfaces and eliminating resonance ripples. Fully Automated Intelligence One‑tap auto leveling, Z‑offset adjustment, and filament handling make printing effortless. Aerospace‑Grade Design Die‑cast aluminum alloy frame provides lightweight portability (6.8 kg) with rock‑solid stability. Whisper‑Quiet Monitoring Operates at just 47 dB in Silent Mode, with a built‑in privacy camera for real‑time monitoring and secure time‑lapse creation. Multicolor Printing Capability Compatible with up to 4 CFS units, enabling 16‑color prints with clean transitions. Creality Cloud Integration Connect via the Creality Cloud App to access free models and print remotely. Quick‑Swap Nozzle Magnetic toolhead cover allows fast nozzle changes in seconds. Paper‑Like First Layer One‑piece heatbed ensures fast, uniform heating for flawless first layers. Technical Specifications Printing Technology: Fused Deposition Modeling Build Volume: 220 × 220 × 235 mm Printer Dimensions: 396 × 359 × 456 mm Combo Dimensions: 838 × 396 × 456 mm Printer Net Weight: 6.8 kg Printing Speed: ≤ 500 mm/s Acceleration: ≤ 12000 mm/s² Printing Accuracy: 100 ± 0.1 mm Layer Height: 0.1 – 0.35 mm Extruder: Dual‑gear direct drive extruder Filament Diameter: 1.75 mm Nozzle Diameter: 0.4 mm Nozzle Temperature: ≤ 300 ℃ Heatbed Temperature: ≤ 100 ℃ Build Plate: PEI Plate Leveling Mode: Full‑auto leveling File Transfer: USB Drive / Wi‑Fi / Creality Cloud Input Power: 100–240V~ AC 50/60Hz Rated Power: 900W Display Screen: 2.8" color touchscreen Power Loss Recovery: Yes Auto Filament Relay: Yes Filament Tangle Detection: Yes (with CFS) Input Shaping: Yes Lighting Kit: Yes RFID Filaments: Supported (with CFS) Supported Filaments: Hyper‑PLA / PLA / PETG / TPU 95A / PLA‑CF / PA‑CF Printable File Format: G‑code / 3MF CFS Compatibility: Yes (up to 4 extensions) Slicing Software: Creality Print 6.0 or newer File Storage: 8GB EMMC Printing Parameters Printing temperature: 190–230 °C Hot bed temperature: 45–60 °C Printing speed: 30–300 mm/s Recommended fan speed: 100% Post‑processing: For better results, expose the print to sunlight or a UV lamp after printing Printing platform: Carbon Silicon Glass, PEI Build Plate Printing Tips Store in a dry, ventilated environment Avoid high temperature, direct sunlight, or humidity If not used up shortly after opening, reuse with a drying box for best performance

item.title: Verbatim V3 Store & Go USB - 128GB - Grey
item.description: SuperSpeed USB 5Gbps. 'Slide and Lock' mechanism protects the USB connector when not in use. Compact, stylish design. V3 Slide and Lock Design Featuring a USB 3.2 Gen 1 interface for SuperSpeed data transfer, the Store 'n' Go V3 USB Drive is up to 10 times faster than USB 2.0 making it faster for transferring and saving larger file sizes of all types. The design of the V3 USB Drive also ensures that the USB connectors are protected featuring a 'slide and lock' mechanism. This locks into position when using the drive and retracts back into a closed position to protect the connector when not in use. Simple and easy to use, just plug into any USB 3.2 Gen 1 port (also compatible with USB 2.0) and drag and drop your folders and files. Based on USB 3.2 Gen 1 theoretical bus speed. Actual speeds dependent on file size and computer capabilities. SPECIFICATIONS Capacity: 128GB Read Speed: Up to 80MB/sec (USB 3.2 Gen 1 host system) Write Speed: Up to 25MB/Sec (USB 3.2 Gen 1 host system) Product Weight: 10 grams Product Dimensions: 58mm x 20mm x 11mm (L x W x H) Power Source: USB Bus (no batteries required) Interface: USB 3.2 Gen 1 - backwards compatible with USB 2.0 Format: FAT32

item.title: Epson C13S015327 ( FX-2190 ) Black Ribbon Cartridge
item.description: An exact fitting ribbon cassette enables easy and user-friendly replacement and does not jump out during printing. Perfect harmonisation between printer mechanism and ribbon transport means uniform distribution of colour which, in turn, ensures a clean and pleasing appearance and also makes ribbon-tightening a thing of the past. Of course, in the choice of ribbon fabric and mesh thickness, Epson pays special attention to the particular properties of the print head, in order to ensure that the ribbon does not fray and there is no chance of it getting stuck. In addition, costly repairs as a result of defective print heads and cash register breakdowns are avoided. Likewise, Epson places great emphasis on the choice of ink in which the ribbon is soaked: quality of print out, even distribution of colour along the length of the ribbon and predection of the print head pins from mechanical strain and chemical pollution are the important criteria which influence quality and perfect design. Over and above the design, Epson places great importance on quality assurance during the production process. In doing so, Epson guarantees excellent product properties at all times and an optimum harmonisation with the main product - the Epson printer.
